Our data, and code will be open-source at https://github.com/zhengkid/AutoTTS.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [254] [Generalising Travel Time Prediction To Varying Route Choices In Urban Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06918)
*Łukasz Gorczyca,Kacper Drozd,Michał Bujak,Rafał Kucharski*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 提出一种通用化旅行时间预测模型GenTTP，能够区分不同路径选择，在可变路径分配下准确预测流量和旅行时间，弥补了传统图神经网络方法仅适用于典型需求模式的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于图神经网络的系统级旅行时间预测方法仅适用于典型和重复性需求模式，无法捕捉不同路径选择带来的网络级出行时间变化。

Method: 提出Generalised Travel Time Predictor (GenTTP)，学习复杂的时空交通模式和路径选择与旅行时间之间的微观关系。

Result: GenTTP能够成功区分不同路径选择，在相同需求但不同路径分配的场景下提供准确的流量和旅行时间预测。

Conclusion: 该模型解决了旅行时间预测在可变路径分配下缺乏泛化能力的关键问题，使相同需求因路径选择不同而产生的网络级结果差异得以被准确预测。

Abstract: Previous methods that predict system-wide travel time, predominantly grounded in graph neural networks, remain limited to typical and recurring demand patterns. While they successfully predict future congestion following daily commute, they inherently approximate a single demand realisation and fail to capture varying route choices. In this work, we propose a Generalised Travel Time Predictor (GenTTP) that successfully differentiates route choices and offers accurate flow and travel time predictions. Our framework learns to uncover complex spatiotemporal traffic patterns and microscopic relationships between route choices and the resulting travel times. This addresses a critical gap: the lack of travel time prediction models that generalise across varying route assignments, where the same demand can produce substantially different network-wide outcomes depending on how travellers are distributed over available paths.

</details>


### [255] [The Cost of Consensus: Malignant Epistemic Herding and Adaptive Gating in Distributed Multi-Agent Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06988)
*David Farr,Iain Cruickshank,Kate Starbird,Jevin West*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文研究带宽受限环境下分布式智能体的协调问题，提出"认知对齐"概念，并证明现有协调指标无法检测智能体是否在错误信念上达成一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中分布式智能体在部分观测、不确定性环境下需要协调，但通信存在带宽约束和成本。现有研究未充分探讨通信频率与内容如何共同影响集体信念状态，特别是智能体可能在错误假设上自信地达成一致这一关键问题。

Method: 形式化定义"认知对齐"（Epistemic Alignment）这一概念，刻画智能体内部信念的兼容程度，并通过理论分析证明其与Jensen-Shannon散度、共识速率等传统协调指标的根本区别。

Result: 证明认知对齐无法从传统协调度量（如JSD、共识速率）中直接检测，即现有指标不能区分"正确共识"与"错误共识"。

Conclusion: 需要新的评估框架来捕捉智能体间信念的内在兼容性，以设计更鲁棒的通信策略，避免在带宽约束下集体走向错误结论。

Abstract: Distributed agents in real-world settings frequently must coordinate under uncertainty with only partial observations. Coordination is necessary to share beliefs to aid in task completion, but communication costs bandwidth, introduces latency, and if done poorly, can degrade collective reasoning. This tension is especially acute in bandwidth-constrained deployments such as distributed sensing networks, autonomous reconnaissance, and collaborative cyber defense, where excessive transmission carries direct operational costs. Existing work has focused on multi-agent exploration and communication strategies, but not on how communication frequency and content jointly shape the collective belief state. Central to this challenge is the degree to which agents maintain compatible internal beliefs about the environment, a property we term \textit{epistemic alignment}. When agents share beliefs effectively, they converge on correct hypotheses; when communication is poorly designed, agents may converge confidently on wrong ones. We formalize this distinction and show it is not detectable from coordination metrics alone such as Jensen-Shannon Divergence or rate to consensus.

</details>


### [256] [Social Theory Should Be a Structural Prior for Agentic AI: A Formal Framework for Multi-Agent Social Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07069)
*Lynnette Hui Xian Ng,Iain J. Cruickshank,Adrian Xuan Wei Lim,Kathleen M. Carley*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出多智能体社会系统（MASS）框架，主张用社会理论作为结构先验来建模AI智能体系统，并形式化了四个关键结构先验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI智能体系统常被孤立看待，但实际部署在社交环境中（如社交媒体、多智能体LLM管道、机器人集群），系统行为由多智能体交互涌现。社会科学家已在人类情境中研究了群体涌现动力学，本文认为AI系统也需引入社会理论作为先验。

Method: 形式化了一个MASS框架，将多智能体系统建模为一类动力系统，包含信息生成、局部影响和交互结构。提出四个社会理论锚定的结构先验：策略异质性、网络约束依赖性、协同演化和分布不稳定性。

Result: 通过形式化命题论证了每个结构先验的重要性，并提出了关于MASS应如何建模、评估和治理的研究议程。

Conclusion: AI智能体系统必须用社会理论作为结构先验来建模，MASS框架为此提供了理论基础和未来研究方向。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems are increasingly deployed not in isolation, but inside social environments populated by other agents and humans, such as in social media platforms, multi-agent LLM pipelines or autonomous robotics fleets. In these settings, system behavior emerges not from individual agents alone, but from the multi-agent interactions over time. Emergent dynamics of individuals in a social group have been long studied by social scientists in human contexts. \textbf{This position paper argues that agentic AI systems must be modeled with social theory as a structural prior, and formalizes a Multi-Agent Social Systems (MASS) framework for how agents interact and influence to generate system-level outcomes.} We represent MASS as a class of dynamical system of information generation, local influence and interaction structure, formulated by four structural priors anchored in social theory: strategic heterogeneity, networked-constrained dependence, co-evolution and distributional instability. We demonstrate the importance of each structural prior through formal propositions, and articulate a research agenda for how MASS should be modeled, evaluated and governed.

</details>


### [257] [Decentralized Diffusion Policy Learning for Enhanced Exploration in Cooperative Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07101)
*Yuyang Zhang,Haldun Balim,Na Li*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文针对去中心化软max策略梯度（DecSPG）中高斯策略表达能力不足导致探索受限的问题，提出去中心化扩散策略学习（DDPL），利用去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）作为策略表示，并通过重要性采样得分匹配（ISSM）实现高效在线训练，在多个连续动作MARL基准上取得一致性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DecSPG算法将能量基策略近似为高斯策略，但高斯策略表达能力有限，严重阻碍了智能体的探索能力，且这一问题随智能体数量增加而加剧。因此需要一种更具表达力的策略表示来提升MARL中的探索效率。

Method: 提出DDPL：1）用去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）参数化每个智能体的策略，利用其多模态分布特性增强探索；2）提出重要性采样得分匹配（ISSM）实现扩散策略的高效在线训练，并提供理论保证。

Result: 在多智能体粒子环境、多智能体MuJoCo、IsaacLab及JAX重实现的星际争霸多智能体挑战等连续动作MARL基准上，DDPL相较基线方法实现了一致性的性能提升。

Conclusion: 通过引入扩散模型作为策略表示，DDPL有效解决了高斯策略表达能力不足的问题，显著提升了去中心化MARL中的探索效率和整体性能。

Abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) involves complex agent interactions and requires effective exploration strategies. A prominent class of MARL algorithms, decentralized softmax policy gradient (DecSPG), addresses this through energy-based policy updates. In practice, however, such energy-based policies are intractable to maintain and are commonly projected onto the Gaussian policy class. In this work, we show that the limited expressiveness of Gaussian policies severely hinders exploration in DecSPG, and this limitation worsens as the number of agents grows. To address this issue, we propose decentralized diffusion policy learning (DDPL), which parameterizes each agent's policy with a denoising diffusion probabilistic model, an expressive generative model that captures multi-modal action distributions for enhanced exploration. DDPL enables efficient online training of diffusion policies via importance sampling score matching (ISSM), a novel training method with theoretical guarantee. We evaluate DDPL on representative continuous-action MARL benchmarks, including multi-agent particle environment, multi-agent MuJoCo, IsaacLab, and JAX-reimplemented StarCraft multi-agent challenge, and observe consistently improved performance.

</details>


### [258] [Rethinking Priority Scheduling for Sequential Multi-Agent Decision Making in Stackelberg Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07240)
*Xiangyu Liu,Liang Zhang,Bo Jin,Ziqi Wei*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文研究N级Stackelberg博弈中智能体决策顺序对均衡点的影响，并提出层次优先级调整（HPA）方法，通过上层策略动态选择最优决策顺序，下层在时空序列马尔可夫博弈中执行策略，实验表明HPA在多智能体高精度控制任务中优于基线算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究在多智能体系统中应用N级Stackelberg博弈时，通常直接使用环境提供的默认决策顺序，但决策顺序是否会影响最终的博弈均衡点尚不明确，需要正式分析该问题。

Method: 提出层次优先级调整（HPA）方法：上层策略根据当前博弈状态动态选择最优决策顺序；下层智能体在选定的顺序下于时空序列马尔可夫博弈（STMG）中执行策略；采用慢-快更新方案，利用上层策略的优势函数共享内在奖励来协调跨时间尺度的学习。

Result: 在多智能体MuJoCo等高精度控制任务上，HPA方法优于基准算法，并能稳健地适应环境变化。

Conclusion: 优化智能体的决策顺序在N级Stackelberg博弈中起着至关重要的作用。

Abstract: Current research applying N-level Stackelberg Game to multi-agent systems often uses the default decision order of agents provided by the environment. However, this raises the question: does the order of agents necessarily affect the final equilibrium point of the game? To address this, we formally analyze the N-level Stackelberg Game, where changing the order in which agents make decisions typically leads to an overdetermined system. As a result, the equilibrium point shifts unless special structural conditions are satisfied. Based on this analysis, we propose the Hierarchical Priority Adjustment (HPA) method, which adjusts and selects the agents' decision order. At the upper level, an upper policy dynamically selects the optimal decision order of agents based on the current game state. At the lower level, agents execute strategies in the Spatio-Temporal Sequential Markov Game (STMG) according to the selected order. To coordinate learning across time scales, we employ a slow-fast update scheme with shared intrinsic rewards derived from the advantage function of the upper policy. Experimental results on high-precision control tasks, including multi-agent MuJoCo, show that HPA outperforms benchmark algorithms and robustly adapts to changing environments. These results highlight the crucial role of optimizing the agents' decision order in N-level Stackelberg Game.

</details>


### [259] [OrchJail: Jailbreaking Tool-Calling Text-to-Image Agents by Orchestration-Guided Fuzzing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07414)
*Jianming Chen,Yawen Wang,Junjie Wang,Zhe Liu,Qing Wang,Fanjiang Xu*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 提出OrchJail框架，通过利用工具编排模式来对工具调用型文生图代理进行越狱攻击，相比传统提示越狱更高效，揭示了工具编排这一新的安全攻击面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工具调用型文生图代理的多步工具链能力引入了新的安全风险——无害的单步操作可能通过编排组合产生有害结果，传统提示越狱技术无法有效应对，需探索利用工具编排模式的越狱方法。

Method: 提出OrchJail框架，核心思想是通过学习成功的越狱工具调用轨迹及其与提示措辞的因果关系，直接引导模糊测试搜索更可能触发不安全多步工具行为的提示，而非依赖表面文本扰动。

Result: 在代表性工具调用型T2I代理上，OrchJail在攻击成功率、图像保真度和查询成本方面均优于现有方法，且对常见越狱防御具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 工具编排是一个重要但此前未被探索的攻击面，OrchJail为揭示T2I代理中的安全风险提供了新框架。

Abstract: Tool-calling text-to-image (T2I) agents can plan and execute multi-step tool chains to accomplish complex generation and editing queries. However, this capability introduces a new safety attack surface: harmful outputs may arise from tool orchestration, where individually benign steps combine into unsafe results, making prompt-only jailbreak techniques insufficient. We present OrchJail, an orchestration-guided fuzzing framework for jailbreaking tool-calling T2I agents. Its core idea is to exploit high-risk tool-orchestration patterns: by learning from successful jailbreak tool-calling traces and their causal relationships to prompt wording, OrchJail directly guides the fuzzing search toward prompts that are more likely to trigger unsafe multi-step tool behaviors, rather than relying on surface-level textual perturbations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OrchJail improves jailbreak effectiveness and efficiency across representative toolcalling T2I agents, achieving higher attack success rates, better image fidelity, and lower query costs, while remaining robust against common jailbreak defenses. Our work highlights tool orchestration as a critical, previously unexplored attack surface and provides a novel framework for uncovering safety risks in T2I agents.

</details>


### [260] [Synchronizing Minds through Collective Predictive Coding: A Computational Model of Parent-Infant Homeostatic Co-Regulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07524)
*Yushi Tsubamoto,Takato Horii*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出一个结合主动内感受推理与集体预测编码的亲子互动计算模型，通过Metropolis-Hastings命名游戏实现双智能体间的潜在状态对齐，模拟真实互动中的脑间同步现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究观察到亲子互动中存在脑间同步现象，但缺乏计算层面的解释说明两个仅有局部感觉输入和不对称内部知识的智能体如何实现潜在表征的对齐。

Method: 将POMDP框架下的主动内感受推理与基于集体预测编码假设的Metropolis-Hastings命名游戏相结合，构建亲子稳态共调节模型。父母通过外部感受信号观察婴儿，婴儿直接感知内感受状态，两者通过共享通信变量协商调节行动，且父母和婴儿拥有不对称的生成模型知识。

Result: 在6×6内脏状态网格世界中，MHNG介导的互动比单侧控制条件更有效地调节婴儿内脏状态，且两个智能体的后验概率快速对齐。更重要的是，潜在状态对齐远早于生成矩阵的收敛出现。

Conclusion: 该模型提供了脑间同步现象的最小计算解释，表明表征同步并不以完全共享的世界模型为前提，支持集体预测编码作为脑间对齐的计算基础。

Abstract: Inter-brain synchrony (IBS) observed in real-time dyadic interactions, including parent--infant exchanges, suggests that two agents come to share aligned latent representations through interaction. Yet computational accounts of how such alignment can arise between agents that have only local sensory access and asymmetric internal knowledge remain underdeveloped. We propose a constructive model of parent--infant homeostatic co-regulation that integrates a POMDP formulation of active interoceptive inference with the Metropolis--Hastings Naming Game (MHNG) derived from the Collective Predictive Coding (CPC) hypothesis. In our model, the parent observes the infant only through an exteroceptive signal while the infant directly senses its own interoceptive state; the two agents agree on regulatory actions through a shared communicative variable whose acceptance is determined by a locally computable Metropolis--Hastings probability. The agents are further endowed with asymmetric generative-model knowledge: the parent knows how actions transform visceral states but must learn what the infant's body is communicating, whereas the infant perceives its visceral state directly but must learn how actions affect it. In a $6 \times 6$ visceral-state grid world, MHNG-mediated interaction regulated the infant's visceral state more adaptively than one-sided control conditions, and the two posteriors became rapidly aligned. Notably, this latent-state alignment emerged far earlier than the convergence of the learned generative matrices, indicating that representational synchrony does not presuppose fully shared world models. These results offer a minimal constructive account of latent-state alignment compatible with IBS reported in hyperscanning studies and support CPC as a candidate computational basis for inter-brain alignment.

</details>


### [261] [Emergence of Social Reality of Emotion through a Social Allostasis Model with Dynamic Interpretants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07761)
*Kentaro Nomura,Yushi Tsubamoto,Takato Horii*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本研究通过计算模型模拟了情绪概念在社会共识中的涌现过程，结合符号涌现与主动推理，发现两个智能体的内感受先验偏好和符号概率分布趋于收敛，验证了基于社会共识的社会实在的涌现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证构建情绪理论中关于社会实在（社会共识上的情绪概念）的涌现过程，通过计算模型模拟内感受信号与符号交换的互动。

Method: 构建计算模型，整合符号涌现（含符号解释自由度）与主动推理，让两个智能体接收内感受信号、交换推断符号，并同时适应彼此的躯体控制目标与符号解释。

Result: 两个智能体的内感受先验偏好和符号概率分布趋于收敛。

Conclusion: 社会实在可以在社会共识的基础上涌现，计算模型成功模拟了这一过程。

Abstract: The theory of constructed emotion defines social reality as the community-level consensus on emotion concepts assigned to interoceptive sensations arising from bodily allostasis and social interaction. In this study, we simulate this emergence process using a computational model that integrates symbol emergence with degrees of freedom in symbol interpretation and active inference. Two agents receive interoceptive signals, exchange inferred symbols, and simultaneously adapt their bodily control goals and symbol interpretations to each other. Experimental results show that the interoceptive prior preferences and symbol probability distributions of the two agents converge, confirming the emergence of social reality grounded in social consensus.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [262] [RateQuant: Optimal Mixed-Precision KV Cache Quantization via Rate-Distortion Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06675)
*Fei Zuo,Zikang Zhou,Hao Cong,Xiaoyan Xi,Ho Fai Leung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 RateQuant，通过为不同注意力头分配不同比特数来量化 KV 缓存，解决了混合精度量化中因失真模型不匹配而导致性能退化的问题，在 Qwen3-8B 上将 PPL 从 49.3 降至 14.9（降低 70%），且校准仅需 1.6 秒、推理零开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在生成时缓存所有先前计算的 KV 对，导致 KV 缓存随序列长度线性增长，成为服务的主要内存瓶颈。现有 KV 缓存量化方法对所有注意力头分配相同比特宽度，忽略了头重要性的巨大差异。虽可自然地给重要头分配更多比特，但存在隐藏陷阱：不同量化器的失真曲线差异会导致分配顺序反转，性能甚至不如均匀量化。

Method: 提出 RateQuant：1）从少量校准集为每个量化器拟合其特定的失真模型 D(b)=alpha*beta^{-b}；2）利用率失真理论中的反向注水法（reverse waterfilling）以闭式解求解最优比特分配问题，从而避免失真模型不匹配导致的性能退化。

Result: 在 Qwen3-8B 上，平均 2.5 比特下，RateQuant 将 KIVI 的困惑度从 49.3 降至 14.9（降低 70%），QuaRot 的困惑度提升 6.6 个点。整个校准过程在单 GPU 上仅需 1.6 秒，推理时零额外开销。

Conclusion: RateQuant 通过拟合每个量化器特有的失真模型并采用反向注水法进行比特分配，有效解决了混合精度量化中的失真模型不匹配问题，在显著降低内存占用的同时大幅提升模型性能，且校准效率高、推理无额外成本。

Abstract: Large language models cache all previously computed key-value (KV) pairs during generation, and this KV cache grows linearly with sequence length, making it a primary memory bottleneck for serving. Quantizing the KV cache to fewer bits reduces this cost, yet all current quantizers assign the same bit-width to every attention head, ignoring the large variation in head importance. A natural idea is to allocate more bits to important heads and fewer to the rest. We show, however, that such mixed-precision allocation has a hidden pitfall: each quantizer follows a different distortion curve D(b)=alpha*beta^{-b}, and the decay rate beta varies from 3.6 to 5.3 across quantizer designs. Applying one quantizer's distortion model to another inverts the allocation order and makes performance worse than uniform quantization. We call this failure mode distortion model mismatch and propose RateQuant to resolve it. RateQuant fits a per-quantizer distortion model from a small calibration set, then solves the resulting bit-allocation problem in closed form via reverse waterfilling from rate-distortion theory. On Qwen3-8B at 2.5 average bits, calibrated RateQuant reduces KIVI's perplexity from 49.3 to 14.9 (70% reduction) and improves QuaRot by 6.6 PPL. The entire calibration takes 1.6 s on a single GPU and adds zero overhead at inference time.

</details>


### [263] [LKV: End-to-End Learning of Head-wise Budgets and Token Selection for LLM KV Cache Eviction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06676)
*Enshuai Zhou,Yifan Hao,Chao Wang,Rui Zhang,Di Huang,Jiaming Guo,Xing Hu,Zidong Du,Qi Guo,Yunji Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LKV将KV缓存压缩建模为端到端可微优化问题，通过LKV-H学习任务优化的全局预算、LKV-T学习内在KV重要性，无需启发式代理，在LongBench和RULER上达到SOTA，仅保留15% KV缓存即可实现近乎无损的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KV缓存压缩范式受限于启发式方法：启发式预算依赖统计先验而非任务目标，导致资源分配不当；启发式选择依赖耦合的查询-键交互或静态归纳偏置（如注意力汇聚）。作者旨在突破这些启发式代理的局限性。

Method: 提出LKV框架，包含两个组件：LKV-H（学习任务优化的全局预算分配）和LKV-T（在不实例化注意力矩阵的情况下推导内在KV重要性）。将KV压缩形式化为端到端可微优化问题，使压缩与任务目标严格对齐。

Result: 在LongBench和RULER基准上取得SOTA性能。在LongBench上，仅保留15% KV缓存即可实现近乎无损的结果。

Conclusion: 分析表明，学习型预算分配（learned budgeting）是保真度的主导驱动因素，数据驱动的分配对于克服手工启发式的局限性至关重要。

Abstract: Long-context inference in Large Language Models (LLMs) is bottlenecked by the linear growth of Key-Value (KV) cache memory. Existing KV cache compression paradigms are fundamentally limited by heuristics: heuristic budgeting relies on statistical priors rather than task objectives, causing resource misallocation, while heuristic selection relies on coupled query-key interactions or static inductive biases (e.g., attention sinks). To address this limitation, we introduce LKV (Learned KV Eviction), which formulates KV compression as an end-to-end differentiable optimization problem. LKV integrates LKV-H to learn task-optimized global budgets, and LKV-T to derive intrinsic KV importance without materializing attention matrices. This design bypasses heuristic proxies, strictly aligning compression with task objectives. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that LKV achieves state-of-the-art performance on both LongBench and RULER benchmarks at high compression rates. In particular, on LongBench, LKV achieves near-lossless performance with only 15\% KV cache retention. Crucially, our analysis identifies learned budgeting as the dominant driver of fidelity, demonstrating that data-driven allocation is essential to overcome the limitations of hand-crafted heuristics.

</details>


### [264] [A Wasserstein GAN-based climate scenario generator for risk management and insurance: the case of soil subsidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06678)
*Antoine Heranval,Olivier Lopez,Didier Ngatcha,Daniel Nkameni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于条件生成对抗网络（Conditional GAN）的人工智能框架SwiGAN，用于生成未来时空气候指数轨迹（以法国土壤湿度指数SWI为例），以支持保险行业应对气候变化引发的自然灾害风险加剧问题，模拟到2050年的干旱传播模式，助力适应性风险管理和保险策略设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然灾害年均成本从1970-2000年的700-800亿美元激增至2001-2020年的1800-2000亿美元，保险行业亟需超越偿付能力监管（如Solvency II）的一年期视野，制定中长期气候风险管理策略。

Method: 基于条件生成对抗网络（Conditional GAN）的SwiGAN模型，用于生成未来时空的土壤湿度指数（SWI）序列，模拟干旱传播模式至2050年。

Result: SwiGAN能够生成到2050年法国某干旱高风险区域的合理干旱传播轨迹，生成逼真的SWI地图序列，反映气候变化情景下的干旱动态。

Conclusion: 该框架不仅支持干旱风险的适应性管理和保险策略设计，还可推广至其他气候相关灾害及精算应用（如经济情景生成），为保险行业提供超越短期监管视角的中长期决策支持。

Abstract: According to the United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction (2025), the average annual cost of natural catastrophes increased from 70--80 billion USD between 1970 and 2000 to 180--200 billion USD between 2001 and 2020. Reports from organizations such as the IFOA and the WWF highlight the need for the insurance sector to adapt to this rapidly evolving context by developing medium- to long-term strategies that go beyond the one-year horizon of prudential regulations such as Solvency II. This paper introduces an artificial intelligence framework based on Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (Conditional GANs) to generate future spatio-temporal trajectories of climatic indices. The approach focuses on the Soil Wetness Index (SWI), a key indicator used in France to assess drought severity. Drought accounts for approximately 30% of the indemnities paid under the French natural catastrophe insurance scheme. The proposed model, SwiGAN, simulates plausible drought propagation patterns up to 2050 for a region of France particularly exposed to this hazard. By generating realistic sequences of SWI maps, SwiGAN provides insights into drought dynamics under climate change scenarios and supports the design of adaptive risk management and insurance strategies. The methodology is also generalizable to other climate-related perils and actuarial applications such as economic scenario generation.

</details>


### [265] [Breaking the Illusion: When Positive Meets Negative in Multimodal Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06679)
*Yubo Jiang,Yitong An,Xin Yang,Abudukelimu Wuerkaixi,Xuxin Cheng,Fengying Xie,Zhiguo Jiang,Cao Liu,Ke Zeng,Haopeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出 Positive-and-Negative Decoding (PND)，一种无需训练的解码框架，通过双路径对比（增强视觉证据的正路径 vs 惩罚语言先验的负路径）来缓解 VLM 中的物体幻觉问题，在多个基准上达到 SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLM 因过度依赖语言先验而产生物体幻觉（生成与视觉事实矛盾的内容），根本原因是视觉特征在注意力机制中被低估（under-weighted）。

Method: 提出 PND 框架：1) 正路径（positive path）放大视觉证据；2) 负路径（negative path）构造反事实样本以惩罚先验主导的生成；3) 在解码阶段对比两条路径的输出，引导生成朝向视觉 grounded 的结果。

Result: 在 POPE、MME、CHAIR 三个基准上取得 SOTA 性能，且无需重新训练模型。

Conclusion: PND 通过训练-free 的解码干预有效缓解了物体幻觉，验证了视觉注意力失衡是幻觉的重要成因，对比解码策略是可行的矫正手段。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are frequently undermined by object hallucination, generating content that contradicts visual reality, due to an over-reliance on linguistic priors. We introduce Positive-and-Negative Decoding (PND), a training-free inference framework that intervenes directly in the decoding process to enforce visual fidelity. PND is motivated by our finding of an attention imbalance in VLMs, where visual features are under-weighted. Our framework introduces a dual-path contrast: a positive path that amplifies visual evidence and a negative path that constructs counterfactuals to penalize prior-dominant generation. By contrasting outputs from both paths during decoding, PND steers generation toward visually grounded results. Experiments on POPE, MME, and CHAIR demonstrate state-of-the-art performance without retraining.

</details>


### [266] [On the Role of Strain and Vorticity in Numerical Integration Error for Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06680)
*Chenxi Tao,Seung-Kyum Choi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过分解速度场的雅可比矩阵为应变率S和涡量Ω，分析了流匹配模型中积分误差的来源，证明应变导致指数级误差放大而涡量仅贡献线性误差，并提出加权雅可比正则化方法，在少量积分步数下显著降低误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流匹配模型生成数据需要积分速度场，积分步数（NFE）直接影响推理成本。理解速度场的哪些属性控制积分误差，对于设计更高效的生成模型至关重要。

Method: 将速度场的雅可比矩阵分解为对称部分S（应变率）和反对称部分Ω（涡量），理论分析两者对积分误差的不同影响；提出加权雅可比正则化方法，对S和Ω分别施加权重α和β进行正则化。

Result: 2D合成数据实验验证了理论预测，在NFE=5时积分误差降低2.7倍；CIFAR-10实验在NFE=10时通过轻量微调将FID提升14%，同时保持高NFE下的生成质量。

Conclusion: 应变控制指数级误差放大，涡量仅贡献线性误差；最优输运速度场无旋且物质导数为零，可实现二阶欧拉精度；加权雅可比正则化能有效降低少步积分误差。

Abstract: Flow matching generates data by integrating a learned velocity field, where the number of integration steps (NFE) directly determines inference cost. We analyze which properties of the velocity field govern integration error by decomposing the velocity Jacobian into its symmetric part S (strain rate) and antisymmetric part Omega (vorticity). We prove that strain and vorticity play different roles: strain controls exponential error amplification through the logarithmic norm, while vorticity contributes only linearly to the local truncation error. We further show that the optimal transport velocity field is irrotational and has zero material derivative, implying second-order Euler accuracy; for exact displacement interpolation, the associated Lagrangian particle dynamics are integrated exactly by Euler. Motivated by this analysis, we study weighted Jacobian regularization with strain weight alpha and vorticity weight beta. Experiments on 2D synthetic data confirm the main theoretical predictions, showing up to 2.7x lower integration error at NFE=5. Preliminary CIFAR-10 experiments show consistent trends, with a lightweight fine-tuning procedure improving FID by 14 percent at NFE=10 while preserving high-NFE quality.

</details>


### [267] [A Hierarchical Ensemble Pipeline for Anomaly Detection in ESA Satellite Telemetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06681)
*Lorenzo Riccardo Allegrini,Geremia Pompei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种层次化集成流水线，结合形状特征与统计特征提取、逐通道建模、通道内堆叠和跨通道聚合，用于检测卫星遥测数据中的细微异常，在ESA-ADB基准上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以有效检测卫星遥测数据中的细微异常，需要一种能够处理多变量时间序列且具有强泛化能力的异常检测方法。

Method: 构建层次化集成流水线：基于shapelet和统计特征提取→逐通道建模→通道内堆叠→跨通道聚合。采用时间序列交叉验证和两级掩码策略防止信息泄露。

Result: 在ESA-ADB挑战基准上验证了强大的泛化能力，有效检测到卫星遥测中的细微异常。

Conclusion: 层次化集成方法能有效检测卫星遥测中的细微异常，具有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: A hierarchical ensemble pipeline is introduced to address anomaly detection in multivariate telemetry data provided by European Space Agency (ESA). The method integrates shapelet-based and statistical feature extraction, per-channel modeling, intra-channel stacking, and a final cross-channel aggregation. The pipeline is trained and validated using time-series cross-validation and two-level masking strategies to prevent information leakage. Results on the European Space Agency Anomaly Detection Benchmark (ESA-ADB) challenge demonstrate strong generalization, highlighting the effectiveness of hierarchical modeling in detecting subtle anomalies in realistic satellite telemetry.

</details>


### [268] [Toeplitz MLP Mixers are Low Complexity, Information-Rich Sequence Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06683)
*Benjamin L. Badger,Ethan Roland*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM)，一种用三角掩码Toeplitz矩阵乘法替代注意力的Transformer变体，实现了O(dn log n)训练时间和O(dn)推理时空复杂度，在信息保留和上下文学习上优于同类架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer的注意力机制具有二次方时间和空间复杂度，限制了长序列处理能力。现有次二次方架构要么需要复杂的输入调制，要么需要维护状态，作者希望探索一种更简洁高效的替代方案。

Method: 用三角掩码Toeplitz矩阵乘法替代注意力机制，在序列维度上进行矩阵乘法操作。Toeplitz矩阵具有沿对角线恒定的特性，可利用快速傅里叶变换实现O(n log n)的矩阵乘法，结合掩码保证因果性。整体架构为MLP-Mixer风格。

Result: TMM在训练效率上优于同类架构（同等计算量下损失更低）；具有更高的输入信息保留能力，从而在复制任务上表现更好；在信息检索和上下文学习基准上达到更优准确率。此外，通过算子指标理论分析发现，因果非可逆模型的Toeplitz层反而比实际可逆模型更倾向于可逆或近似可逆。

Conclusion: TMM证明了简洁的次二次方架构（无需复杂输入调制或状态维护）也能在效率和性能上超越更复杂的模型。更高的信息保留能力带来了更强的复制、检索和上下文学习能力。从算子指标理论来看，训练后的因果Toeplitz层展现出反直觉的可逆性倾向。

Abstract: Transformer-based large language models are in some respects limited by the quadratic time and space computational complexity of attention. We introduce the Toeplitz MLP Mixer (TMM), a transformer-like architecture that swaps attention for triangular-masked Toeplitz matrix multiplication over the sequence dimension resulting in $\mathcal{O} (dn \log n)$ time and $\mathcal O(dn)$ space complexity during training and $\mathcal O(dn)$ time and space at inference prefill. Despite the lack of sophisticated input modulation or state maintenance present in other sub-quadratic architectures, TMMs yield greater training efficiency in terms of loss achieved per compute and device memory. We demonstrate that TMMs are capable of retaining more input information resulting in improved copying ability, which we argue results from a lack of architectural biases. Consistent with higher input information retention, TMMs exhibit superior information retrieval and in-context learning benchmark accuracy compared to comparable architectures. We conclude with an analysis from the perspective of operator index theory and show that, counterintuitively, trained Toeplitz layers of causal non-invertible models are more likely to be invertible or nearly so than models that are actually invertible over their inputs.

</details>


### [269] [From Canopy to Collision: A Hybrid Predictive Framework for Identifying Risk Factors in Tree-Involved Traffic Crashes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06684)
*Abdul Azim,Ahmed Hossain,Soumyadip Maitra,Panick Kalambay*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究基于CRSS数据库(2020-2023)，利用CatBoost、SHAP和逻辑回归等分析方法，识别并量化了树木碰撞事故中影响伤害严重程度的关键风险因素。结果表明：未使用安全带是最重要的预测因子（严重伤害风险增加近3倍），其次为车龄、超速和驾驶员受损，且照明条件与车龄、超速与照明条件等因素之间存在显著的交互效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 树木碰撞事故是路外碰撞的一种严重子类型，常因高能量碰撞导致致命或严重伤害。现有研究对多因素交互作用的量化分析不足，本文旨在构建综合分析框架，系统识别和量化影响树木碰撞事故严重程度的风险因素，为制定针对性干预措施提供依据。

Method: 采用多步建模流程：(1) 使用CatBoost机器学习分类模型识别关键因素；(2) 利用SHAP工具量化和可视化主要影响因素的边际效应；(3) 建立二元逻辑回归模型估计因素效应并验证SHAP重要性度量；(4) 通过SHAP交互图检验关键因素的联合效应。

Result: 未使用安全带是最强预测因子，未系安全带乘员因抛射风险其严重伤害概率增加近3倍。车龄、超速违规和驾驶员受损也表现出显著影响。关键交互作用包括：照明条件与车龄、超速与照明条件、安全带使用与车龄、路面状况与超速，这些组合呈现累加风险效应。

Conclusion: 研究为基于安全系统的针对性干预提供了关键见解，包括加强安全带执法、在低能见度条件下进行速度管理，以及推进车辆 fleet 现代化。

Abstract: Tree-involved crashes represent a critical subset of run-off-road (ROR) collisions, often resulting in fatal or severe injuries due to high-energy impacts. This study develops a comprehensive analytical framework to identify and quantify risk factors contributing to crash severity in tree-involved collisions using the Crash Report Sampling System (CRSS) database spanning 2020-2023. The modeling framework follows a multi-step process. First, a machine learning based classification model (CatBoost) identifies key factors associated with binary crash injury severity (KA: fatal or incapacitating injury versus BC: non-incapacitating or possible injury). Second, SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) tool is used to quantify and visualize the marginal effects of top influential factors on crash severity. Third, a binary logistic regression model estimates factor effects and validates SHAP-derived importance measures. Finally, SHAP interaction plots examine the combined effects of key contributing factors. Results reveal restraint non-use as the most influential predictor, with unrestrained occupants nearly three times more likely to experience severe outcomes due to ejection risk. Vehicle age, speeding violations, and driver impairment demonstrate substantial effects, reflecting reduced crashworthiness, increased impact forces, and reduced control capabilities. Critical interactions emerge between lighting conditions and vehicle age, speeding and lighting conditions, restraint use and vehicle age, and road surface and speeding, demonstrating additive risk effects with specific interactions. These findings provide critical insights for targeted safe system-based interventions, including enhanced seat belt enforcement, speed management in reduced visibility conditions, and vehicle fleet modernization.

</details>


### [270] [Conformal Agent Error Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06788)
*Naihe Feng,Yi Sui,Shiyi Hou,Ga Wu,Jesse C. Cresswell*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于共形预测（Conformal Prediction）的框架，用于多智能体系统（MAS）中错误归因，通过连续序列预测集实现高效回滚恢复，并提供有限样本、无分布假设的覆盖保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）在失败时，定位关键错误是自动恢复的前提。由于LLM驱动的MAS交互轨迹过长，传统错误归因方法难以处理，亟需一种具备统计保证的归因方法。

Method: 提出基于共形预测（CP）的错误归因框架，设计针对序列数据的过滤式CP算法，输出连续的预测集合（而非离散点），以支持高效回滚与调试。方法具有模型无关性。

Result: 在多种智能体和数据集上验证了理论保证，证明错误能够被精确定位，并利用预测集实现MAS自动回滚以纠正自身错误。

Conclusion: 该框架为MAS错误归因提供了原则性的不确定性量化层，具备有限样本、无分布假设的覆盖保证，且模型无关，有利于自动化恢复与调试。

Abstract: When multi-agent systems (MAS) fail, identifying where the decisive error occurred is the first step for automated recovery to an earlier state. Error attribution remains a fundamental challenge due to the long interaction traces that large language model-based MAS generate. This paper presents a framework for error attribution based on conformal prediction (CP) which provides finite-sample, distribution-free coverage guarantees. We introduce new algorithms for filtration-based CP designed for sequential data such as agent trajectories. Unlike existing CP algorithms, our approach predicts sets that are contiguous sequences to enable efficient recovery and debugging. We verify our theoretical guarantees on a variety of agents and datasets, show that errors can be precisely isolated, then use prediction sets to rollback MAS to correct their own errors. Our overall approach is model-agnostic, and offers a principled uncertainty layer for MAS error attribution. We release code at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/conformal-agent-error-attribution.

</details>


### [271] [Robustness of Refugee-Matching Gains to Off-Policy Evaluation Choices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06686)
*Kirk Bansak,Elisabeth Paulson,Dominik Rothenhäusler,Jeremy Ferwerda,Jens Hainmueller,Michael Hotard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文验证了美国难民匹配场景中反事实影响评估结果的稳定性，使用多种离线评估方法（IPW、AIPW等）进行测试，发现估计值在所有场景中幅度一致且多数统计显著，与Bansak等人（2018）的原始结果一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 此前Bansak等人（2018）首次提出难民匹配可能提升难民安置效果，但该结果的稳健性尚未经过充分验证。本文旨在检验反事实影响评估结果在多种方法下的稳定性。

Method: 使用多种离线策略评估方法，包括逆概率加权（IPW）和多种增强逆概率加权（AIPW）变体，并考虑不同的建模架构和分配程序，对美国难民匹配数据进行反事实影响估计。

Result: 在所有场景中，影响估计值幅度一致，大多数情况下统计显著；且与Bansak等人（2018）的原始结果保持一致性。

Conclusion: 难民匹配的反事实影响评估结果具有稳健性，不受评估方法、建模架构或分配程序选择的显著影响，支持了此前研究的结论。

Abstract: Previous research has investigated the potential of refugee matching for boosting refugee outcomes, first considered by Bansak et al. (2018). This paper demonstrates the stability of counterfactual impact evaluation results in the context of refugee matching in the United States using a range of off-policy evaluation methods. In order to estimate counterfactual impact and test the robustness of our results, we employ several evaluation methods, including inverse probability weighting (IPW) and multiple variants of augmented inverse probability weighting (AIPW). We also consider various modifications, including alternative modeling architectures and different assignment procedures. The impact estimates remain consistent in magnitude in all scenarios as well as statistically significant in most cases. Furthermore, the estimates are also consistent with the results originally presented in Bansak et al. (2018).

</details>


### [272] [Conditional generation of antibody sequences with classifier-guided germline-absorbing discrete diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06720)
*Justin Sanders,Luca Giancardo,Lan Guo,Yue Zhao,Kemal Sonmez,Nina Cheng,Melih Yilmaz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于种系吸收扩散的抗体设计方法，通过离散扩散微调实现抗体序列的条件生成，显著提升了非种系残基预测准确率（从26%到46%），并在疏水性和结合亲和力条件生成任务上优于EvoProtGrad。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有抗体设计方法存在两个关键局限：1）模型主要记忆种系序列而非建模有生物学意义的体细胞变异；2）对灵活的基于分类器的条件生成支持有限。作者旨在解决这些问题。

Method: 1）离散扩散微调实现强大的抗体序列语言建模，支持基于任意分类器的条件生成；2）提出种系吸收扩散（Germline Absorbing Diffusion），以种系序列（而非掩码序列）作为吸收状态，使模型仅学习从种系到观测序列的轨迹，排除遗传变异和V(D)J重组统计的干扰。

Result: 非种系残基预测准确率从26%提升至46%，接近理论上限；在疏水性和结合亲和力条件生成任务上，模型在类别遵循度和样本质量之间实现了更优的权衡，显著优于EvoProtGrad。

Conclusion: 种系扩散模型能有效缓解种系偏差，在条件生成任务上表现优异，为抗体设计提供了一种新的有效范式。

Abstract: Antibody therapeutics are among the most successful modern medicines, yet computationally designing antibodies with desirable binding and developability properties remains challenging. While protein language models (pLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for antibody sequence design, existing approaches largely suffer from two key limitations: they predominantly memorize germline sequences rather than modeling biologically meaningful somatic variation, and they offer limited support for flexible classifier-guided conditional generation. We address these challenges through two primary contributions. First, we demonstrate that discrete diffusion fine-tuning achieves strong language modeling performance on antibody sequences while allowing for generation conditioned on any off-the-shelf classifier. Second, we introduce germline absorbing diffusion, a novel modification of the discrete diffusion noise process in which the germline sequence - rather than a masked sequence - serves as the absorbing state. This biologically motivated inductive bias restricts the model to learning the trajectory from germline to observed sequence, effectively excluding genetic variation and V(D)J recombination statistics from the learned distribution and dramatically mitigating germline bias. We show that germline diffusion improves non-germline residue prediction accuracy from 26 percent to 46 percent, approaching the theoretical upper bound set by true biological variability. We then demonstrate the utility of our germline diffusion model on the conditional generation tasks of sampling antibodies with improved hydrophobicity and predicted binding affinity. On both tasks our model shows an improved tradeoff between class adherence and sample quality, significantly outperforming EvoProtGrad, a popular strategy to sample from pLMs with gradient-based discrete Markov Chain Monte Carlo.

</details>


### [273] [MAGIQ: A Post-Quantum Multi-Agentic AI Governance System with Provable Security](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06933)
*Sepideh Avizeh,Tushin Mallick,Alina Oprea,Cristina Nita-Rotaru,Reihaneh Safavi-Naini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MAGIQ 是一个面向多智能体AI系统的后量子安全政策定义与执行框架，支持通信与访问控制策略、会话级执行、消息溯源问责，并在UC框架下形式化证明了安全性与正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 一方面，智能体AI系统需要安全的治理架构来确保智能体遵循通信策略并可被问责；另一方面，NIST要求2030年起逐步淘汰RSA、DH、ECC等公钥密码算法，现有系统需改造为量子抗性方案。MAGIQ旨在解决这两个交叉领域的迫切需求。

Method: 提出MAGIQ框架，核心包括：(i) 支持丰富的通信与访问控制策略预算（包括一对多全局预算）；(ii) 使用后量子密码原语执行策略；(iii) 支持智能体间及一对多会话的策略执行；(iv) 通过消息归因实现问责。安全性在通用可组合(UC)框架下形式化建模与证明。

Result: 在UC框架下形式化证明了系统的正确性与安全性，并与SOTA框架SAGA进行了计算与通信开销的对比评估。

Conclusion: MAGIQ是迈向智能体AI系统后量子安全解决方案的第一步，在保障安全性的同时提供了丰富的策略定义能力和问责机制。

Abstract: Our computing ecosystem is being transformed by two emerging paradigms: the increased deployment of agentic AI systems and advancements in quantum computing. With respect to agentic AI systems, one of the most critical problems is creating secure governing architectures that ensure agents follow their owners' communication and interaction policies and can be held accountable for the messages they exchange with other agents. With respect to quantum computing, existing systems must be retrofitted and new cryptographic mechanisms must be designed to ensure long-term security and quantum resistance. In fact, NIST recommends that standard public-key cryptographic algorithms, including RSA, Diffie-Hellman (DH), and elliptic-curve constructions (ECC), be deprecated starting in 2030 and disallowed after 2035.
  In this paper, we present MAGIQ, a framework for policy definition and enforcement in multi-agent AI systems using novel, highly efficient, quantum-resistant cryptographic protocols with proven security guarantees. MAGIQ (i) allows users to define rich communication and access-control policy budgets for agent-to-agent sessions and tasks, including global budgets for one-to-many agent sessions; (ii) enforces such policies using post-quantum cryptographic primitives; (iii) supports session-based enforcement of policies for agent-to-agent and one-to-many agent sessions; and (iv) provides accountability of agents to their users through message attribution. We formally model and prove the correctness and security of the system using the Universal Composability (UC) framework. We evaluate the computation and communication overhead of our framework and compare it with the state-of-the-art agentic AI framework SAGA. MAGIQ is a first step toward post-quantum-secure solutions for agentic AI systems.

</details>


### [274] [Enabling Unsupervised Training of Deep EEG Denoisers With Intelligent Partitioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06724)
*Qiyu Rao,Haozhe Tian,Homayoun Hamedmoghadam,Danilo Mandic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为iPSD的自监督学习框架，通过智能划分单段EEG信号为独立噪声实现，无需干净参考即可实现深度学习的EEG去噪，在极低信噪比和挑战性伪影下达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可穿戴EEG去噪面临两大难题：1) 神经信号微弱且与噪声频谱重叠，传统信号处理方法依赖固定规则无法处理时变伪影；2) 深度学习方法虽有潜力但训练需要不可获取的无噪声EEG作为干净参考。

Method: 提出智能划分自监督去噪（iPSD），核心思想是将单段输入EEG划分为多个具有相同底层信号但独立噪声实现的子段，从而构造自监督训练信号，无需任何干净参考数据，甚至支持零样本场景。

Result: 在可穿戴EEG（包括耳内传感器）数据集上验证，iPSD达到SOTA水平，尤其在极低信噪比（低至-10 dB）和挑战性伪影（如EMG）下，频谱保真度比基线方法高出数个数量级。

Conclusion: iPSD通过自监督划分策略成功规避了深度EEG去噪中干净参考不可获取的根本性瓶颈，为可穿戴EEG在实际应用中的可靠处理提供了新范式。

Abstract: Denoising wearable electroencephalogram (EEG) is inherently challenging since neural activity is not only subtle but also inseparable from spectrally overlapping noise artifacts. Classical signal processing methods, relying on fixed or heuristic rules, cannot handle the time-varying pervasive artifacts in wearable EEGs. Deep learning methods, on the other hand, show promise in decomposition-free EEG denoising using highly expressive neural networks, but the training requires artifact-free EEG, which is inherently unobtainable. To address this, we propose Intelligent Partitioning for Self-supervised Denoising (iPSD). Our method eliminates the need for clean references by learning to partition an input EEG segment into independent noisy realizations with the same underlying signal. This enables self-supervision of deep learning denoisers, even in zero-shot settings where only a single EEG segment to be denoised is available. We validate iPSD through extensive experiments, including validations on wearable EEG from in-ear sensors. The results show that iPSD achieves state-of-the-art performance, most notably under extremely low signal-to-noise ratios (down to -10 dB) and challenging artifacts (e.g., EMG), with spectral fidelity orders of magnitude higher than competitive baselines.

</details>


### [275] [Transformer-Based Wildlife Species Classification from Daily Movement Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06726)
*Obed Irakoze,Prasenjit Mitra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文利用Movebank平台上的7种野生动物GPS轨迹数据，训练序列模型（Transformer、LSTM、CNN、TCN）进行物种识别。实验表明，Transformer在平衡准确率上大幅领先基线模型（提升8-22个百分点），在1小时间隔的大象二分类任务中达到0.83平衡准确率和0.92 AUC。特征增强（速度、方向、转向）显著提升稀有物种性能，且1小时分辨率比30分钟更具鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仅依靠日常移动数据推断野生动物物种身份是一项具有挑战性的任务，现有方法在多物种、跨研究场景下的泛化能力不足。

Method: 使用Movebank平台7种野生动物的大规模GPS轨迹数据，训练Transformer、LSTM、CNN和TCN四种序列模型；采用"留出整个遥测研究或区域"的测试协议；对比基础位移编码与扩展运动描述符（速度、方向、转向行为）的效果；比较1小时与30分钟两种时间分辨率。

Result: Transformer在所有设置下均显著优于基线模型，平衡准确率提升8-22个百分点；大象二分类任务中Transformer达0.83平衡准确率和0.92 AUC；特征增强对狮子、斑马等稀有或低表征物种性能提升明显；1小时分辨率在减少缺失数据方面优于30分钟分辨率。

Conclusion: Transformer模型能从野生动物日常移动轨迹中有效推断物种身份，特征工程和时间分辨率的选择对模型性能有重要影响，1小时统一分辨率和扩展运动描述符是关键。

Abstract: Inferring the identity of wildlife species from daily movement data alone is a challenging task. We train sequence models on large-scale, 7-species GPS trajectories from the Movebank platform. Trajectories models are evaluated using a protocol in which entire telemetry studies or regions are heldout during testing. We compare Transformer-based sequence models to LSTM, CNN, and Temporal Convolutional Networks, and find that Transformers consistently achieve higher balanced accuracy with gains of approximately 8 to 22 percentage points, depending on the species and experimental setting. In an elephant binary classification task with 1-hour resolution, the Transformer achieves a balanced accuracy of 0.83 and an AUC of 0.92, substantially outperforming all baseline models. We examine, under data-limited conditions, feature representations by analyzing the differences between a basic displacement-based encoding and an expanded range of movement descriptors that include speed, direction, and turning behavior. With feature augmentation, we see clear performance gains, especially for underrepresented and sparsely represented species, such as large carnivores, lions, and Zebras. Finally, experiments comparing 1-hour and 30-minutetemporal resolutions show that while finer sampling can capture short-term movement patterns for some species, a unified 1-hour resolution yields more promising performance across studies by reducing missing data and ensuring consistent temporal coverage.

</details>


### [276] [Learning Material-Aware Hamiltonian Risk Fields for Safe Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07038)
*Aditya Sai Ellendula,Yi Wang,Chandrajit Bajaj*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于上下文能量项的选择性风险感知导航策略，仅在存在更低风险可行机动时激活避让自由度，否则抑制横向力。通过CVaR尾风险优化，在多项实验中显著降低误激活率和碰撞率，提高导航成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有风险感知导航策略缺乏选择性，容易在不安全的场景下产生危险机动。作者希望实现一种策略：当存在更安全的可行方向时激活避让，否则抑制避让行为，避免产生不安全幻觉。

Method: 在port-Hamiltonian导航策略中加入一个上下文能量项，产生具有可证伪选择性的学习力通道。当局部风险场存在更低风险可行方向时，上下文力朝向该方向激活；当逃生路径被阻断时，路径感知门控抑制横向力。使用CVaR尾风险目标聚焦于罕见但严重的风险转变。

Result: 在延迟必要逃生基准测试中，与DWA相比，过早力激活从0.950降至0.180，成功率从0.480提升至0.810且零重规划。在RELLIS-3D真实越野地形上，正确激活率0.837，误激活率0.114（对比风险梯度方法的0.378/0.752）。在DFC2018语义地图上，灾难性故障从0.60降至0.10，振荡减少90.7%。在高速公路上，可行时碰撞从100%降至0%，无逃生路径时抑制横向机动。

Conclusion: 选择性属性源自上下文能量的梯度结构而非训练超参数调节，证明了该方法具有可证伪的、基于几何结构的选择性避让能力，显著优于传统风险梯度方法。

Abstract: Risk-aware navigation should be selective: a policy should expose evasive degrees of freedom only when the local scene admits a lower-risk feasible maneuver, and suppress them when no safer alternative exists. We show that adding one context-energy term to a port-Hamiltonian navigation policy produces a learned force channel with exactly this falsifiable signature. When the local risk field contains a feasible lower-risk direction, the induced context force activates toward it; when the apparent escape is blocked or not yet available, a route-aware gate suppresses lateral force rather than hallucinating an unsafe maneuver. A CVaR tail-risk objective focuses gradient updates on rare but consequential risk transitions. We validate the selectivity signature across four settings. In the primary delayed-required-escape benchmark, route-aware CVaR reduces premature force activation from 0.950 to 0.180 versus DWA while raising success from 0.480 to 0.810 with zero replans. On real off-road terrain (RELLIS-3D), route-aware enrichment achieves correct activation rate 0.837 and false activation rate 0.114, compared to 0.378/0.752 for scalar risk gradients. On static semantic maps (DFC2018), enrichment reduces catastrophic failure from 0.60 to 0.10 and oscillation by 90.7% while preserving path efficiency. In highway traffic, collisions drop from 100% to 0% when a lane escape is feasible; when no escape exists, the policy suppresses the lateral maneuver. The selectivity property follows from the gradient structure of the context energy rather than from training-time tuning.

</details>


### [277] [Medical Imaging Classification with Cold-Atom Reservoir Computing using Auto-Encoders and Surrogate-Driven Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06727)
*Nuno Batista,Ana Morgado,Oscar Ferraz,Sagar Silva Pratapsi,Jorge Lobo,Gabriel Falcao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于中性原子储层计算的混合量子-经典流水线，用于医学图像分类（息肉检测）。通过引导式自编码器学习紧凑判别表征，并利用可微替代模型克服量子测量的梯度障碍，实现端到端反向传播。仿真结果表明该方法优于PCA和未引导自编码器等传统方法，在NISQ时代具有鲁棒性和实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学图像分类（如息肉检测）中，高维图像数据难以直接应用于量子计算；同时量子测量不可微导致梯度屏障，阻碍端到端训练。作者旨在设计一种能有效处理高维数据并克服梯度障碍的混合量子-经典方案。

Method: 1）引导式自编码器学习紧凑低维表征；2）将隐表征编码为Rydberg哈密顿量的脉冲失谐参数；3）通过期望值获得量子嵌入；4）使用可微替代模型模拟量子层，实现端到端反向传播；5）联合优化分类准确率和图像重建损失；6）最后用线性分类器对量子嵌入进行分类。

Result: 仿真结果显示该方法在息肉检测任务上优于PCA和未引导自编码器等传统方法。消融实验表明该方法对量子和训练参数具有鲁棒性，适用于当前NISQ时代的实际医学成像应用。

Conclusion: 提出的混合量子-经典流水线成功解决了量子测量不可微带来的梯度屏障问题，结合引导式自编码器有效处理了高维医学图像，在性能上优于传统方法，为NISQ时代的医学影像分析提供了可行的量子增强方案。

Abstract: We introduce a hybrid quantum-classical pipeline, based on neutral-atom reservoir computing, for medical image classification, focusing on the binary classification task of polyp detection. To deal effectively with the high dimensionality, we integrate a guided auto-encoder. This pipeline learns compact and discriminative representations of image data that are also well-suited for quantum reservoir computing. A key challenge in such systems is the non-differentiable nature of quantum measurements, which creates a 'gradient barrier' for standard training. We overcome this barrier by incorporating a differentiable surrogate model that emulates the quantum layer, enabling end-to-end backpropagation through the entire system. This guided training process is jointly optimized for classification accuracy and for faithful image recovery from the auto-encoder. The learned latent representations are encoded as pulse detuning parameters within a Rydberg Hamiltonian, and quantum embeddings are subsequently obtained through expectation values. These embeddings are then passed to a linear classifier. Our simulations show that this method outperforms some traditional approaches that use PCA or unguided autoencoders. We also conduct ablation studies to assess the impact of various quantum and training parameters, demonstrating the robustness and flexibility of our proposed pipeline for real-world medical imaging applications, even in the current NISQ era.

</details>


### [278] [The E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Transformer: Adaptive Geodesic Operations with Guaranteed Orthogonality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06729)
*Arash Shahmansoori*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EΔ-MHC-Geo Transformer 通过数据依赖的 Cayley 变换实现无条件正交残差连接，并引入混合架构处理反射（负特征值），在长程稳定性、近π旋转损失和范数保持上显著优于基线模型（如 JPmHC、GPT），且层数减少33%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度 Delta 学习（DDL）的 Householder 算子仅在特定参数下正交，且 Cayley 变换无法处理特征值 -1（反射）。论文旨在设计一种输入自适应、无条件正交的连接机制，同时覆盖旋转与反射两种正交群分量。

Method: 提出 EΔ-MHC-Geo 架构，核心包括：(1) 数据依赖的 Cayley 旋转 Q(x) = (I+(β/2)A(x))^{-1}(I-(β/2)A(x))，对所有 β 和输入保持正交；(2) EΔ-MHC-Geo Hybrid，通过门控 γ(x) 融合 Cayley 旋转与 Householder 反射 H2(x)；(3) 中点坍塌正则化器 4γ(1-γ) 鼓励边界门控决策。

Result: 在约1.79M参数下，EΔ-MHC-Geo 相比 JPmHC 和 GPT 实现：长程稳定性提升1.9倍和3.8倍；近π旋转损失提升4.5倍；范数保持均值偏差0.001；反射诊断中余弦对齐0.96；层数减少33%。

Conclusion: JPmHC 的有限 Cayley 残差混合器无法表示精确的 λ=-1 算子且缺少反射分支，本文的混合方法通过同时访问 O(n) 的两个连通分量（旋转与反射），实现了更全面的正交变换能力。

Abstract: We present the E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Transformer, a novel architecture that unifies Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), Deep Delta Learning (DDL), and the Cayley transform to obtain input-adaptive, unconditionally orthogonal residual connections. Unlike DDL, whose Householder operator is orthogonal only at $β\in \{0,2\}$, our Data-Dependent Cayley rotation $Q(x)=(I+(β/2)A(x))^{-1}(I-(β/2)A(x))$ preserves orthogonality for all $β$ and all inputs. To handle negation, an eigenvalue $-1$ case that Cayley provably excludes, we introduce the E$Δ$-MHC-Geo Hybrid, which combines Cayley rotation with Householder reflection via a learned operator-selection gate $X'=γ(X)Q(X)X+(1-γ(X))H_2(X)X$. A midpoint-collapse regularizer, $4γ(1-γ)$, encourages boundary gate decisions, where each selected component is orthogonal. In matched-parameter comparisons, with approximately 1.79M parameters per model and mean +/- standard deviation over 3 seeds, against four baselines including the concurrent JPmHC, E$Δ$-MHC-Geo achieves the best long-horizon stability, 1.9x over JPmHC and 3.8x over GPT; the best near-$π$ rotation loss, 4.5x over JPmHC on single-plane; strong norm preservation, with 0.001 mean deviation; and 0.96 negation cosine alignment in a diagnostic reflection probe, all with 33% fewer layers. While JPmHC's wider representation excels on pure rotation, its finite Cayley residual mixer excludes an exact $λ=-1$ operator and has no reflection branch, motivating our hybrid approach for accessing both connected components of $O(n)$.

</details>


### [279] [Semantic State Abstraction Interfaces for LLM-Augmented Portfolio Decisions: Multi-Axis News Decomposition and RL Diagnostics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06730)
*Likhita Yerra,Remi Uttejitha Allam*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了语义状态抽象接口（SSAI），一种将稀疏非结构化文本映射为K个可审计命名坐标的方法，用于在序列决策系统中分离表征假设与优化方差。在NASDAQ-100股票上以K=4轴（情感、风险、信心、波动预测）实例化，实验表明因子组合收益看似优异但统计上脆弱，SSAI主要作为可解释性-性能诊断工具而非性能提升方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以区分序列决策系统中，性能提升是来自更好的表征学习还是优化过程的偶然性。需要一种标准化框架来分离这两种效应，同时保持语义空间的可解释性和可审计性。

Method: 设计SSAI框架：将文本映射到K个可命名的语义轴坐标（默认为中性值）；实例化K=4轴（情感、风险、信心、波动预测）；在30只NASDAQ-100股票上评估，对比因子组合、岭回归预测器和强化学习智能体（DP-PPO, SAC），均使用相同的固定表征φ。

Result: 四因子组合累计收益307.2%（夏普1.067），看似优于买入持有（243.6%），但未通过覆盖分层控制检验、在≥0.2%交易成本下反转、且统计上脆弱于仅情感基线；PC1复合因子和FinBERT组合基线提供了更强的排序信号。岭回归和RL模块诊断了表征与优化器效应。

Conclusion: SSAI应定位为可解释性-性能诊断工具和可复用协议，而非声称优于稠密替代方案。它为稀疏文本决策系统提供了分离表征假设与优化方差的标准评估范式。

Abstract: We introduce Semantic State Abstraction Interfaces (SSAI): a methodological template for mapping sparse unstructured text into $K$ auditable, named coordinates with neutral defaults on no-news days, designed to separate representation hypotheses from optimisation variance in sequential decision systems. Our contribution is the framework and its evaluation protocol, not a claim that SSAI outperforms denser alternatives.
  We instantiate SSAI with $K=4$ axes (sentiment, risk, confidence, volatility forecast) on a US-equity panel (30 NASDAQ-100 names, FNSPID news, 2019--2023 test), and evaluate it across direct factor portfolios, supervised ridge forecasters, and RL agents (DP-PPO, SAC) that share the same fixed $φ$. The four-factor factor portfolio reaches 307.2% cumulative return and Sharpe 1.067, but apparent gains versus buy-and-hold (243.6%) fail coverage-stratified controls, reverse at $\geq 0.2$% costs, and are statistically fragile versus a sentiment-only baseline; a PC1 composite and a FinBERT portfolio baseline are stronger ranking signals in this setting. Ridge and RL blocks diagnose representation versus optimiser effects. We position SSAI as an interpretability-performance diagnostic and reusable protocol for sparse-text decision systems.

</details>


### [280] [On Training in Imagination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06732)
*Nadav Timor,Ravid Shwartz-Ziv,Micah Goldblum,Yann LeCun,David Harel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于模型的强化学习中，使用学习到的动力学模型和奖励模型进行想象 rollout 训练时，模型误差如何影响回报和策略优化。主要贡献包括：(1) 扩展了误差分析到带学习奖励模型的MDP，推导了最优样本分配（动力学 vs 奖励样本比例）以最小化回报误差上界；(2) 发现低Lipschitz常数可作为紧化该上界的表示目标，并与时间直化目标联系；(3) 分析了REINFORCE算法对噪声奖励的容忍性，证明零均值噪声不影响梯度无偏性，仅增加随rollout数递减的方差项；(4) 引入了预算约束下的实用权衡：用更便宜的噪声奖励获取更多rollout，还是用更贵的高质量奖励获取更少rollout，并简化为单维优化问题以刻画最优解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于模型的强化学习方法在策略更新期间完全依赖学习到的动力学和奖励模型进行想象rollout训练，而不查询真实环境。这种范式下，模型误差（动力学和奖励）如何影响最终策略的回报尚不清楚。本文旨在量化这些误差对回报和策略优化的影响，并探索在有限预算下如何最优分配资源（动力学样本 vs 奖励样本，以及rollout数量 vs 奖励质量）以最大化策略性能。

Method: (1) 将Asadi等人(2018)的误差分析扩展到带有学习奖励模型的MDP，推导在幂律缩放假设下最小化回报误差上界的最优样本分配比例（动力学样本与奖励样本之比）。(2) 提出低Lipschitz常数作为表示学习的目标，可紧化误差上界，并与时间直化目标建立联系。(3) 分析REINFORCE策略梯度在噪声奖励下的行为，证明零均值噪声保持梯度无偏，方差随rollout数量增加而减小。(4) 将预算分配问题（噪声奖励更多rollout vs 干净奖励更少rollout）简化为单维优化问题。

Result: (1) 推导了在幂律缩放假设下最小化回报误差上界的最优动力学-奖励样本分配比例。(2) 识别出低Lipschitz常数作为表示学习的理想性质，能收紧回报误差上界，并与时间直化目标相关联。(3) 证明了REINFORCE在零均值噪声奖励下梯度估计无偏，方差项随rollout数增加而衰减。(4) 将预算分配权衡简化为可求解的单维优化问题，并刻画了最优解的特征。

Conclusion: 本文为基于模型的强化学习中模型误差对策略优化的影响提供了理论量化框架。主要结论：(1) 动力学和奖励样本存在最优分配比例；(2) 学习低Lipschitz常数的表示有助于减小误差传播；(3) 在一定条件下，可以使用更便宜的噪声奖励来获取更多rollout，以在预算约束下达到更好的策略性能。这些发现为实际中更经济高效地设计基于模型的强化学习系统提供了理论指导。

Abstract: State-of-the-art model-based reinforcement learning methods train policies on imagined rollouts. These rollouts are trajectories generated by a learned dynamics model and are scored by a learned reward model, but without querying the true environment during policy updates. We study this training paradigm by quantifying how errors in learned dynamics and reward models affect returns and policy optimization. First, we extend the analysis of Asadi et al. (2018) to MDPs with learned reward models, and derive the optimal sample allocation--the ratio of dynamics samples to reward samples that minimizes a bound on return error under power-law scaling assumptions. We identify lower Lipschitz constants of the learned dynamics, reward, and policy as a representation desideratum that tightens this bound, and we connect this perspective to the temporal-straightening objective of Wang et al. (2026). Second, we examine how policy optimization with REINFORCE tolerates noisy rewards, which are often cheaper to obtain. We show that zero-mean reward noise leaves the gradient estimator unbiased and adds at most a variance term that decreases with the number of rollouts. This introduces a practical tradeoff: given a fixed budget, should one buy more rollouts with cheaper but noisier rewards, or fewer rollouts with more expensive but less noisy rewards? We reduce this choice to a one-dimensional optimization problem and characterize the optimum.

</details>


### [281] [Beyond Factor Aggregation: Gauge-Aware Low-Rank Server Representations for Federated LoRA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06733)
*Jinqian Chen,Chang Liu,Jihua Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GLoRA，一种用于联邦LoRA的规范表示方法，通过子空间对齐与共享参考坐标实现语义一致的更新聚合，支持异构客户端rank，在GLUE和SuperNI上优于现有联邦LoRA基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦LoRA直接对低秩因子进行平均聚合存在表示依赖性问题——相同的内在更新可以对应无穷多种规范等价的分解，导致因子级聚合结果随任意坐标选择而变化，造成语义层面的不匹配。

Method: GLoRA不直接聚合原始因子，而是先从客户端projector估计共识更新子空间，然后在共享参考坐标系中对齐聚合客户端更新，全程保持低秩形式；同时提供秩兼容读出机制，从同一服务端状态实例化不同秩的适配器，避免稠密重构。

Result: 在GLUE和SuperNI上，GLoRA在数据异构、资源异构（异构rank、稀疏参与）、更大骨干网络以及未见任务评估等场景下，一致优于联邦LoRA基线；并且取得了良好的效率-性能折衷。

Conclusion: 有效的联邦LoRA不仅需要简单平均低秩因子，更需要定义语义上有意义的服务端表示用于聚合。

Abstract: Federated LoRA enables parameter-efficient adaptation of large language models under decentralized data and limited client resources.However, directly averaging LoRA factors is representation-dependent: the same intrinsic update admits infinitely many gauge-equivalent factorizations, so factor-level aggregation can change under arbitrary coordinate choices while the underlying update remains unchanged. This reveals a semantic mismatch in existing federated LoRA aggregation rules. We propose \textbf{GLoRA}, a gauge-aware server representation for federated LoRA.Instead of aggregating raw factors, GLoRA estimates a consensus update subspace from client projectors and aggregates client updates in shared reference coordinates, thereby representing semantic update aggregation entirely in low-rank form. To support heterogeneous client capacities, GLoRA further provides a rank-compatible readout that instantiates adapters of different ranks from the same server state without dense update reconstruction. Experiments on GLUE and SuperNI show that GLoRA consistently outperforms federated LoRA baselines under data, resource, and task heterogeneity, including heterogeneous client ranks, sparse participation, larger backbones, and unseen-task evaluation. GLoRA also achieves a favorable efficiency--performance trade-off, suggesting that effective federated LoRA requires not merely averaging low-rank factors, but defining a semantically meaningful server-side representation for aggregation.

</details>


### [282] [Gated QKAN-FWP: Scalable Quantum-inspired Sequence Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06734)
*Kuo-Chung Peng,Samuel Yen-Chi Chen,Jiun-Cheng Jiang,Chen-Yu Liu,En-Jui Kuo,Yun-Yuan Wang,Prayag Tiwari,Andrea Ceschini,Chi-Sheng Chen,Yu-Chao Hsu,Chun-Hua Lin,Tai-Yue Li,Antonello Rosato,Massimo Panella,Simon See,Saif Al-Kuwari,Kuan-Cheng Chen,Nan-Yow Chen,Hsi-Sheng Goan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种门控QKAN-FWP框架，结合快速权重编程与量子启发式KAN，使用单量子比特数据重上传电路作为可学习非线性激活，并通过标量门控更新规则稳定参数演化。在长时间序列预测（528→132个月）中，12.5k参数的模型超越了高达13倍参数量的经典基线，并在真实量子处理器上验证了NISQ兼容性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量子快速权重编程（QFWP）依赖多量子比特架构，在NISQ设备上难以扩展且经典模拟昂贵。希望利用单量子比特电路和量子启发式方法实现可扩展、参数高效且NISQ兼容的序列建模框架。

Method: 1) 将FWP与量子启发式KAN结合，使用单量子比特数据重上传电路（DARUAN）作为可学习非线性激活；2) 引入标量门控快速权重更新规则，包含理论分析（自适应记忆核、几何有界性、可并行梯度路径）。

Result: 在长时间序列预测（528→132个月）中，12.5k参数模型在缩放MSE、峰值幅度误差和峰值时间误差上优于LSTM（25.9k-89.1k）、WaveNet-LSTM（167k）、Vanilla RNN（11.5k）和修正ESN（132k）；在IonQ和IBM量子处理器上部署，1024次测量下相对MSE误差在0.1%以内。

Conclusion: 门控QKAN-FWP是可扩展、参数高效且NISQ兼容的量子启发式序列建模方法，在长时预测任务上以极少参数超越经典基线，并展示了真实量子硬件部署的可行性。

Abstract: Fast Weight Programmers (FWPs) encode temporal dependencies through dynamically updated parameters rather than recurrent hidden states. Quantum FWPs (QFWPs) extend this idea with variational quantum circuits (VQCs), but existing implementations rely on multi-qubit architectures that are difficult to scale on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices and expensive to simulate classically. We propose gated QKAN-FWP, a fast-weight framework that integrates FWP with Quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (QKAN) using single-qubit data re-uploading circuits as learnable nonlinear activation, known as DatA Re-Uploading ActivatioN (DARUAN). We further introduce a scalar-gated fast-weight update rule that stabilizes parameter evolution, supported by a theoretical analysis of its adaptive memory kernel, geometric boundedness, and parallelizable gradient paths. We evaluate the framework across time-series benchmarks, MiniGrid reinforcement learning, and highlight real-world solar cycle forecasting as our main practical result. In the long-horizon setting with 528-month input window and 132-month forecast horizon, our 12.5k-parameter model achieves lower scaled Mean Square Error (MSE), peak amplitude error, and peak timing error than a suite of classical recurrent baselines with up to 13x more parameters, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks (25.9k-89.1k parameters), WaveNet-LSTM (167k), Vanilla recurrent neural network (11.5k), and a Modified Echo State Network (132k). To validate NISQ compatibility, we further deploy the trained fast programmer on IonQ and IBM Quantum processors, recovering forecasting accuracy within 0.1% relative MSE of the noiseless simulator at 1024 shots. These results position gated QKAN-FWP as a scalable, parameter-efficient, and NISQ-compatible approach to quantum-inspired sequence modeling.

</details>


### [283] [STDA-Net: Spectrogram-Based Domain Adaptation for cross-dataset Sleep Stage Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06736)
*Unaza Tallal,Shruti Kshirsagar,Ankita Shukla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出STDA-Net框架，结合2D频谱图CNN、双向LSTM和域对抗网络，在跨数据集睡眠分期任务中平均准确率89.03%、宏F1 87.64%，优于传统1D方法，且稳定性更好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨数据集睡眠分期因EEG通道配置、采样率、记录环境和受试人群差异而具有挑战性。现有跨数据集方法多依赖一维EEG信号，基于二维频谱图的非监督域适应方法尚未被充分探索。

Method: 提出STDA-Net框架，包含三个模块：(1) CNN提取二维频谱图特征；(2) 双向LSTM建模睡眠动态时序依赖；(3) 域对抗神经网络（DANN）实现源域到目标域的特征对齐，训练时无需目标域标签。

Result: 在Sleep-EDF、SHHS-1、SHHS-2三个数据集六种跨数据集设置下，平均准确率89.03%，平均宏F1 87.64%，一致优于1D基线方法，且五次独立运行方差更低，表明稳定性和可重复性更强。

Conclusion: 基于二维频谱图的表示结合时序建模和对抗域适应，为跨数据集睡眠分期提供了鲁棒且具有竞争力的方案，是传统一维EEG输入的有效替代。

Abstract: Accurate sleep stage classification across datasets remains challenging due to variability in EEG channel montages, sampling rates, recording environments, and subject populations. Although deep learning has shown considerable promise for automated sleep staging, most existing cross-dataset methods rely on one-dimensional EEG signal representations, whereas the use of two-dimensional spectrogram-based inputs within an unsupervised domain adaptation framework has remained largely unexplored. Here, we propose STDA-Net (Spectrogram-based Temporal Domain Adaptation Network), a framework that combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) for spectrogram-based feature extraction, a bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) module for temporal modeling of sleep dynamics, and a domain-adversarial neural network (DANN) for source-to-target feature alignment without requiring any labeled target-domain data during training. Experiments are conducted on three publicly available datasets Sleep-EDF, SHHS-1, and SHHS-2 under six cross-dataset transfer settings. Results show that the proposed framework achieves an average accuracy of 89.03% and an average macro F1-score of 87.64%, consistently outperforming existing 1D baseline methods in terms of balanced classification performance, with substantially lower variance across five independent runs, indicating improved stability and reproducibility. Overall, these findings demonstrate that 2D spectrogram-based representations, combined with temporal modeling and adversarial domain adaptation, provide a robust and competitive alternative to conventional 1D EEG inputs for cross-dataset sleep staging.

</details>


### [284] [Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Network (GeoKAN)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06740)
*Abhijit Sen,Bikram Keshari Parida,Giridas Maiti,Mahima Arya,Denys I. Bondar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GeoKAN是一类几何感知的KAN模型，通过学习对角黎曼度量来扭曲输入空间，在几何自适应坐标下进行函数逼近，从而更好地处理尖峰、刚性、局部化和强非均匀问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统KAN模型在固定欧几里得坐标下进行逼近，缺乏几何感知能力，难以有效处理具有剧烈变化、局部化特征的科学机器学习问题。作者希望通过学习输入空间的几何结构来提升模型表达能力。

Method: 通过学习对角黎曼度量对输入空间进行几何扭曲，在自适应坐标下进行基展开和特征混合。提出三个变体：GeoKAN-NNMetric（神经网络度量）、GeoKAN-γ（参数化度量）和LM-KAN（学习度量），其中LM-KAN又包含RBF、小波和傅里叶三种基函数版本。

Result: GeoKAN能够根据任务需求自动拉伸变化剧烈的区域、压缩平滑区域，从而重新分配表示分辨率，将模型容量集中在最需要的地方。

Conclusion: GeoKAN特别适用于科学机器学习和微分方程问题中的尖峰、刚性、局部化和强非均匀场景，通过几何归纳偏置（局部长度缩放和体积扭曲）提升了模型在物理信息学习中的表现。

Abstract: We introduce Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (GeoKANs), a family of geometry-aware KAN-type models in which approximation is carried out in learned, geometry-adapted coordinates rather than in fixed Euclidean input coordinates. GeoKAN achieves this by learning a diagonal Riemannian metric that warps the input before basis expansion and feature mixing. The learned metric provides a geometric inductive bias through local length scaling and volume distortion, and in physics-informed settings it also affects the differential structure seen by the model. Within this framework, we develop three main variants, namely GeoKAN-NNMetric, GeoKAN-$γ$, and LM-KAN. For LM-KAN, we further consider three basis-specific versions, LM-KAN-RBF, LM-KAN-Wav, and LM-KAN-Fourier. These variants allow us to study geometry-aware KAN models both as general function approximators and as surrogates in physics-informed learning. By stretching regions with rapid variation and compressing smoother regions, GeoKAN reallocates representational resolution in a task-dependent manner, allowing the model to place capacity where it is most needed. As a result, GeoKAN is well suited to sharp, stiff, localized, and strongly non-uniform regimes arising in scientific machine learning and differential-equation problems.

</details>


### [285] [A Closed-Form Upper Bound for Admissible Learning-Rate Steps in Belief-Space Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06741)
*Zixi Li,Youzhen Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出学习率步长并非超参数，而是可通过局部置信空间计算得出的公式化上界，基于概率单纯形上的投影前向步长模型和KL/Bregman几何中的压缩性条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上将学习率步长视为需要手动调节的超参数，缺乏理论指导；本文试图从几何视角为步长选择提供理论依据。

Method: 将更新过程建模为概率单纯形上的投影前向步长，利用KL散度/Bregman散度的自然几何结构，推导可容许步长的压缩性条件，从而得到步长的解析上界公式。

Result: 可容许步长的上界并非经验调参口号，而是一个可由公式精确计算的量。

Conclusion: 学习率步长选择可以从经验调参转向理论指导，基于几何模型给出明确上界公式。

Abstract: Learning-rate steps are usually treated as hyperparameters. This paper isolates a local beliefspace calculation: when an update is modeled as a projected forward step on the probability simplex, admissibility means contractivity in the natural KL/Bregman geometry. Under this model, the upper bound of an admissible step is not a tuning slogan but a formula.

</details>


### [286] [Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06755)
*Ismam Nur Swapnil,Aranya Saha,Tanvir Ahmed Khan,Mohammad Ariful Haque,Ser-Nam Lim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GXPO，一种仅需三次反向传播即可近似多步前瞻的策略更新方法，在数学推理任务上优于GRPO和SFPO，并实现最高4倍步数加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准GRPO仅用当前步更新模型，而完整多步前瞻虽能提供更好更新方向但计算成本过高（需要大量反向传播）。目标是找到一种近似多步前瞻且计算高效的方法。

Method: GXPO通过三次反向传播实现主动阶段的长局部前瞻近似：先执行两次快速优化步并测量梯度变化，预测虚拟K步前瞻点，将策略部分移向该点，再在新位置用真实梯度进行校正更新。当前瞻信号不稳定时自动回退为标准GRPO。

Result: 在Qwen2.5和Llama数学推理实验中，GXPO在平均采样pass@1上比GRPO提升+1.65到+5.00个点，比最强SFPO提升+0.14到+1.28个点。达到GRPO峰值精度时，最多实现4.00倍步数加速、2.33倍实际时间加速和1.33倍反向传播加速。

Conclusion: GXPO是一种即插即用的高效策略更新规则，通过梯度外推近似多步前瞻，在显著提升性能的同时保持计算成本可控，为推理型强化学习提供了一种实用优化方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning is widely used to improve the reasoning ability of large language models, especially when answers can be automatically checked. Standard GRPO-style training updates the model using only the current step, while full multi-step lookahead can give a better update direction but is too expensive because it needs many backward passes. We propose Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization (GXPO), a plug-compatible policy-update rule for GRPO-style reasoning RL. GXPO approximates a longer local lookahead using only three backward passes during an active phase. It reuses the same batch of rollouts, rewards, advantages, and GRPO loss, so it does not require new rollouts or reward computation at the lookahead points. GXPO takes two fast optimizer steps, measures how the gradients change, predicts a virtual K-step lookahead point, moves the policy partway toward that point, and then applies a corrective update using the true gradient at the new position. When the lookahead signal becomes unstable, GXPO automatically switches back to standard single-pass GRPO. We also give a plain-gradient-descent surrogate analysis that explains when the extrapolation is exact and where its local errors come from. Across Qwen2.5 and Llama math-reasoning experiments, GXPO improves the average sampled pass@1 by +1.65 to +5.00 points over GRPO and by +0.14 to +1.28 points over the strongest SFPO setting, while keeping the active-phase cost fixed at three backward passes. It also achieves up to 4.00x step speedup, 2.33x wall-clock speedup, and 1.33x backward-pass speedup in reaching GRPO's peak accuracy.

</details>


### [287] [Physics-based Digital Twins for Integrated Thermal Energy Systems Using Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06756)
*Umme Mahbuba Nabila,Paul Seurin,Linyu Lin,Majdi I. Radaideh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种主动学习框架，结合Modelica仿真与四种代理模型（SINDyC、MvG-SINDyC、FNN、GRU），通过模型特定的查询策略，仅需五分之一仿真轨迹即可达到同等预测精度，在热能分配系统乙二醇换热器上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 热能分配系统的实时监控需要兼具准确性、可解释性、不确定性感知且计算高效的数字孪生，但高保真仿真成本高，纯数据驱动代理模型鲁棒性不足，因此需要一种更高效且可靠的方法。

Method: 提出主动学习框架，将系统级Modelica仿真与四种代理模型（确定性SINDyC、概率性MvG-SINDyC、FNN、GRU）耦合；针对不同代理模型设计特定查询策略（如MvG-SINDyC使用系数空间马氏距离采样，其余使用预测空间误差采样），优先选择动态信息丰富的轨迹进行学习。

Result: 在GHX子系统上，主动学习框架仅需随机采样五分之一轨迹即可达到相当预测精度；GRU预测精度最高，SINDyC计算效率最高且可解释性最强；概率性MvG-SINDyC能提供不确定性量化，且在主动学习下计算增益最大。

Conclusion: 主动学习框架能显著降低热能量分布系统数字孪生所需仿真数据量，不同代理模型各有优势：GRU精度最高，SINDyC效率与可解释性最佳，MvG-SINDyC提供不确定性量化，可根据实际需求选择。

Abstract: Real-time supervisory control of thermal energy distribution systems requires digital twins that are accurate, interpretable, and uncertainty-aware, yet remain data and computationally efficient. High-fidelity simulations alone are costly, while purely data-driven surrogates often lack robustness. To address these challenges, this work proposes an active learning (AL) framework that couples system-level Modelica simulations with four simpler physics-informed and data-driven surrogate modeling approaches: deterministic Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics with Control (SINDyC), its probabilistic multivariate-Gaussian extension (MvG-SINDyC), feedforward neural network (FNN), and gated recurrent unit (GRU) network. Tailored to each surrogate, model-specific AL query strategies are employed, including Mahalanobis-distance sampling in coefficient space for MvG-SINDyC and error-based sampling in prediction space for SINDyC, FNN, and GRU, allowing the learning process to prioritize dynamically informative trajectories.
  The proposed approach is demonstrated on the glycol heat exchanger (GHX) subsystem of the Thermal Energy Distribution System (TEDS) at Idaho National Laboratory. Across key GHX outputs--the bypass mass flow rate $\dot{m}_{\mathrm{GHX}}$ and heat transfer rate $Q_{\mathrm{GHX}}$-the AL framework achieves comparable predictive accuracy using as few as one-fifth of the simulation trajectories required by random sampling. Among the evaluated surrogates, the GRU achieves the highest predictive fidelity, while SINDyC remains the most computationally efficient and interpretable. The probabilistic MvG-SINDyC surrogate further enables uncertainty quantification and exhibits the largest computational gains under AL.

</details>


### [288] [Sparse Attention as a Range Searching Problem: Towards an Inference-Efficient Index for KV Cache](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06763)
*Mohsen Dehghankar,Abolfazl Asudeh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Louver，一种基于半空间范围搜索的KV缓存索引结构，在稀疏注意力中实现零假阴性（保证召回所有超过阈值的相关键），同时兼顾计算效率，比FlashAttention更快。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏注意力方法虽能提升推理效率，但无法保证零假阴性——遗漏关键KV条目会导致严重误差，尤其在长推理任务中相关token集随解码步骤动态变化。作者观察到遗漏一个关键键就会引发误差尖峰，因此需要一种能动态适应解码步骤变化并保证完全召回相关键的索引方法。

Method: 将稀疏注意力重新表述为半空间范围搜索问题，并设计Louver索引结构。Louver在理论和实践上保证对指定阈值的零假阴性，轻量级可集成到现有LLM流程中，并包含面向CPU和GPU的硬件感知优化。

Result: 实验表明Louver在准确性和运行时间上均优于先前的稀疏注意力方法，且比高度优化的密集注意力（如FlashAttention）更快。

Conclusion: 召回保证是稀疏注意力中一个被忽视的关键维度，Louver为构建有理论保障且高效的KV缓存索引开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Sparse attention improves LLM inference efficiency by selecting a subset of key-value entries, but at the cost of potential accuracy degradation. In particular, omitting critical KV entries can induce substantial errors in model outputs. Existing methods typically operate under fixed or adaptive token budgets and provide empirical robustness or partial theoretical guarantees, yet they do not ensure zero false negatives in decoding steps, particularly since the set of relevant tokens is both query- and step-dependent. Our empirical observations confirm that missing even one critical key can lead to sharp error spikes, especially in long reasoning tasks where the set of important tokens varies throughout decoding. This observation motivates the need for indexing methods that dynamically adapt to these variations across decoding steps while guaranteeing a full recall of the relevant keys above a certain threshold. We address this challenge by reformulating sparse attention as the halfspace range searching problem. However, existing range searching indices are not suitable for modern LLM inference due to their computational and implementation overheads. To overcome this, we introduce Louver, a novel index structure tailored for efficient KV cache retrieval. Louver (i) guarantees zero false negatives with respect to a specified threshold in both theory and practice, (ii) is lightweight to integrate into existing LLM pipelines, and (iii) incorporates hardware-aware optimizations for both CPU and GPU executions. Our experiments demonstrate that Louver outperforms prior sparse attention methods in both accuracy and runtime, and is faster than highly optimized dense attentions such as FlashAttention. These results highlight that recall guarantees are a critical and overlooked dimension of sparse attention, and open a new direction for building theoretically grounded, efficient KV cache indices.

</details>


### [289] [Revisiting Adam for Streaming Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06764)
*Florin Gogianu,Adrian Catalin Lutu,Razvan Pascanu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了无需经验回放的在线深度强化学习，发现传统算法（如C51）在适当优化下表现良好，并提出了基于资格迹的方差调整算法Adaptive Q(λ)，在55个Atari游戏中超越现有方法，接近人类基准的两倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长期以来深度强化学习依赖经验回放或并行采样来稳定训练，但这种方式增加了复杂性和存储开销。作者希望探索是否可以在完全不存储经验（在线设置）下，通过改进优化算法实现稳定且高效的强化学习。

Method: 系统分析DQN和C51等经典算法在在线设置下的表现，特别关注优化器（Adam）与更新规则的交互。发现两个关键特性：1) 目标函数的导数必须有界；2) 权重更新需进行方差调整。基于此，提出Adaptive Q(λ)——结合资格迹的方差调整算法。

Result: 在55个Atari游戏子集上，C51与StreamQ性能相当；Adaptive Q(λ)在所有评估指标上超越现有方法，性能达到人类基准的两倍。

Conclusion: 在线深度强化学习无需复杂机制（如回放缓冲区）也能取得优异表现，关键在于目标函数的有界导数与方差调整，这为设计更简单、高效的强化学习算法提供了新方向。

Abstract: Learning from a sequence of interactions, as soon as observations are perceived and acted upon, without explicitly storing them, holds the promise of simpler, more efficient and adaptive algorithms. For over a decade, however, deep reinforcement learning walked the contrary path, augmenting agents with replay buffers or parallel sampling routines, in an effort to tame learning instability. Recently, this topic has been revisited by Elsayed et al. (2024), focusing on update computation through eligibility traces and modifications to the optimisation routine, resulting in the StreamQ algorithm. In this work we take a step back, investigating the efficacy of established updates, such as those implemented by DQN and C51 within this online setting. Not only do we find that they perform well, but through analysing how the optimisation algorithm generally, and Adam in particular, interacts with these updates, we contend that two properties are essential for robust performance: i) the derivative of the objective is to be bounded and ii) weight updates are variance-adjusted. Rigorous and exhaustive experimentation demonstrates that C51, which exhibits both characteristics, is competitive with StreamQ across a subset of 55 Atari games. Using these insights, we derive a variance-adjusted algorithm based on eligibility traces, termed Adaptive Q$(λ)$, which approaches double the human baseline on the same subset, surpassing existing methods by all performance metrics.

</details>


### [290] [Distributional Process Reward Models: Calibrated Prediction of Future Rewards via Conditional Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06785)
*Rachel Ma,Dylan Hadfield-Menell,Kristjan Greenewald*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将条件最优传输（CondOT）用于过程奖励模型（PRM）的校准，通过估计单调条件分位数函数，显著提升了PRM的校准质量，并在数学推理基准上验证了其在下游任务中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推理时扩展方法依赖过程奖励模型（PRM），但PRM往往校准不佳，会高估成功概率，因此需要有效的校准方法。

Method: 首次利用条件最优传输（CondOT）校准PRM，通过修改CondOT映射学习来估计基于PRM隐藏状态的条件单调分位数函数，从而获得结构有效的分位数估计和任意置信水平的置信区间，并将其集成到实例自适应扩展（IAS）框架中。

Result: 在MATH-500和AIME基准上，所提方法在校准质量上显著优于未校准的PRM和分位数回归；在下游Best-of-N IAS任务中，整体性能也优于未校准的PRM。

Conclusion: 条件最优传输为PRM校准提供了一种 principled 且实用的新方法，具备结构性保证和灵活的不确定性估计能力。

Abstract: Inference-time scaling methods rely on Process Reward Models (PRMs), which are often poorly calibrated and overestimate success probabilities. We propose, to our knowledge, the first use of conditional optimal transport for calibrating PRMs, modifying conditional OT (CondOT) map learning \cite{bunne2022supervised} to estimate a monotonic conditional quantile function over success probabilities estimated by the PRM, conditioned on PRM hidden states. This yields structurally valid quantile estimates and enables efficient extraction of confidence bounds at arbitrary levels, which we integrate into the instance-adaptive scaling (IAS) framework of \cite{park2025know}. We evaluate on mathematical reasoning benchmarks spanning moderate-difficulty problems (MATH-500) and harder out-of-distribution problems (AIME). For PRMs with reliable ranking signals, our method substantially improves calibration over both uncalibrated PRMs and quantile regression.
