Matched-prefix interventions identify late MLP windows as the largest tested leverage point: late IT grafts into PT hosts increase late KL by +0.34 nats, while PT-late swaps into IT hosts reduce it by -0.51 nats; matched random late perturbations give only +0.003 versus +0.327 for the true late graft. A preselected Gemma case study provides behavior-facing plausibility for the same late swap, without serving as a benchmark claim. These results identify a robust predictiondynamics signature of post-training: released instruction-following checkpoints tend to settle later, and late MLP computation is the strongest tested bidirectional handle on that delay under matched histories.

</details>


### [402] [Instruction Tuning Changes How Upstream State Conditions Late Readout: A Cross-Patching Diagnostic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07284)
*Yifan Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过"首次发散交叉修补"方法，探究预训练基座模型与指令微调模型在早期计算与晚期堆栈的协作机制，发现晚期堆栈对指令微调行为的贡献依赖于其读取自身微调后的上游状态，且最终MLP层的稀疏特征部分中介了这一效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可解释性工作已定位模型内部行为（如拒绝方向、助人/人格轴、稀疏聊天微调特征）通常在中间到晚期层可被读取或控制，但早期计算与晚期堆栈如何协同将差异转化为下一个token的置信度边际尚不清楚。

Method: 提出首次发散交叉修补（first-divergence cross-patching）：在预训练基座（PT）与指令微调（IT）检查点首次预测不一致的token处，交叉替换各模型的早期层状态与晚期堆栈。通过分离不同训练配方（同基座指令微调、OpenMath2数学领域SFT、代码/生物医学CPT）验证方法有效性，并在五个密集模型族（4B-32B）上量化IT晚期堆栈的贡献。

Result: IT晚期堆栈从PT上游添加+0.76 logits，从IT上游添加+2.44 logits，交互项为+1.68（所有模型族均为正）。最终MLP层的稀疏特征部分中介该效应。强制token评分显示局部token选择可改变后续正确答案的成功率。

Conclusion: 晚期堆栈确实存在对PT上游的真实效应，但在IT检查点中更大的效应仅当读取自身微调后的上游状态时出现。操作建议：在成对检查点研究中，若将差异定位到晚期层，应先测试其在另一检查点上游状态下是否仍存在，再认定晚期堆栈是独立的。

Abstract: Recent interpretability work has identified model-internal handles on post-trained behavior, including refusal directions, assistant/persona axes, and sparse chat-tuning features. These results localize where behaviors can be read out or controlled, often in middle-to-late layers. We ask how earlier computation and the late stack cooperate to turn those differences into next-token margins. To test this, we introduce first-divergence cross-patching: at the first token where pretrained base (PT) and instruction-tuned (IT) checkpoints disagree, we cross each model's earlier-layer state with each model's late stack. The diagnostic separates training recipes: same-base instruction-following descendants show late effects that depend on their own earlier-layer state, while OpenMath2 math-domain SFT and controlled code/biomed CPT controls with verified domain learning do not; for OpenMath2, the late effect is already largely portable from base earlier-layer state. Across five dense families (4B-32B), the IT late stack adds +0.76 logits from PT upstream and +2.44 from IT upstream, giving a +1.68 interaction that is positive in every family. Thus the late stack has a real PT-upstream effect, but its larger effect in the IT checkpoint appears only when it reads its own post-trained upstream state. Sparse features in final MLP layers partially mediate the effect and are driven by upstream patches, supporting a handoff from earlier state to final-layer feature activation to IT-token margin. Forced-token scoring shows that the local token choice can change later exact-answer success. Operationally, paired-checkpoint studies that localize a difference to late layers should test whether it survives under the other checkpoint's upstream state before treating the late stack as self-contained.

</details>


### [403] [Pretraining Induces a Reusable Spectral Basis for Downstream Task Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07302)
*Junjie Yu,Yue Wang,Zihan Deng,Yan Zhu,Wenxiao Ma,Quanying Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过谱分析发现，预训练模型微调时，权重矩阵的主奇异向量保持高度稳定且跨任务共享，表明预训练建立了一个可复用的谱坐标系。基于此提出仅优化谱系数的参数高效方法，在GLUE上用0.2%可训练参数达到竞争性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前研究关注了微调发生的低维子空间（优化子空间），但忽略了另一个问题：为什么某些方向在微调中保持不变？这些稳定方向是无关噪声还是已编码了任务相关结构？回答这一问题对理解预训练知识如何迁移至关重要。

Method: 对视觉和语言模型进行系统性的谱分析，研究预训练权重矩阵的奇异向量在微调过程中的稳定性；提出冻结预训练奇异向量、仅优化谱系数的参数高效微调方法。

Result: 预训练权重矩阵的主奇异向量在微调中高度稳定，且在不相干的下游任务间共享；在更大数据集上预训练的模型展现出更高的谱稳定性；所提方法在GLUE上仅用0.2%可训练参数达到竞争性能。

Conclusion: 稳定方向编码的是可迁移的结构性知识而非无关噪声；成功的预训练发现了下游任务继承并运行其中的谱基底。

Abstract: Finetuning pretrained models occurs in a low-dimensional subspace of the full parameter space. Prior work has focused on characterizing this optimization subspace, but largely ignored the complementary question: why do certain directions remain unexplored during finetuning? Are these stable directions irrelevant to downstream tasks, or do they already encode task-relevant structure that requires no further adjustment? Answering this question is central to understanding how pretrained knowledge transfers. Through systematic spectral analysis across vision and language models, we show that the leading singular vectors of pretrained weight matrices remain highly stable under finetuning and are shared across unrelated downstream tasks, revealing that pretraining establishes a reusable spectral coordinate system. Models pretrained on larger datasets exhibit greater spectral stability under distribution shift or task change, directly linking pretraining scale to geometric transferability. Motivated by these findings, we propose a parameter-efficient method that freezes pretrained singular vectors and optimizes only leading spectral coefficients, achieving competitive performance on GLUE with 0.2% trainable parameters. Our results reveal that the stable directions encode transferable structure rather than irrelevant noise: successful pretraining discovers spectral bases that downstream tasks inherit and operate within.

</details>


### [404] [Latent Order Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07304)
*Emil Carlsson,Newton Mwai,Fredrik D. Johansson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出潜在顺序赌博机（LOB），通过仅要求动作偏好的偏序关系作为先验知识，放松了传统潜在赌博机模型对奖励分布的严格假设，在保持跨实例结构利用的同时适应同一状态下奖励尺度的变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统潜在赌博机算法虽能利用离散潜在状态的结构来减少探索次数，但需要精确已知的奖励和潜在状态后验分布，且有限个潜在状态难以刻画所有问题实例中的奖励分布。实际场景中（如流媒体服务），同一用户群体可能对电影类型的偏好顺序一致，但评分尺度却不同，现有方法无法处理这种情况。

Method: 提出潜在顺序赌博机（LOB）框架，仅需每个状态下动作偏好的偏序关系作为先验知识。设计了基于上置信界（UCB）的程序，可适用于完全序和偏序两种场景，并给出了遗憾上界。同时提出后验采样算法以提升实际表现。

Result: 实验表明，当同一状态的实例共享奖励参数时，LOB与全先验潜在赌博机性能相当；当同一状态的实例间奖励尺度不同时，LOB方法优于传统方法。

Conclusion: LOB通过放宽对奖励分布的精确建模要求，用更弱的偏序先验知识实现了对潜在结构的高效利用，在奖励尺度异质的情况下展现了更好的鲁棒性和实用性。

Abstract: Bandit algorithms solve diverse sequential decision-making problems, but are often too sample-inefficient for from-scratch personalization. To substantially reduce exploration times, latent bandit algorithms exploit cross-instance structure implied by discrete latent states, provided that the posterior distribution of rewards and latent states is known and accurate. However, obtaining an accurate model of this structure is difficult, and a small number of latent states may be insufficient to characterize the reward distributions in all problem instances. We propose latent order bandits (LOB), relaxing the assumptions of latent bandits to require only prior knowledge of a partial order of action preferences in each state. This allows instances of the same state to vary in reward distributions, as long as the partial order of actions is shared. For example, groups of users on a streaming service may agree on which movie genres are the best but rate experiences on different scales. We give an upper-confidence bound procedure for the LOB problem, applicable to both total and partial latent orders, and give an upper bound on its regret. To improve empirical performance, we propose a posterior-sampling algorithm and show, in a suite of experiments, that both are competitive with full-prior latent bandits when same-state instances share reward parameters, and preferable to them when reward scales differ between instances with the same latent state.

</details>


### [405] [Generative Modeling with Flux Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07319)
*Peter Pao-Huang,Xiaojie Qiu,Stefano Ermon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Flux Matching，一种新的生成建模范式，将基于分数的模型推广到更广泛的非保守向量场族，通过更弱的条件允许无穷多向量场以数据为平稳分布，从而解锁更快采样、可解释机制模型等应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于分数的生成模型要求模型等于数据得分（即向量场必须是保守的），这限制了模型设计的灵活性。作者希望放松这一条件，允许更广泛的向量场作为生成模型的目标。

Method: 提出Flux Matching目标函数，相较于Score Matching施加了更弱的条件，允许存在无穷多个以数据为平稳分布的向量场。该框架不要求向量场是保守的，从而可以在其中直接施加归纳偏好、结构先验和动力学特性。

Result: 在高维图像数据集上性能强劲；解锁了更快采样、可解释机制模型、以及编码变量间有向依赖关系的动力学等应用。

Conclusion: Flux Matching通过将向量场本身从固定目标变为设计选择，为生成建模开辟了新的维度。

Abstract: We introduce Flux Matching, a new paradigm for generative modeling that generalizes existing score-based models to a broader family of vector fields that need not be conservative. Rather than requiring the model to equal the data score, the Flux Matching objective imposes a weaker condition that admits infinitely many vector fields whose stationary distribution is the data. This flexibility enables a class of generative models that cannot be learned under score matching, in which inductive biases, structural priors, and properties of the dynamics can be directly imposed or optimized. We show that Flux Matching performs strongly on high-dimensional image datasets and, more importantly, that our added freedom unlocks a range of applications including faster sampling, interpretable and mechanistic models, and dynamics that encode directed dependencies between variables. More broadly, Flux Matching opens a new dimension in generative modeling by turning the vector field itself into a design choice rather than a fixed target. Code is available at https://github.com/peterpaohuang/flux_matching.

</details>


### [406] [SparseRL-Sync: Lossless Weight Synchronization with ~100x Less Communication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07330)
*Lucas Hu,Ranchi Zhao,Isaac Zhu,Zach Zhang,Hscos Zhang,Hugh Yin,Jason Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SparseRL-Sync，利用大模型RL训练中参数变化高度稀疏（99%+）的观察，用稀疏更新（索引+值）替代全权重同步，在保真的前提下将通信量降低约100倍，显著缓解带宽受限场景下的同步瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大规模强化学习的Trainer-Rollout解耦架构中，随着模型规模增大，权重同步的通信开销成为主要瓶颈，尤其在带宽受限或网络不稳定的部署环境（如跨数据中心、异构资源池、在线RL）中，严重影响吞吐量和尾延迟。

Method: 观察到大型模型RL训练中参数变化位置具有高度元素级稀疏性（通常99%+），设计SparseRL-Sync，将全权重传输替换为仅传输变化的参数索引及其对应值的稀疏更新负载，再在推理侧无损重构，结合适当的分桶策略降低启动和控制平面开销。

Result: 在简化成本模型下，每轮更新通信量从S降至约S/X，当稀疏度达99%（X≈100）时，传输数据量减少约100倍，显著提升了带宽受限和高度异步RL场景下的可扩展性与端到端效率。

Conclusion: SparseRL-Sync通过利用参数更新的稀疏性，以无损方式大幅降低通信开销，为大规模RL训练中带宽瓶颈问题提供了高效可行的解决方案。

Abstract: In large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) systems with decoupled Trainer-Rollout execution, the Trainer must regularly synchronize policy weights to the Rollout side to limit policy staleness. When inter-node bandwidth is abundant, such synchronization is usually only a small fraction of end-to-end cost. As model size grows, however, the communication demand rises rapidly. In bandwidth-constrained or network-variable deployments -- for example, cross-datacenter or cross-cluster settings, heterogeneous resource pools, and online RL -- weight synchronization can become a dominant bottleneck for throughput and tail latency. We observe that, in mainstream large-model RL training, the locations where parameters actually change are highly sparse at the element level (often 99%+ sparsity). Building on this observation, we propose and implement SparseRL-Sync, which replaces full-weight transfers with a lossless sparse update payload (indices and values) that can be exactly reconstructed on the inference side, thereby preserving 100% fidelity. Under a simplified cost model, sparse synchronization reduces the per-update communication volume from S to approximately S/X; with 99% sparsity (X ~ 100), this yields about a 100x reduction in transmitted data. Combined with appropriate bucketing, SparseRL-Sync also reduces launch and control-plane overhead, significantly improving scalability and end-to-end efficiency in bandwidth-limited and highly asynchronous RL settings.

</details>


### [407] [Rethinking Importance Sampling in LLM Policy Optimization: A Cumulative Token Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07331)
*Yuheng Zhang,Chenlu Ye,Shuowei Jin,Changlong Yu,Wei Xiong,Saurabh Sahu,Nan Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CTPO方法，通过累积token重要性采样比率（Cumulative Token IS Ratio）结合位置自适应裁剪，解决了强化学习策略梯度估计中偏差-方差困境，在数学推理任务上优于GRPO和GSPO。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法（如PPO、GRPO、GSPO）在策略梯度估计中存在偏差-方差困境：token级IS比率引入偏差，全序列比率方差高，GSPO虽稳定但偏离了精确校正。作者旨在寻找一个既无偏又低方差的理论化解决方案。

Method: 提出累积token IS比率（per-token比率的逐位置累积乘积），证明其在token级策略梯度下提供无偏的前缀校正且方差低于全序列比率。在此基础上设计CTPO，结合位置自适应裁剪（log-space clip边界随√t增长），实现跨位置的稳定正则化。

Result: 在工具集成推理设置下的多个数学推理基准上，CTPO在两个模型规模下均取得最佳平均性能，优于GRPO和GSPO基线。

Conclusion: 累积token IS比率是理论上更优的解决方案，CTPO有效平衡了偏差与方差，为LLM后训练中的RL提供了新范式。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning, including reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), has emerged as a powerful approach for LLM post-training. Central to these approaches is the design of the importance sampling (IS) ratio used in off-policy policy-gradient estimation. Existing methods face a fundamental bias-variance dilemma: token-level IS ratios, as adopted by PPO (Schulman et al., 2017) and GRPO (Shao et al., 2024), introduce bias by ignoring prefix state distribution mismatch; full sequence ratios provide exact trajectory-level correction but suffer from high variance due to the multiplicative accumulation of per-token ratios, while GSPO (Zheng et al., 2025) improves numerical stability via length normalization at the cost of deviating from the exact full-sequence IS correction. In this work, we identify the cumulative token IS ratio, the product of per-token ratios up to position $t$, as a theoretically principled solution to this dilemma. We prove that, under the token-level policy-gradient formulation, this ratio provides an unbiased prefix correction for each token-level gradient term and has strictly lower variance than the full sequence ratio. Building on this insight, we propose CTPO (Cumulative Token Policy Optimization), which combines the cumulative token IS ratio with position-adaptive clipping that scales log-space clip bounds according to the natural $\sqrt{t}$ growth of the cumulative log-ratio. This yields more consistent regularization across token positions. We implement and evaluate CTPO in the tool-integrated reasoning setting on several challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks, achieving the best average performance across both model scales compared with strong GRPO and GSPO baselines. Code will be available at https://github.com/horizon-llm/CTPO.

</details>


### [408] [Beyond Linear Attention: Softmax Transformers Implement In-Context Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07333)
*Zixuan Xie,Xinyu Liu,Claire Chen,Shuze Daniel Liu,Rohan Chandra,Shangtong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次从理论上分析了使用标准softmax注意力的Transformer在上下文强化学习（ICRL）中的工作机制，证明其前向传播等价于加权softmax时序差分学习算法，并在特定参数下具有收敛性保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ICRL的理论分析大多依赖不现实的线性注意力简化（用恒等映射替代softmax），缺乏对实践中广泛使用的softmax注意力的理论理解。

Method: 1) 证明具有特定参数的softmax注意力Transformer的前向传播等价于加权softmax TD学习算法的迭代更新；2) 证明在收缩条件下，随着层数增加，策略评估误差衰减；3) 证明这些参数是预训练损失的全局最小值。

Result: 1) 建立了softmax注意力与加权softmax TD算法之间的等价关系；2) 给出了策略评估误差随层数衰减的收敛性条件；3) 证明了所识别的参数是预训练损失的全局最小解。

Conclusion: 该工作填补了ICRL在真实注意力机制下理论分析的空白，将线性TD和表格TD统一在加权softmax TD框架中，为理解Transformer在RL中的成功提供了理论基础。

Abstract: In-context reinforcement learning (ICRL) studies agents that, after pretraining, adapt to new tasks by conditioning on additional context without parameter updates. Existing theoretical analyses of ICRL largely rely on linear attention, which replaces the softmax function in the standard attention with an identity mapping. This paper provides the first theoretical understanding of ICRL without making the unrealistic linear attention simplification. In particular, we consider the standard softmax attention used in practice. We show that, with certain parameters, the layerwise forward pass of a Transformer with such softmax attention is equivalent to iterative updates of a weighted softmax temporal difference (TD) learning algorithm. Here, weighted softmax TD is a new RL algorithm that performs policy evaluation in kernel space and adopts both linear TD and tabular TD as special cases. We also prove that under a certain contraction condition, the policy evaluation error decays as the number of layers grows, with the identified parameters above. Finally, we prove that those parameters are a global minimizer of a pretraining loss, explaining their emergence in our numerical experiments.

</details>


### [409] [CellScientist: Dual-Space Hierarchical Orchestration for Closed-Loop Refinement of Virtual Cell Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07335)
*Mengran Li,Bo Li,Jiaying Wang,Wenbin Xing,Yixuan Dong,Chengyang Zhang,Hongliang Zhang,Yuzhong Peng,Jinlin Wu,Bob Zhang,Bingo Wing-Kuen Ling,Fuji Yang,Zhen Lei,Jiebo Luo,Zelin Zang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CellScientist提出了一种双空间层次框架（假设空间+执行空间），将建模决策作为结构化状态表示，实现从执行失败到假设/实现的定向反馈路由，从而形成闭环的模型精炼流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM辅助建模工作流存在"精炼-路由"问题：预测偏差通过可执行代码被观察到，但相关修订可能涉及建模假设、表示设计、代码实现或任务约束等多个层面，缺乏跨层次的结构化反馈传播，导致迭代精炼可能只修复代码而忽略了根本的假设错误。

Method: 提出双空间层次框架：1）高层假设空间（Hypothesis Space）结构化表示建模决策；2）低层可执行实现空间（Executable Implementation Space）在任务和接口约束下生成可执行程序。当执行出现偏差时，将偏差路由回对应的假设或实现层进行定向更新，形成 Hypothesis -> Implementation -> Hypothesis 闭环。

Result: 在形态学和转录组学基准测试以及单细胞扰动评估中，CellScientist选择的最终可执行模型在固定拆分和评估协议下优于参考基线，并且工作流产生了可审计的精炼轨迹。

Conclusion: 该框架将执行失败从调试事件转化为模型精炼的结构化信号，实现了更系统、可追溯的虚拟细胞模型迭代优化。

Abstract: Virtual Cell Modeling (VCM) requires models that not only predict perturbation responses, but also support targeted revision when predictions fail. Current LLM-assisted modeling workflows face a refinement-routing problem: prediction discrepancies are observed through executable implementations, but the relevant revision may involve the modeling assumption, representation design, implementation, or task constraint. Without structured feedback propagation across these levels, iterative refinement may repair code while failing to revise the assumption responsible for the discrepancy. We propose CellScientist, a dual-space hierarchical framework that couples a high-level hypothesis space with a low-level executable implementation space. CellScientist represents modeling decisions as structured states, realizes them as admissible programs under task and interface constraints, and routes execution discrepancies back to targeted hypothesis or implementation updates. This enables a closed Hypothesis -> Implementation -> Hypothesis loop where failures become structured signals for model refinement rather than debugging events. Across morphology and transcriptomic benchmarks, with additional single-cell perturbation evaluations, the final executable models selected by CellScientist improve over reference baselines under fixed split and evaluation protocols, while the workflow produces auditable refinement traces.

</details>


### [410] [Mage: Multi-Axis Evaluation of LLM-Generated Executable Game Scenes Beyond Compile-Pass Rate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07342)
*Hugh Xuechen Liu,Kıvanç Tatar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明在LLM代码生成中，编译通过率与功能正确性呈负相关，并提出四轴评估协议Mage（编译成功、运行时成功、结构保真度、机制遵循度）来检测这种偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 编译通过率是LLM代码生成的主流评估指标，但在多组件领域特定工件（如可执行游戏场景）中可能产生误导，需要更全面的评估方法。

Method: 设计了四轴评估协议Mage，在858次生成试验中，使用4个开源LLM（7B-30B）、26个Unity目标模式概念和两种IR粒度级别，对比NL-to-C#直接生成与结构IR条件化生成的效果。

Result: NL-to-C#直接生成运行时通过率最高（均值43%），但结构空洞（机制F1≈0.12）；结构IR条件化将运行时率减半，但恢复领域保真结构（F1高达1.00）；行为-only与全场景粒度在统计上无显著差异。

Conclusion: 编译率在该领域与功能正确性呈反相关，多轴评估对检测此类偏差不可或缺。

Abstract: Compile-pass rate is the dominant evaluation signal for LLM code generation, yet for multi-component domain-specific artifacts it can be actively misleading. We demonstrate this on executable game scene synthesis with a four-axis evaluation protocol (named `Mage') -- compile success, runtime success, structural fidelity, and mechanism adherence -- applied to 858 generation attempts across four open-weight LLMs (7B--30B), 26~hand-crafted Unity goal pattern playable concepts, and two automatically extracted IR granularity levels. Direct NL-to-C\# generation achieves the highest runtime-pass rate (43\% mean) yet produces structurally vacuous scenes (mechanism $F_1 \approx 0.12$). Structural IR conditioning halves the runtime rate but recovers domain-faithful structure ($F_1$ up to 1.00). Within IR conditioning, behavior-only and full-scene granularity are statistically indistinguishable (McNemar $p = 1.0$), indicating input-level granularity saturation. These results show that compile rate is anti-correlated with functional correctness in this domain and that multi-axis evaluation is necessary to detect the divergence. We release the benchmark, replay logs, and per-record metrics for independent verification.

</details>


### [411] [MISA: Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention for Long-Context LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07363)
*Ruijie Zhou,Fanxu Meng,Yufei Xu,Tongxuan Liu,Guangming Lu,Muhan Zhang,Wenjie Pei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MISA 提出了一种基于混合专家（MoE）的轻量级索引器，替代 DSA 中昂贵的多头索引器，仅用少量活跃头即可匹配甚至超越原版性能，并实现约 3.82 倍的推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DSA 虽然实现了细粒度推理时稀疏注意力，但其索引器使用大量查询头（如 DeepSeek-V3.2 的 64 头），在长上下文场景下成为计算瓶颈。作者希望降低索引器的计算开销，同时保持其表达能力和多样性。

Method: 将 DSA 的索引器多头视为专家池，引入轻量路由器，利用块级统计信息（廉价）为每个查询选择仅少量活跃头。只有这些被选中的头执行昂贵的 token 级评分。此外提出分层变体：先用路由头扩大候选集，再用原始 DSA 索引器重排，几乎精确恢复最终选中的 token。

Result: 仅用 8 个活跃头，无需额外训练，在 LongBench 上匹配 DSA 密集索引器（DeepSeek-V3.2 和 GLM-5），索引器头数分别减少 8 倍和 4 倍，平均优于 HISA。在 128K 上下文下保持完全的绿色 Needle-in-a-Haystack 热力图，每层恢复超过 92% 的 DSA 选中 token。TileLang 内核在单张 H200 GPU 上相比 DSA 原始内核获得约 3.82 倍加速。

Conclusion: MISA 是一种即插即用的 DSA 索引器替代方案，通过 MoE 路由大幅降低计算成本，同时保持甚至提升稀疏注意力的质量，在长上下文推理中具有显著的实用价值。

Abstract: DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) sets the state of the art for fine-grained inference-time sparse attention by introducing a learned token-wise indexer that scores every prefix token and selects the most relevant ones for the main attention. To remain expressive, the indexer uses many query heads (for example, 64 on DeepSeek-V3.2) that share the same selected token set; this multi-head design is precisely what makes the indexer the dominant cost on long contexts. We propose MISA (Mixture of Indexer Sparse Attention), a drop-in replacement for the DSA indexer that treats its indexer heads as a pool of mixture-of-experts. A lightweight router uses cheap block-level statistics to pick a query-dependent subset of only a few active heads, and only those heads run the heavy token-level scoring. This preserves the diversity of the original indexer pool while reducing the per-query cost from scoring every prefix token with every head to scoring it with only a handful of routed heads, plus a negligible router term computed on a small set of pooled keys. We further introduce a hierarchical variant of MISA that uses the routed pass to keep an enlarged candidate set and then re-ranks it with the original DSA indexer to recover the final selected tokens almost exactly. With only eight active heads and no additional training, MISA matches the dense DSA indexer on LongBench across DeepSeek-V3.2 and GLM-5 while running with eight and four times fewer indexer heads respectively, and outperforms HISA on average. It also preserves fully green Needle-in-a-Haystack heatmaps up to a 128K-token context and recovers more than 92% of the tokens selected by the DSA indexer per layer. Our TileLang kernel delivers roughly a 3.82 times speedup over DSA's original indexer kernel on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU.

</details>


### [412] [FlightSense: An End-to-End MLOps Platform for Real-Time Flight Delay Prediction via Rotation-Chain Propagation Features and Agentic Conversational AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07364)
*Aditi J. Shelke,Renuka J. Shelke,Yash M. Kamerkar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FlightSense，一个端到端MLOps平台，通过渐进式三版本特征工程框架（基础特征→延误传播特征→气象特征）实现航班延误预测，最终AUC达0.879，并部署了包含实时推理、交互式仪表盘和基于Amazon Bedrock的对话助手的生产级系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 航班延误给航空网络带来连锁性运营和财务负担，年损失数十亿美元。现有ML方法大多将上游延误视为静态输入，未显式建模延误通过飞机轮转链的动态传播，也缺乏部署实时、带天气感知的对话式AI接口。

Method: 渐进式三版本特征工程框架：V1用11个计划特征训练XGBoost（基线AUC 0.732）；V2引入11个基于尾号追踪的飞机轮转链延误传播特征（AUC跃升至0.875）；V3集成5个NOAA气象特征（AUC 0.879）。系统部署为AWS MLOps流水线，含Lambda实时天气摄入、SageMaker推理、Streamlit仪表盘和Amazon Bedrock Nova Micro对话助手。

Result: 在707万条BTS 2018数据上，V1基线AUC 0.732，V2引入延误传播特征后大幅提升至0.875（关键增益），V3加入气象特征后最终AUC达到0.879。

Conclusion: FlightSense证明了显式建模飞机轮转链延误传播对预测性能的主导性提升作用，并成功将模型部署为包含实时天气感知和自然语言交互的生产级MLOps系统。

Abstract: Flight delays impose cascading operational and financial burdens across the aviation network, costing the U.S. economy billions of dollars annually by disrupting interconnected aircraft rotation systems. While prior machine learning approaches have demonstrated strong predictive performance, most treat upstream delays as static input variables rather than explicitly modeling how delays propagate dynamically through aircraft rotation chains, and none have deployed such systems alongside a live weather-aware conversational AI interface for end-user interaction. This paper presents FlightSense, an end-to-end MLOps platform for real-time flight delay prediction built through a progressive three-version feature engineering framework. Version 1 trains an XGBoost classifier on 11 schedule-based features establishing a baseline ROC AUC of 0.732 on 7.07 million BTS 2018 On-Time Performance records. Version 2 introduces 11 delay propagation features derived from aircraft rotation chains via tail-number tracking, yielding the dominant performance gain (AUC 0.732 to 0.875) and surpassing the single-stage XGBoost baseline reported by Zhou (2025). Version 3 integrates five NOAA meteorological features across 10 major U.S. airports, achieving a final test set AUC of 0.879. FlightSense is deployed as a production AWS MLOps pipeline incorporating live weather ingestion via Lambda, real-time SageMaker inference, an interactive Streamlit dashboard, and an Amazon Bedrock Nova Micro conversational assistant answering natural-language delay queries via a tool-use architecture.

</details>


### [413] [QuadNorm: Resolution-Robust Normalization for Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07375)
*Bum Jun Kim,Makoto Kawano,Yusuke Iwasawa,Yutaka Matsuo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出QuadNorm系列归一化方法，用数值积分替代均匀平均，使神经算子归一化层具备离散化稳健性，实验证明能有效降低跨分辨率传输误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经算子中的归一化层通常均匀平均离散网格值，导致归一化本身依赖离散化方式，成为跨分辨率/网格传输误差的来源。

Method: 提出QuadNorm和BlendQuadNorm，用数值积分（quadrature）替代均匀平均；并推导了传输误差界，预测误差随分辨率差距和网络深度的缩放规律。

Result: 在Darcy问题上，QuadNorm在所有目标分辨率（64²至256²）上取得最佳跨分辨率性能；在真实数据基准上，Transolver+QuadNorm实现近乎分辨率不变的迁移；最大改进出现在非周期PDE和非谱架构上。

Conclusion: 归一化是神经算子中此前被忽视的分辨率依赖来源，QuadNorm系列方法有效缓解了这一问题。

Abstract: Normalization layers in neural operators usually compute statistics by uniformly averaging discrete grid values, making the normalization itself discretization-dependent and thereby a source of transfer error across different resolutions or meshes. To enable discretization robustness, we introduce a quadrature normalization family that replaces existing uniform averaging in normalization layers with numerical quadrature: QuadNorm and BlendQuadNorm. On endpoint-inclusive uniform grids, the proposed quadrature moments are $O(h^2)$-consistent across discretizations, meaning that their cross-resolution mismatch decays quadratically with grid spacing. A transfer-error bound then predicts how normalization-induced mismatch scales with both the resolution gap and network depth. The experiments show the same gap- and depth-scaling trends predicted by the transfer-error bound. On Darcy, QuadNorm delivers the best cross-resolution performance at every tested target resolution from $64^2$ to $256^2$; on real-data benchmarks, Transolver with QuadNorm achieves nearly resolution-invariant transfer. The largest gains appear on nonperiodic PDEs and nonspectral architectures, where native-resolution improvements also emerge. We also validate BlendQuadNorm, which stays close to LayerNorm behavior and serves as a conservative default for periodic FNO settings. These results identify normalization as a previously overlooked source of resolution dependence in neural operators.

</details>


### [414] [Zero-Shot Neural Network Evaluation with Sample-Wise Activation Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07378)
*Yameng Peng,Andy Song,HaythamM. Fayek,Vic Ciesielski,Xiaojun Chang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SWAP-Score，一种通用的无需训练的零样本代理指标，通过测量神经网络在样本批次上的表达能力来评估网络性能，在CNN和Transformer架构以及CV和NLP任务上均优于现有指标，并可用于NAS加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本代理指标（训练无关指标）存在两大局限：一是与真实性能的相关性弱，二是在不同网络架构（如CNN和Transformer）或下游任务间泛化能力差。大多数指标要么只适用于CNN，要么只适用于Transformer，无法通用。

Method: 提出SWAP（Sample-Wise Activation Patterns），通过测量神经网络在一小批样本上的激活模式来表达网络的表达能力，进而导出SWAP-Score指标。该指标无需标签，可在预训练阶段直接应用。

Result: 在CIFAR-10上对DARTS CNN的Spearman相关系数达0.93，在GLUE任务上对FlexiBERT Transformer达0.71；SWAP-NAS在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上仅分别使用约6分钟和9分钟GPU时间即达到竞争性能。

Conclusion: SWAP-Score是一种跨架构（CNN和Transformer）、跨任务（CV和NLP）通用的高效零样本代理指标，为NAS和语言模型预训练评估提供了新的有效工具。

Abstract: Zero-shot proxies, also known as training-free metrics, are widely adopted to reduce the computational overhead in neural network evaluation for scenarios such as Neural Architecture Search (NAS), as they do not require any training. Existing zero-shot metrics have several limitations, including weak correlation with the true performance and poor generalisation across different networks or downstream tasks. For example, most of these metrics apply only to either convolutional neural networks (CNNs) or Transformers, but not both. To address these limitations, we propose Sample-Wise Activation Patterns (SWAP), and its derivative, SWAP-Score, a novel and highly effective zero-shot metric. SWAP-Score is broadly applicable across both architecture families and task domains, demonstrating strong predictive performance in the majority of tasks. This metric measures the expressivity of neural networks over a mini-batch of samples, showing a high correlation with the neural networks' ground-truth performance. For both CNNs and Transformers, the SWAP-Score outperforms existing zero-shot metrics across computer vision and natural language processing tasks. For instance, Spearman's correlation coefficient between the SWAP-Score and CIFAR-10 validation accuracy for DARTS CNNs is 0.93, and 0.71 for FlexiBERT Transformers on GLUE tasks. Moreover, SWAP-Score is label-independent, hence can be applied at the pre-training stage of language models to estimate their performance for downstream tasks. When applied to NAS, SWAP-empowered NAS, SWAP-NAS can achieve competitive performance using only approximately 6 and 9 minutes of GPU time, on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet respectively. Our code is available at: https://github.com/pym1024/SWAP_Universal

</details>


### [415] [StreamPhy: Streaming Inference of High-Dimensional Physical Dynamics via State Space Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07384)
*Panqi Chen,Yifan Sun,Shikai Fang,Xiao Fu,Lei Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: StreamPhy是一个端到端框架，能从流式稀疏测量中高效、准确地推断高维多模态物理场，比现有方法快20-100倍且精度提升至少48%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如扩散模型、张量方法）通常只能在离线场景下工作，依赖完整时间观测或推理成本高昂，无法实时从不规则稀疏测量中推断物理场演化。

Method: 提出StreamPhy框架，包含三个核心组件：(1) 数据自适应观测编码器，对任意观测模式鲁棒；(2) 结构化状态空间模型，在不规则时间间隔上支持内存高效的在线更新；(3) 功能张量特征线性调制（FT-FiLM）解码器，用于连续场生成。FT-FiLM被证明比功能Tucker模型更具表达能力。

Result: 在三种代表性物理系统上的实验表明，StreamPhy在精度上比基线方法提升至少48%，推理速度比扩散方法快20-100倍。

Conclusion: StreamPhy为实时流式物理场推理提供了高效且准确的解决方案，其FT-FiLM模块的理论优越性也得到了证明。

Abstract: Inferring the evolution of high-dimensional and multi-modal (e.g., spatio-temporal) physical fields from irregular sparse measurements in real time is a fundamental challenge in science and engineering. Existing approaches, including diffusion-based generative models and functional tensor methods, typically operate in offline settings, depend on full temporal observations, or incur substantial inference cost. We propose StreamPhy, an end-to-end framework that enables efficient and accurate streaming inference of full-field physical dynamics from incoming irregular sparse measurements. The framework integrates a data-adaptive observation encoder that is robust to arbitrary observation patterns, a structured state-space model that supports memory-efficient online updates across irregular time intervals, and an expressive Functional Tensor Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FT-FiLM) decoder for continuous-field generation. We prove that FT-FiLM is more expressive than the functional Tucker model, admitting a richer function class for handling complex dynamics. Experiments on three representative physical systems under challenging sampling patterns show that StreamPhy consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, with at least 48\% improvement in accuracy and up to 20--100X faster inference than diffusion-based methods.

</details>


### [416] [Convex Optimization with Nested Evolving Feasible Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07386)
*Karthick Krishna M.,Haricharan Balasundaram,Rahul Vaze*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了嵌套演化可行集的凸优化问题（CONES），提出懒惰算法和Frugal算法，分别实现了凸损失函数下的O(T^{1-β})后悔与O(T^β)移动代价的权衡，以及强凸/α-sharp损失下的零后悔与O(log T)移动代价，并证明后者在移动代价上的最优性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将嵌套凸体追逐问题推广到优化视角，研究在线算法如何在目标函数固定的情况下，随着可行集不断缩小（嵌套序列），同时最小化后悔、移动代价并保证每步可行性。

Method: 针对凸损失函数提出懒惰算法（lazy-algorithm），通过参数β实现后悔与移动代价的灵活权衡；针对强凸或α-sharp损失函数提出Frugal算法，利用问题结构达到零后悔与对数级移动代价。

Result: 懒惰算法在凸损失下达到O(T^{1-β})后悔和O(T^β)移动代价（∀β∈(0,1]）；Frugal在强凸/α-sharp损失下同时实现零后悔和O(log T)移动代价。

Conclusion: 证明了在强凸/α-sharp损失下任何具有o(T)后悔的在线算法的移动代价下界为Ω(log T)，从而证明Frugal在移动代价上是最优的。

Abstract: Convex Optimization with Nested Evolving Feasible Sets (CONES)} is considered where the objective function $f$ remains fixed but the feasible region evolves over time as a nested sequence $S_1 \supseteq S_2 \supseteq \cdots \supseteq S_T$. The goal of an online algorithm is to simultaneously minimize the regret with respect to hindsight static optimal benchmark and the total movement cost while ensuring feasibility at all times. CONES is an optimization-oriented generalization of the well-known nested convex body chasing problem. When the loss function is convex, we propose a lazy-algorithm and show that it achieves $O(T^{1-β}), O(T^β)$ simultaneous regret and movement cost for any $β\in (0,1]$, over a time horizon of $T$. When the loss function is strongly convex or $α$-sharp, we propose an algorithm Frugal that simultaneously achieves zero regret and a movement cost of $O(\log T)$. To complement this, we show that any online algorithm with $o(T)$ regret has a movement cost of $Ω(\log{T})$ for both cases, proving optimality of Frugal.

</details>


### [417] [Rubric-based On-policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07396)
*Junfeng Fang,Zhepei Hong,Mao Zheng,Mingyang Song,Gengsheng Li,Houcheng Jiang,Dan Zhang,Haiyun Guo,Xiang Wang,Tat-Seng Chua*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ROPD框架，用结构化语义评分代替教师logits进行学生模型的对策蒸馏（OPD），仅需教师生成文本即可实现黑盒场景下的高效对齐，在多数场景超越传统logit-based方法，采样效率提升最高达10倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统OPD依赖教师logits（白盒信息），限制了其在黑盒场景中的应用。作者认为结构化语义评分可作为教师logits的可扩展替代方案，仅需教师生成的回答即可实现OPD。

Method: 提出ROPD框架：1）通过教师-学生对比生成提示特定的评分标准（rubrics）；2）利用这些评分标准对学生采样结果进行评分，实现在线策略优化。

Result: 在多数场景下超越先进的logit-based OPD方法，采样效率最高提升10倍。

Conclusion: 基于评分标准的OPD可作为灵活、兼容黑盒的替代方案，为可扩展蒸馏提供简单而强大的基线，适用于闭源和开源LLM。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is a powerful paradigm for model alignment, yet its reliance on teacher logits restricts its application to white-box scenarios. We contend that structured semantic rubrics can serve as a scalable alternative to teacher logits, enabling OPD using only teacher-generated responses. To prove it, we introduce ROPD, a simple yet foundational framework for rubric-based OPD. Specifically, ROPD induces prompt-specific rubrics from teacher-student contrasts, and then utilizes these rubrics to score the student rollouts for on-policy optimization. Empirically, ROPD outperforms the advanced logit-based OPD methods across most scenarios, and achieving up to a 10x gain in sample efficiency. These results position rubric-based OPD as a flexible, black-box-compatible alternative to the prevailing logit-based OPD, offering a simple yet strong baseline for scalable distillation across proprietary and open-source LLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/Peregrine123/ROPD_official.

</details>


### [418] [Have Graph -- Will Lift? The Case for Higher-Order Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07397)
*Bastian Rieck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文是一篇观点论文，指出几何与拓扑在机器学习领域已站稳脚跟，但模型多样性远超可用基准数据集，呼吁社区在利用现有图数据集提升高阶信息的同时，积极寻找新的数据集来夯实研究基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前拓扑深度学习模型种类繁多，但缺乏足够的基准数据集，研究者常被迫对现有图数据集进行"提升"以融入高阶信息，这限制了领域的发展。

Method: 以观点论文形式，梳理了几何与拓扑在机器学习中的发展现状（消息传递、层、拓扑深度学习等），并指出数据集稀缺这一核心问题，最后呼吁社区寻找新的数据集。

Result: 指出了几何/拓扑深度学习领域模型多样性与基准数据集稀缺性之间的严重不匹配。

Conclusion: 作者鼓励社区在提升现有数据集的同时，更应主动挖掘和引入全新的数据集，以巩固该研究领域的基础。

Abstract: After a somewhat rocky start, geometry and topology have established a foothold in machine learning. Message passing, either on graphs or higher-order complexes, is one of the main drivers of geometric deep learning, and paradigms that were once considered to be firmly in the realm of the abstract-like sheaves-have been "tamed" to serve as novel inductive biases for model architectures in topological deep learning. The veritable diversity of models, however, is in stark contrast to the scarcity of suitable benchmark datasets. As a result, researchers often resort to lifting existing graph datasets to include higher-order information. In this opinion paper, I want to encourage the community to also source new datasets, which may be used to prop up the foundations of our research field.

</details>


### [419] [Emergent Symbolic Structure in Health Foundation Models: Extraction, Alignment, and Cross-Modal Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07407)
*Gajendra Katuwal,Advait Koparkar,Salar Abbaspourazad,Anshuman Mishra,Sarvesh Kirthivasan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种后训练框架，将冻结的健康基础模型嵌入分解为可解释的符号，并利用这些符号实现跨模态对齐，无需重新训练。在PPG和加速度计数据上验证，发现符号与健康状况选择性关联，跨模态迁移保留>95%性能，表明存在共享的低维生理信息子空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 健康基础模型从可穿戴传感器学习有用表示，但难以解释嵌入的编码内容，且训练后难以跨模态迁移知识。

Method: 提出后训练框架，将冻结的嵌入分解为可解释的符号方向，并用这些符号对齐不同模态的嵌入空间，无需重新训练。

Result: 符号与健康状况和生理属性选择性关联；跨模态迁移保留>95%域内性能，方向间近似对称，有限配对数据下即饱和。

Conclusion: 健康基础模型嵌入存在可解释的符号化组织结构，不同模态间共享该结构，支持无需联合训练的跨域迁移。

Abstract: Health foundation models (FMs) learn useful representations from wearable sensors, but interpreting what they encode and transferring that knowledge across modalities after training remains difficult. We present a post-training framework that decomposes frozen embeddings into interpretable directions, referred to as symbols, and use these symbols to align the embedding spaces without retraining. We evaluate the framework on three FMs for photoplethysmography (PPG) and accelerometer data, independently pretrained on ~20M minutes of unlabeled data from ~172K participants, and analyzed on a held-out cohort of 30K subjects. We find that extracted symbols associate selectively with health conditions and physiological attributes, and these associations are partially shared across modalities and architectures. Cross-modal transfer via symbols retains more than 95% of in-domain performance, is nearly symmetric across domain directions, and saturates with limited paired data, together indicating that alignment recovers a shared low-dimensional subspace rich in physiological information. Overall, these results suggest that health FM embeddings contain an interpretable symbolic organization that is shared across modalities and supports cross-domain transfer without joint training.

</details>


### [420] [Tracking Large-scale Shared Bikes with Inertial Motion Learning in GNSS Blocked Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07412)
*Feng Liu,Kejia Li,Zhiwei Yang,Chunwei Yang,Qun Li,Guobin Wu,Qiang Ni,Ruipeng Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种融合自行车机械约束与混合专家模型的惯性追踪框架，通过多专家模块和门控机制提升多任务学习性能，并利用脚踏-后轮传动关系将骑行者的周期性踩踏行为转化为车轮速度进行动态校准。在滴滴共享单车真实数据上，系统比基线方法准确率提升至少12%，车轮速度误差在95分位下低于0.5 m/s。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自行车追踪在无GPS环境（如城市峡谷）下仅靠低成本惯性传感器存在累积漂移和鲁棒性差的问题，而视觉/LiDAR等方案不适合大规模部署，亟需一种低成本、高鲁棒性的惯性追踪方案。

Method: 提出惯性追踪框架：1) 混合专家模型——多个专家模块捕获共享表示，门控机制加权融合，提升多任务学习与不确定性感知轨迹估计；2) 利用自行车脚踏与后轮机械传动关系，将骑行者周期性踩踏行为映射为车轮速度，实现动态校准。

Result: 在滴滴共享单车真实骑行数据上，系统比基线方法准确率提升至少12%，车轮速度误差在95分位下低于0.5 m/s。

Conclusion: 融合自行车物理约束与混合专家模型能有效提升低成本惯性追踪的精度和鲁棒性，为大规模自行车追踪部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Although Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) provide a general solution for bike tracking outdoors, there still exist complex riding environments where only inertial navigation systems work, such as urban canyons. Despite decades of research, localization using only low-cost inertial sensors still faces challenges such as cumulative drifts and poor robustness caused by filtering methods. Furthermore, sensors such as visual and LiDAR could provide reliable measurements, but they are not suitable for large-scale deployment. In this paper, we propose an inertial tracking framework that integrates bicycle mechanical constraints with a mixture-of-experts model. Specifically, we leverage multiple expert modules to capture shared representations and weight them through the gating mechanism, thus improving multi-task learning performance and enabling uncertainty-aware trajectory estimation. Furthermore, based on the mechanical transmission between the pedal and the rear wheel of a bike, we explore the intrinsic relationship between the rider's periodic pedalling behaviors and acceleration variations, and convert such patterns into bike's wheel speed for dynamic calibration. Experiments with real-world riding data from shared bikes of the DiDi ride-hailing platform demonstrate that our system improves the accuracy of baselines by at least 12%, with wheel speed errors below 0.5 m/s at 95-percentile.

</details>


### [421] [Risk-Consistent Multiclass Learning from Random Label-Subset Membership Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07413)
*Jiaxu Su,Junpeng Li,Changchun Hua,Yana Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于随机标签子集查询的弱监督学习框架，通过直接利用查询-响应观测（询问真实标签是否属于某子集）来学习多分类模型，而非依赖预先构建的弱标签。文章推导了目标风险的无偏估计器，引入非负和绝对值修正来处理负经验风险与过拟合问题，并从理论和实验上证明了该方法的可行性与有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际场景中获取精确类别标签昂贵、不可靠或受隐私限制，而询问标签是否属于某个子集更容易。现有弱监督学习多从已有的弱标签对象出发，缺乏对直接由查询-响应观测生成的弱监督学习的系统性刻画。

Method: 1. 建模查询-响应观测的数据生成分布；2. 在经验风险最小化（ERM）框架下推导目标风险的无偏估计器；3. 引入非负修正与绝对值修正的风险估计器以解决负经验风险及过拟合问题；4. 提供无偏估计器的条件泛化与超额风险界，以及修正估计器的偏差与一致性理论分析。

Result: 在匹配随机查询机制下的实验表明，直接使用查询-响应进行学习是可行的，且风险修正具有稳定效果。

Conclusion: 提出的基于随机标签子集查询的多分类学习框架能够有效利用查询-响应形式的弱监督信息，理论分析和实验验证了该方法的可行性与风险修正的稳定性。

Abstract: Obtaining accurate class labels is often costly or unreliable, and may also be limited by privacy or other practical conditions. Compared with asking an annotator to provide the exact class, it is often easier to ask whether the true label belongs to a certain label subset. This query-response form defines a distinct weak-supervision mechanism: weak supervision information is generated through feedback on a label subset. Although weakly supervised learning has studied many learning frameworks, most existing work starts from established weak label objects. A systematic characterization is still lacking for weakly supervised learning generated directly by such query response observations. This paper proposes a multiclass learn ing framework under random label-subset queries. We model the data-generating distribution of query-response observations and derive an unbiased estimator of the target risk under the empirical risk minimization (ERM) framework. To address negative empirical risk and the associated overfitting problem, we introduce corrected risk estimators based on non-negative and absolute-value corrections. Theoretical analysis establishes a conditional generalization and excess-risk bound for the unbiased estimator, and a bias-and-consistency result for the corrected risk estimator. Experiments under the matched random-query mechanism demonstrate the feasibility of direct query-response learning and the stabilization effect of risk correction.

</details>


### [422] [SR$^2$-LoRA: Self-Rectifying Inter-layer Relations in Low-Rank Adaptation for Class-Incremental Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07420)
*Fengqiang Wan,Yipeng Lin,Kan Lv,Yang Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SR$^2$-LoRA方法，通过约束层间关系漂移（inter-layer relation drift）来缓解参数高效微调（PEFT）在类增量学习（CIL）中的灾难性遗忘问题。该方法通过对齐新旧模型在当前任务样本上的关系矩阵的奇异值，有效保持了分类边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PEFT模型在CIL中仍存在灾难性遗忘。作者从层间关系漂移的新视角分析，发现学习新任务时层间表征关系逐渐被破坏，导致旧任务分类边界缩小、性能下降。

Method: SR$^2$-LoRA：首先计算新旧模型在当前任务样本上的关系矩阵（inter-layer relation matrices），然后对齐这些矩阵的奇异值（而非直接逐元素对齐），理论上证明此法对估计扰动更鲁棒。

Result: 在标准CIL基准上，SR$^2$-LoRA有效缓解了灾难性遗忘，且任务数越多优势越明显。

Conclusion: 层间关系漂移是导致灾难性遗忘的重要原因，通过约束该漂移（特别是奇异值对齐）能有效提升CIL性能。

Abstract: Pre-trained models with parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) have demonstrated promising potential for class-incremental learning (CIL), yet catastrophic forgetting still persists when adapting models to new tasks. In this paper, we present a novel perspective on catastrophic forgetting through the analysis of inter-layer relation drift, i.e., the progressive disruption of relationships among layer-wise representations during the learning of new tasks. We theoretically show that the increase of such drift reduces the classification margins of previously learned tasks, thereby degrading overall model performance. To address this issue, we propose \underline{S}elf-\underline{R}ectifying inter-layer \underline{R}elation Low-Rank Adaptation~(SR$^2$-LoRA), a simple yet effective method that mitigates catastrophic forgetting by constraining inter-layer relation drift. Specifically, SR$^2$-LoRA constructs the relation matrices induced by the previous and current models on current-task samples, and aligns the corresponding singular values. We further theoretically show that this alignment exhibits greater robustness to estimation perturbations than direct entry-wise alignment. Extensive experiments on standard CIL benchmarks demonstrate that SR$^2$-LoRA effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting, with its advantages becoming more pronounced as the number of tasks increases. Code is available in the \href{https://github.com/FqWan24/SR-2-LoRA}{repository}.

</details>


### [423] [A Flexible Adaptive Stable Clustering Algorithm for Archive-Scale Online Mass Spectrometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07424)
*Shao Shi,Xin Yang,Huiran Feng,Jianhuai Ye,Tianlong Hu,Yaling Zeng,Tzung-May Fu,Lei Zhu,Huizhong Shen,Chen Wang,Shu Tao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FASC（柔性自适应稳定聚类）框架，通过解耦相似性核与优化逻辑，解决了大规模质谱数据分析中聚类方法在可扩展性、度量灵活性和算法稳定性之间的权衡问题。在2500万大气气溶胶质谱上实现了O(N)线性扩展，并自主发现了大气老化路径和超稀有工业示踪物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代在线质谱法产生数十TB级数据流，对理解地球环境系统至关重要，但现有聚类方法在可扩展性、度量灵活性和算法稳定性三者之间存在不可调和的矛盾，形成计算瓶颈，阻碍了从这些数据中提取可操作的化学信息。

Method: FASC通过架构上解耦相似性核与严格的优化逻辑，采用密度增强相似性选择规则和几何约束，确保确定性、顺序无关的收敛，实现O(N)线性运行时复杂度。

Result: 在经典机器学习基准上实现>99.5%聚类纯度和0.99调整兰德指数；在2500万个大气气溶胶质谱上展示严格线性经验运行时缩放（O(N)），自主绘制二次无机气溶胶的大气老化路径，并分离出丰度<0.2%的超稀有工业示踪物。

Conclusion: FASC为挖掘环境大数据提供了可扩展的基础设施，成功解决了大规模质谱数据分析中长期存在的计算瓶颈问题。

Abstract: Modern online mass spectrometry generates multi-terabyte data streams critical for understanding Earth's environmental systems. However, extracting actionable chemical insights from these repositories is impeded by a computational bottleneck: existing clustering methods force a compromise among scalability, metric flexibility, and algorithmic stability. Here, we introduce Flexible Adaptive Stable Clustering (FASC), a dynamical systems framework that resolves these constraints by architecturally decoupling the similarity kernel from rigorous optimization logic. Unlike legacy heuristics that suffer from stochastic drift and algorithmic blending, FASC employs a Density-Augmented Similarity Selection rule and geometric constraints to guarantee deterministic, order-independent convergence. After validating FASC on canonical machine-learning ground truths (achieving >99.5% cluster purity and 0.99 Adjusted Rand Index), we deployed the framework on 25 million mass spectra of atmospheric aerosols. Demonstrating strictly linear empirical runtime scaling (O(N)), FASC autonomously mapped atmospheric aging pathways of secondary inorganic aerosols while isolating ultra-rare industrial tracers (<0.2% abundance), providing a scalable infrastructure for mining environmental big data.

</details>


### [424] [GameGen-Verifier: Parallel Keypoint-Based Verification for LLM-Generated Games via Runtime State Injection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07442)
*Chaobo Jia,Ruipeng Wan,Ting Sun,Weihao Tan,Borui Wan,Yuxuan Tong,Guangming Sheng,Hong Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GameGen-Verifier，一种将游戏规范分解为可验证关键点并转化为独立验证单元的自动化验证方法，在100个游戏数据集上达到92.2%准确率，比基线快16.6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成游戏的验证方法（Agent-as-a-Verifier）依赖智能体进行开放式游戏测试，存在可达性受限、耗时长、覆盖不全、受智能体能力影响等问题，缺乏可靠的自动化验证手段。

Method: 将游戏规范分解为可验证的关键点，每个关键点转化为独立的验证单元。每个单元将游戏运行时修补到具体目标状态，执行有界交互，并根据关键点断言判断结果。实现GGV-Harness，提供并发管理、运行时隔离和故障恢复。

Result: 在VeriGame数据集（100个游戏，7个类型）上，GameGen-Verifier准确率达92.2%，而基线为58.8%；同时减少16.6倍的墙钟时间。

Conclusion: GameGen-Verifier通过分解规范为可验证关键点并独立验证，有效解决了LLM生成游戏的自动化验证难题，在准确率和效率上显著优于现有方法。

Abstract: LLM-based game generation promises to turn natural-language specifications into executable games, but progress is limited by the lack of reliable automated verification. Unlike conventional code generation, game correctness is defined over long-horizon interaction: a game may appear correct while violating core mechanics such as state updates, interaction rules, and phase transitions. Existing Agent-as-a-Verifier approaches collapse verification into open-ended gameplay, making verdicts reachability-bound, time-consuming, coverage-limited, and sensitive to the agent's gameplay ability.
  We present GameGen-Verifier, an automated verification paradigm for LLM-generated games that decomposes a specification into verifiable keypoints and grounds them into independent verification units. Each unit patches the game runtime into a concrete target state, executes a bounded interaction, and judges the outcome against the keypoint assertion. We implement GGV-Harness, a scalable agentic harness providing concurrency management, runtime isolation, and fault recovery.
  On VeriGame, our dataset of 100 games across seven genres, GameGen-Verifier achieves up to 92.2% accuracy against human judgments versus 58.8% for the coverage-enforced Agent-as-a-Verifier baseline, while reducing wall-clock time by up to 16.6x.

</details>


### [425] [VNN-LIB 2.0: Rigorous Foundations for Neural Network Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07451)
*Ann Roy,Allen Antony,Andrea Gimelli,Matthew L. Daggitt*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对VNN-LIB 1.0标准在语法、语义和类型系统上的缺陷，提出VNN-LIB 2.0。核心贡献是引入"网络理论"抽象概念，将标准与特定ONNX版本解耦，并形式化了查询语言、类型系统和语义，最后在Agda定理证明器中机械化验证了标准的一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VNN-LIB 1.0标准存在严重缺陷：缺乏精确的语法、语义和类型系统，表达能力有限，且依赖语义不固定且不断演化的外部ONNX模型，这与SMT-LIB等自包含、语义固定的标准形成鲜明对比。

Method: 引入"网络理论"（network theory）概念，抽象刻画神经网络模型格式所需的最小语义接口，使VNN-LIB独立于特定ONNX版本；在此基础上形式化定义查询语言语法、类型系统和形式语义，并使用Agda定理证明器进行机械化验证以确保内部一致性。

Result: 建立了VNN-LIB 2.0的理论基础，提供了形式化的语法、类型系统和语义，并通过Agda机械化验证了标准的一致性。

Conclusion: VNN-LIB 2.0为可信的神经网络验证提供了稳健且严格的形式化基础，解决了1.0版本的关键缺陷。

Abstract: Neural network verification is an active and rapidly maturing research area, with a growing ecosystem of solvers and tools. The VNN-LIB standard was introduced to support interoperability in this ecosystem, but Version~1.0 has several serious short-comings as a formal foundation: it lacks a precise syntax, semantics, and type system, offers limited expressivity, and relies on externally defined ONNX models whose semantics are informal and constantly evolving. The latter distinguishes VNN-LIB from established standards such as SMT-LIB, where queries are self-contained and have fixed semantics.
  In this paper we address these challenges by developing the theoretical foundations of VNN-LIB~2.0. Our key contribution is the introduction of the notion of a \emph{network theory}, which abstractly characterises the minimal semantic interface required from a neural network model format. This abstraction enables VNN-LIB to be defined independently of any specific ONNX version while remaining compatible with evolving model representations. Building on this foundation, we present a formal syntax for a more expressive query language, a type system for it over the numeric domains provided by the network theory, and finally a formal semantics. To ensure internal consistency, the standard is mechanised in the Agda theorem prover. VNN-LIB~2.0 therefore provides robust and rigorous foundations for trustworthy neural network verification.

</details>


### [426] [Inference-Time Attribute Distribution Alignment for Unconditional Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07456)
*Hao Luan,See-Kiong Ng,Chun Kai Ling*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于最优控制的方法，在推理阶段对预训练的无条件扩散模型进行属性分布对齐，无需重新训练或微调模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可控生成方法多关注单个样本，难以满足样本群体需遵循特定属性分布（如人口统计平衡或语义比例）的应用需求。

Method: 将推理阶段的属性分布对齐问题形式化为最优控制问题：将逆向扩散过程视为动力系统的 rollout，通过添加时间相关的加性扰动作为控制信号，利用最优控制算法优化可微的分布匹配目标，同时惩罚控制代价以保真数据。

Result: 在图像生成实验中，该方法在无需重训练或微调预训练模型的前提下，相比于基线方法能更好地将属性分布对齐到多样且灵活的测试时目标。

Conclusion: 提出的即插即用方法能有效实现推理时的属性分布对齐，平衡了分布匹配与数据保真度，具有良好的灵活性和通用性。

Abstract: Inference-time controllable generation is essential for real-world applications of unconditional diffusion models. However, most existing techniques focus on individual samples, struggling in applications that require the sample population to follow specific attribute distributions (e.g., demographic balance or semantic proportions). We formalize this setting as the inference-time attribute distributional alignment problem for pretrained unconditional diffusion models. To address this, we cast inference-time attribute distributional alignment as an optimal control problem over the reverse diffusion process, viewing the process as the rollout of a dynamical system and augmenting it with additive, time-dependent perturbations as control. We solve for the perturbations using an optimal-control-based algorithm to optimize a differentiable distribution-matching objective while penalizing control effort to preserve data fidelity. Experiment results in image generation demonstrate that our proposed plug-and-play approach can better align attribute distributions to diverse and flexible test-time targets compared to baselines, without retraining or finetuning the pretrained diffusion model.

</details>


### [427] [Estimation of Motor Unit Parameters from Surface Electromyograms using an Informed Autoencoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07458)
*Kaja Balzereit,Malte Mechtenberg,Axel Schneider*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于信息自动编码器（informed autoencoder）的方法，用于从表面肌电信号（EMG）中同时估计多个运动单位参数（如神经支配区中心和电位的传导速度），通过将物理规律嵌入潜空间学习，减少了传统白盒建模所需的大量人工工作，并在合成数据上验证了其可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 运动单位参数（如神经支配区中心、电位传导速度）对于提高神经力学模型的保真度至关重要，但这些参数具有个体特异性且随肌肉收缩变化，现有方法多依赖白盒建模，需要大量人工建模工作，缺乏高效且非侵入式的估计手段。

Method: 将运动单位参数估计建模为一个非线性损失函数的逆问题，提出一种信息自动编码器（informed autoencoder），在潜空间中学习参数，同时重构表面EMG信号，并强制满足将参数与EMG信号关联的物理定律。

Result: 在合成数据实验中，神经支配区中心的平均绝对误差为2.5989 mm，电位传导速度的平均绝对误差为0.1697 m/s。

Conclusion: 该方法能够同时估计多个运动单位参数，且通过数据驱动机器学习减少了人工建模工作量，验证了该新方法的可行性。

Abstract: Motor unit parameters such as the innervation zone centre or the conduction velocity of the electrical potential harbour the potential to improve the fidelity of neuromechanical models used for movement and force prediction. Determining these parameters in a non-invasive way is challenging, as they are subject-specific and may vary with muscle contraction. Existing work on the estimation of motor unit parameters mainly relies on white-box modelling and therefore requires substantial manual modelling effort. This work targets the simultaneous estimation of multiple subject-specific motor unit parameters from electromyography (EMG) recordings measured non-invasively at the skin surface. This results in an inverse problem with a nonlinear loss function. To address this problem, an informed autoencoder is developed. This autoencoder reconstructs the surface EMG recordings while learning the parameters in its latent space and adhering to physical laws that relate the parameters to the EMG signals. In experiments on synthetic data, innervation zone centres are estimated with a mean absolute error of 2.5989 $\mathrm{mm}$, and conduction velocities of the electric potential are estimated with a mean absolute error of 0.1697 $\mathrm{m}\mathrm{s}^{-1}$. These results demonstrate the plausibility of this novel approach, which enables the simultaneous estimation of several motor unit parameters while reducing manual modelling effort through the integration of data-driven machine learning.

</details>


### [428] [Learning Minimal-Deviation Corrections for Multi-Dimensional Mismodelling in HEP Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07460)
*Matthias Schott,Lucie Flek*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于神经网络的蒙特卡罗模拟修正方法，在仅有一维目标分布可用的情况下，通过最小偏离原则修正多维特征空间中的建模误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高能物理中蒙特卡罗模拟在多维特征空间存在建模偏差，但实验信息常局限于1D分布，传统一维重加权方法忽略特征相关性，而全多维方法需要大量目标数据，实际操作受限。

Method: 基于神经网络的方法，学习一种变换使模拟事件在接近原始模拟的同时重现可用的一维目标分布。通过最小偏离原则保留基线模型的全局相关结构，同时实现针对性修正。

Result: 在模拟伪数据的控制研究中，该方法改善与目标分布的一致性，并保持多维结构的合理性。

Conclusion: 该方法适用于传统技术无法应对的复杂高维分析场景，提供在有限信息下可扩展的MC建模增强方案。

Abstract: Accurate Monte Carlo (MC) modelling in high-energy physics is challenging, particularly in complex scenarios where simulations fail to reproduce observed data. In practice, experimental information is often limited to one-dimensional (1D) distributions, while mismodelling arises in a multidimensional feature space. This restricts traditional correction methods, as one-dimensional reweighting ignores correlations and fully multidimensional approaches require large target datasets. We propose a neural network-based method that operates under these constraints by learning a transformation of simulated events that reproduces the available 1D target distributions while remaining close to the original simulation. This minimal-deviation principle preserves the global correlation structure of the baseline model while enabling targeted corrections of mismodelled features. Using controlled studies with simulated pseudo-data, we show that the method improves agreement with target distributions and maintains a consistent multidimensional structure. The approach is designed for complex, high-dimensional analyses where traditional techniques are insufficient, providing a scalable way to enhance MC modelling under limited information.

</details>


### [429] [Approximation Error Upper and Lower Bounds for Hölder Class with Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07463)
*Xin He,Yuling Jiao,Xiliang Lu,Jerry Zhijian Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从理论上证明了Transformer对Hölder光滑函数的逼近能力：上界表明$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d_0/\alpha})$个块即可实现$\varepsilon$精度逼近，下界证明至少需要$\Omega(\varepsilon^{-d_0/(4\alpha)})$个块，并将结果推广到回归任务的风险界分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索Transformer在函数逼近方面的表达能力，填补其对于Hölder类函数逼近能力理论分析的空白。

Method: 利用Softmax算子、ReLU激活函数和残差连接的标准Transformer架构，通过建立逼近误差上下界进行分析。上界通过构造性证明，下界利用VC维上界进行推导。

Result: 上界：$\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-d_0/\alpha})$个块可逼近任意有界Hölder函数；下界：至少需要$\Omega(\varepsilon^{-d_0/(4\alpha)})$个块。并将结果扩展至回归任务的超额风险率。

Conclusion: 本文首次为Transformer提供了对Hölder函数的严格逼近上下界，理论结果验证了其在实际回归任务中的有效性。

Abstract: We explore the expressive power of Transformers by establishing precise approximation error upper and lower bounds for Hölder class. Specifically, a new approximation upper bound is derived for the standard Transformer architecture equipped with Softmax operators, ReLU activation functions, and residual connections. We prove that a Transformer network composed of at most $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{-{d_{0}}/α})$ blocks can approximate any bounded Hölder function with $d_{0}$-dimensional input and smoothness $α\in(0,1]$ under any accuracy $\varepsilon>0$. In the case of approximation lower bounds, leveraging the VC-dimension upper bound, we are the first to rigorously prove that Transformers demand for at least $Ω(\varepsilon^{-{d_{0}}/({4α})})$ blocks to achieve the $\varepsilon$ approximation accuracy. As a final step, we extend the derived results for standard Transformers to a general regression task and establish the corresponding excess risk rates demonstrating Transformers' empirical effectiveness in real-world settings.

</details>


### [430] [Physical Simulators as Do-Operators: Causal Discovery under Latent Confounders for AI-for-Science](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07467)
*Tsuyoshi Okita*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CFM-SD利用基于第一性原理的物理模拟器作为因果干预算子，在存在潜在混淆变量的情况下进行因果结构发现，仅需O(d)次单变量干预即可实现d变量因果结构的可识别性，在合成数据和真实科学数据上均显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果发现方法（如IGSP、DCDI、ENCO）假设因果充分性（无潜在混淆变量）且依赖于合成模拟器中的虚拟干预，但在AI-for-Science场景（如分子设计、材料科学）中，潜在混淆变量普遍存在，且真实干预（如基于物理的模拟）每个数据点需要数小时甚至数天，因此亟需一种能够同时处理潜在混淆变量和真实干预数据的方法。

Method: CFM-SD（Causal Flow Matching with Simulation Data）将基于第一性原理的物理模拟器作为Pearl干预演算中的do-算子，利用因果流匹配技术，在存在潜在混淆变量的情况下从模拟数据中学习因果结构，并理论上证明仅需O(d)次单变量干预即可实现d变量因果结构的可识别性。

Result: 在合成数据（γ=0.2–0.8）的内在评估中，CFM-SD平均F1=0.800，远超所有基线方法（F1=0.127–0.562）。在真实科学数据的外在评估中，CFM-SD在分子毒性预测和电池电解质优化任务上实现了57–58%的偏差减少。

Conclusion: CFM-SD通过物理模拟器作为干预算子，在存在潜在混淆变量的真实科学场景中实现了高效的因果结构发现，同时达到理论最优的干预复杂度，在合成和真实数据上均展现出显著优势，证明了超越合成基准的实际应用价值。

Abstract: Existing interventional causal discovery methods -- IGSP, DCDI, ENCO -- assume causal sufficiency (no latent confounders) and rely on virtual interventions in synthetic simulators. In AI-for-Science settings such as molecular design and materials science, latent confounders are ubiquitous and real interventions (e.g., physics-based simulations) require hours to days per data point. We propose CFM-SD (Causal Flow Matching with Simulation Data), which uses first-principles physical simulators as do-operators in Pearl's interventional calculus to simultaneously handle latent confounders and real interventional data. Theoretically, $d$-variable causal structure is identifiable with $O(d)$ single-variable interventions -- the minimum under physical realizability constraints. In Intrinsic Evaluation on synthetic data ($γ=0.2$--$0.8$), CFM-SD achieves average F1$=0.800$ vs. F1$=0.127$--$0.562$ for all baselines. In Extrinsic Evaluation on real scientific data, CFM-SD achieves 57--58\% bias reduction in molecular toxicity prediction and battery electrolyte optimization, demonstrating practical value beyond synthetic benchmarks.

</details>


### [431] [Uncovering Hidden Systematics in Neural Network Models for High Energy Physics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07470)
*Lucie Flek,Philipp Alexander Jungs,Akbar Karimi,Timo Saala,Alexander Schmid,Matthias Schott,Philipp Soldin,Christopher Wiebusch,Ulrich Willemsen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了神经网络在高能物理分析中，即使输入特征在实验不确定度范围内发生微小扰动（对抗性攻击），也可能导致输出显著变化，并提出了一个量化框架来探测和评估这种隐藏的系统性不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络在高能物理分析中虽有优异性能，但其对输入微小变化的敏感性导致系统不确定性估计困难；传统方法可能低估真实模型不确定性，遗留未被考虑的偏差。

Method: 借鉴对抗性攻击研究，在实验不确定度的范围内对输入特征施加微小扰动，观察NN输出变化；在事件分类、物体识别等典型HEP任务中测试多种网络架构，提出量化框架测量网络对实验变化的隐藏敏感性。

Result: 在输入不确定度包络内，网络可被系统性地"愚弄"，产生显著输出变化，而一维及关联输入分布几乎不变；不同架构均存在此问题。

Conclusion: 提出了一种实用路径来评估和控制NN在物理分析中的系统性不确定性，帮助发现并量化传统方法遗漏的偏差来源。

Abstract: Neural networks (NNs) are inherently multidimensional classifiers that learn complex, non-linear relationships among input observables. While their flexibility enables unprecedented performance in high-energy physics (HEP) analyses, it also makes them sensitive to small variations in their inputs. Consequently, the propagation and estimation of systematic uncertainties in NN-based models remain an open challenge. There are indications that uncertainties derived in control regions or from nominal variations of input features can underestimate the true model uncertainty, potentially leaving biases unaccounted for. Inspired by insights from adversarial-attack studies in machine learning, we explore how subtle perturbations, fully consistent with the experimental uncertainties on the input observables, can lead to substantial changes in NN outputs, while keeping the one-dimensional and correlated input distributions nearly unchanged. Using a set of representative HEP tasks, including event classification and object identification, and testing across a variety of network architectures, we demonstrate that networks can be systematically "fooled" at significant rates within the allowed uncertainty envelopes. Building on this observation, we introduce a quantitative framework to probe and measure the hidden sensitivity of neural networks to realistic experimental variations, providing a practical path to evaluate and control their systematic uncertainty in physics analyses.

</details>


### [432] [Transfer Learning Across Fast- and Full-Simulation Domains in High-Energy Physics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07471)
*Matthias Schott,Lucie Flek*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了高能物理中从快速模拟到全模拟数据的迁移学习，证明预训练模型在三个代表性任务中（信号-本底分类、夸克-胶子喷注标记、缺失横动量重建）均优于独立训练基线，且可将所需目标域数据量减少约一半。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高能物理中全模拟样本计算成本极高，而快速模拟虽能提供大量数据但真实性不足。本文旨在探索是否能利用快速模拟预训练模型，再迁移到全模拟数据，以降低对昂贵全模拟样本的依赖。

Method: 选取三个代表性LHC任务（信号-本底分类、夸克-胶子喷注标记、缺失横动量重建），使用三种架构（密集神经网络、图神经网络、Transformer）。在ATLAS类快速模拟上预训练，再迁移到CMS类快速模拟和ATLAS全模拟数据集，与独立训练的基线模型对比。

Result: 预训练模型在所有任务中均优于独立训练基线；显著减少目标域所需训练数据量，通常可将所需统计量减少约一半（约两倍数据效率提升）。

Conclusion: 快速模拟可用于学习鲁棒且可复用的表示，建议将训练好的模型作为可复用的科学资产公开发布，超越大规模基础模型的范畴。

Abstract: Machine-learning models in high-energy physics are often trained on simulated data, where fully simulated samples are computationally expensive while fast simulation provides large statistics at reduced realism. In this work, we systematically study transfer learning between fast-simulated and fully simulated datasets in a realistic LHC environment. We consider three representative tasks, signal-background classification, quark-gluon jet tagging, and missing transverse energy reconstruction, using dense neural networks, graph neural networks, and transformer-based architectures. Models are pretrained on ATLAS-like fast simulation and adapted to CMS-like fast simulation and to fully simulated ATLAS Open Data. Across all tasks, pretrained models consistently outperform independently trained baselines and require significantly less target-domain training data, typically reducing the needed statistics by about a factor of two. These results demonstrate that fast simulation can be used to learn robust, reusable representations and motivate publishing trained models as reusable scientific assets beyond large foundation models.

</details>


### [433] [NPMixer: Hierarchical Neighboring Patch Mixing for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07476)
*Jung Min Choi,Vijaya Krishna Yalavarthi,Lars Schmidt-Thieme*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出NPMixer模型，通过可学习的平稳小波变换分解信号为趋势和细节，利用邻域混合器模块捕获局部时序动态，并通过通道混合编码器学习高频成分的通道相关性，在7个基准数据集的多数实验设置中达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多变量时间序列预测中，局部时序动态和全局跨变量依赖关系的复杂性仍是挑战，现有方法难以同时捕获这两种特性。

Method: 提出NPMixer架构，包含三个核心组件：1) 可学习平稳小波变换，自适应学习滤波器系数以数据驱动方式分解信号；2) 邻域混合器模块，通过分层MLP在非重叠补丁上捕获局部时序动态；3) 通道混合编码器，对高频成分学习通道相关性同时保持全局趋势稳定性。

Result: 在7个基准数据集上的28个实验设置中，NPMixer在20个设置（71.4%）的MSE指标上优于现有最先进模型。

Conclusion: NPMixer通过层次化架构有效结合了局部时序动态捕获与全局跨变量依赖学习，验证了可学习小波变换在时间序列分解中的有效性。

Abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting remains a challenge due to the complexity of local temporal dynamics and global dependencies across multiple variables.
  In this paper, we propose \textbf{N}eighboring \textbf{P}atching \textbf{Mixer} (\textbf{NPMixer}), a hierarchical architecture featuring a Learnable Stationary Wavelet Transform that adaptively learns filter coefficients to decompose signals into trend and detail components in a data-dependent manner.
  Our framework introduces a Neighboring Mixer Block that captures local temporal dynamics through a series of hierarchical MLP layers operating on non-overlapping patches.
  Specifically, the mixer block utilizes MLPs to learn temporal patterns within and across these patches, expanding the receptive field to capture multi-scale dependencies.
  A Channel-Mixing Encoder is applied to high-frequency components to learn channel correlations while preserving the stability of the underlying global trend.
  Extensive experiments on seven benchmark datasets demonstrate that NPMixer consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models, achieving better performance in 20 out of 28 ($71.4\%$) evaluated experimental setups for MSE.

</details>


### [434] [SHRED: Retain-Set-Free Unlearning via Self-Distillation with Logit Demotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07482)
*Zizhao Hu,Ameya Godbole,Johnny Tian-Zheng Wei,Mohammad Rostami,Jesse Thomason,Robin Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SHRED是一种无需保留集的大语言模型遗忘方法，通过只对高信息量（低概率）的token进行遗忘蒸馏，实现遗忘效果与模型效用的帕累托最优平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大语言模型遗忘方法大多需要保留集（retain set）来防止模型能力灾难性下降，这额外引入了数据依赖，增加了部署复杂度。论文旨在设计一种无需保留集的遗忘方法。

Method: 两阶段方法：(1) 选择阶段：对遗忘集实例进行前向传播，收集每个token的自回归概率，选择概率最低（信息量最高）的token作为遗忘位置，其余作为良性锚点；(2) 训练阶段：在遗忘位置降低记忆token的logit，在良性位置保持原始分布，通过单一的KL自蒸馏目标同时实现遗忘和效用保持。

Result: 在四个标准遗忘基准上，SHRED实现了遗忘效果与模型效用的帕累托最优，超越了依赖保留集的方法。对重新学习攻击和成员推断攻击具有鲁棒性，且在多次连续遗忘后仍保持稳定效用。

Conclusion: SHRED证明了无需保留集也能实现高效的遗忘，关键洞察在于遗忘集中的token并非同等承载记忆信息，只处理高信息量token即可实现遗忘与效用保持的平衡。

Abstract: Machine unlearning for large language models (LLMs) aims to selectively remove memorized content such as private data, copyrighted text, or hazardous knowledge, without costly full retraining. Most existing methods require a retain set of curated examples to prevent catastrophic degradation of general model utility, creating an extra data dependency that complicates deployment. We propose SHRED (Self-distillation via High-surprisal-only Retain-set-free Entropy Demotion), a retain-set-free unlearning method built on a key insight: not all tokens within a forget set instance carry memorized information equally. High-information tokens concentrate the model's memorized knowledge, while low-information tokens reflect general language competence. SHRED operates in two stages. (1) Selection: We perform a forward pass on a forget set instance, collect per-token autoregressive probabilities, and select the bottom (lowest probability, highest Shannon information) as forget positions; the remaining positions are retained as benign anchors. (2) Training: We construct modified KL targets that demote the memorized token's logit at forget positions while preserving the original distribution at benign positions. The model is then trained via a single top KL self-distillation objective that simultaneously drives forgetting and utility preservation. We evaluate SHRED across four standard unlearning benchmarks and demonstrate that it establishes a new Pareto-optimal trade-off between forget efficacy and model utility, outperforming retain-set-dependent methods. Our analysis shows that SHRED is robust against relearning attacks and membership-inference attacks, and it maintains stable utility even after many sequential unlearning runs.

</details>


### [435] [Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation for Fast Probabilistic Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07661)
*George Rapakoulias,Peter Garud,Lingjiong Zhu,Panagiotis Tsiotras*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出STMD（随机转移图蒸馏），一种无需教师模型的扩散模型加速推理框架，通过蒸馏SDE的完整转移图实现一步或几步随机采样，在保持生成随机性的同时大幅提升推理速度，并在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA上验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型虽生成质量高、多样性强，但推理成本昂贵。现有蒸馏方法依赖预训练教师模型、双层优化或轨迹模拟缓存，效率低下且扩展性差。因此需要一种无需教师、高效可扩展的加速方案。

Method: STMD通过条件平均流模型参数化SDE的完整转移图，直接蒸馏随机采样过程中的转移映射，而非仅建模后验分布的均值。该方法无需预训练教师、无需双层优化、无需轨迹模拟缓存，训练高效可扩展，且保留随机采样能力。

Result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA数据集上的图像生成实验验证了STMD的有效性，能够在一步或几步内完成随机采样，并保持生成质量。同时给出了Wasserstein距离下的收敛界，提供了理论保证。

Conclusion: STMD作为一种教师无关的蒸馏框架，成功在加速扩散模型推理的同时保留了概率生成能力，对需要随机推理的下游任务（如扩散后验采样、逆问题、能量基微调）尤其有用。

Abstract: Diffusion models achieve strong generation quality, diversity, and distribution coverage, but their performance often comes with expensive inference. In this work, we propose Stochastic Transition-Map Distillation (STMD), a teacher-free framework for accelerating diffusion model inference while preserving probabilistic sample generation. In contrast to score-based diffusion models, whose denoising parametrization models the mean of the posterior distribution, STMD distills the full transition map associated with the sampling stochastic differential equation (SDE). We parameterize these SDE transitions with a conditional Mean Flow model, yielding a one- or few-step stochastic sampler that retains the transition structure of the underlying diffusion process. This perspective is especially useful for downstream tasks that require stochastic inference, such as diffusion posterior sampling, inverse problems, and energy-based fine-tuning. Compared to recent distillation methods, STMD requires no pretrained teacher, bi-level optimization, or trajectory simulation and caching, enabling efficient and scalable training. We derive convergence bounds for our method in the Wasserstein distance, providing a strong theoretical foundation for our approach, and validate STMD on various image generation examples on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CelebA datasets.

</details>


### [436] [Does Your Neural Network Extrapolate? Feature Engineering as Identifiability Bias for OOD Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07483)
*Leonel Aguilar,Jan Nagler,Christoph Hoelscher,Nino Antulov-Fantulin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了深度神经网络在分布外（OOD）泛化中失败的根本原因：从单一训练窗口（ID）中，OOD相关特征是不可识别的，成功依赖于隐式或显式的结构承诺（特征映射、标签映射和模型类），这些承诺决定了OOD泛化能力，而ID性能保持不变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释深度神经网络为何能从分布内（ID）数据中学习到分布外（OOD）相关的特征，以及何时会失败，将特征学习与数据生成过程的可识别性解耦。

Method: 通过理论分析证明从单一训练窗口进行OOD外推是不可识别的；提出结构承诺（特征映射φ、标签映射ψ、模型类M）决定了假定的DGP并主导OOD泛化；通过多个实验验证（自然科学场景、位置编码研究、控制实验）。

Result: 同一架构、同一ID损失下，仅改变表示就能使OOD表现相差约520倍；当结构承诺正确且可识别时，OOD误差消失（如傅里叶坐标将周期外推转化为插值）；正确特征是必要条件但非充分条件，模型类必须能表达目标，且变换后的训练数据必须覆盖相关表示空间。

Conclusion: OOD泛化的成功依赖于隐式/显式的结构承诺（如架构、预训练、数据增强、输入格式、领域知识），而非仅靠ID训练数据本身；当无法从ID证据推断OOD相关结构时，模型就会失败。

Abstract: Successful deep neural networks discover salient features of data. We show when and why they fail to learn out-of-distribution (OOD)-relevant representations from an in-distribution (ID) training window. This requires decoupling feature learning from data-generating-process (DGP) identifiability. From a single training window, OOD extrapolation is non-identifiable: infinitely many DGPs are $\varepsilon$-observationally equivalent on the training data but diverge arbitrarily outside it, and no in-distribution criterion alone reliably breaks the tie. A structural commitment, the feature map, label map, and model class $(\varphi, ψ, \mathcal{M})$, dictates the assumed DGP and governs OOD generalization while leaving ID performance essentially unchanged. When architecture, pretraining, augmentation, input formats, or domain knowledge implicitly inject the missing commitment, the model succeeds. When it cannot infer OOD-relevant structure from ID evidence, it fails. Changing only the representation can make the same architecture, at the same in-distribution loss, differ by ${\sim}520\times$ out of distribution. When the commitment is correct and identifiable, OOD error vanishes. For example, Fourier coordinates turn periodic extrapolation into interpolation on $\mathbb{S}^1$. The same mechanism predicts outcomes in three natural-science settings (mass-action chemistry; Kepler's-third-law exoplanet prediction, $n=2{,}362$; and cross-species coding-DNA detection) and in a 264-run positional-encoding study across Transformer, Mamba, and S4D. Finally, a controlled study shows: correct features are necessary but not sufficient. The model class must express the target, and the transformed training data must cover the relevant representation space.

</details>


### [437] [Spectral Surgery: Class-Targeted Post-Hoc Rebalancing via Hessian Spike Perturbation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07790)
*Hugo Vigna,Samuel Bontemps*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"Spectral Surgery"方法，利用深度网络Hessian谱中的尖峰特征向量，通过后处理优化直接扰动模型权重，在不重新训练的情况下重新平衡各类别的分类准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管已有研究观察到深度网络Hessian谱存在尖峰结构（尖峰数量等于类别数减一），但尚未有方法利用这一结构来实际操作性地提升分类性能。

Method: 提出Spectral Surgery方法，包含三个组件：(i) 尖峰-类别敏感度矩阵，量化每类准确率沿每个尖峰特征向量的方向导数；(ii) 约束优化扰动系数，针对弱类同时保护强类；(iii) 自适应幅度控制，基于迭代级改进信号调整扰动预算。

Result: 在CIFAR-10和ISIC-2019数据集上，该方法在平衡准确率和标准差方面均取得了令人鼓舞的结果。

Conclusion: Spectral Surgery有效利用Hessian谱的尖峰结构来提升类别平衡性，为后处理优化提供了新思路。

Abstract: The Hessian spectrum of trained deep networks exhibits a characteristic structure: a continuous bulk of near-zero eigenvalues and a small number of large outlier eigenvalues (spikes), confirming the relevance of Random Matrix Theory in deep learning. The spike count matches the number of classes minus one. While prior work has described this structure, no method has exploited it operationally to improve classification performance. We propose Spectral Surgery, a post-hoc optimization method that directly perturbs model weights along spike eigenvectors to rebalance per-class accuracy without retraining. We introduce (i) a spike-class sensitivity matrix that quantifies the directional derivative of each class's accuracy along each spike eigenvector, (ii) a constrained optimization of perturbation coefficients that targets weak classes while preserving strong ones, and (iii) an adaptive amplitude control that raises or lowers the perturbation budget based on iteration-level improvement signals. We obtain encouraging results on CIFAR-10 and ISIC-2019 on both balanced accuracy and standard deviation.

</details>


### [438] [Excluding the Target Domain Improves Extrapolation: Deconfounded Hierarchical Physics Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07485)
*Tsuyoshi Okita*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出去混杂分层门控（DHG）机制，通过反事实估计和后门调整消除温度混杂，结合由粗到细的物理约束，在锂电池温度外推任务上较基准提升46%的RMSE。反直觉发现：预训练排除目标域数据反而效果更好（RMSE 0.224 vs 0.324）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理约束深度生成模型在分布外泛化中面临两个核心挑战：一是物理规律具有层次结构，现有方法却用单一静态正则项统一处理；二是存在混杂变量问题（如温度），导致模型学到的是虚假关联而非真正的物理一致性。

Method: 提出DHG框架：(1) 利用do-算子的反事实估计+后门调整去除温度混杂；(2) 设计分层门控机制，逐层识别混杂影响强度；(3) 采用由粗到细的物理约束渐进施加策略。

Result: 在锂电池温度外推（训练24°C，测试4-43°C）上RMSE=0.215，相比无约束基线（0.397）提升46%。反直觉发现：预训练排除目标域数据比包含目标域数据外推性能提升39%。

Conclusion: 物理约束生成模型需要解耦混杂变量与层级约束，FNO在预训练中排除目标域数据可学到更具迁移性的域无关物理模式，为物理AI外推提供新范式。

Abstract: Extrapolation to out-of-distribution conditions is a fundamental challenge for physics-constrained deep generative models. Existing methods apply physical constraints as a single static regularization term uniformly across the generation process, and address neither the hierarchical structure of physical laws and the confounding variable problem. We propose the Deconfounded Hierarchical Gate (DHG), which serves as a diagnostic and control mechanism: it identifies when and how strongly temperature confounding contaminates each constraint level, so that hierarchical gates reflect intrinsic physical inconsistency rather than spurious temperature effects. DHG combines counterfactual estimation via the do-operator with backdoor adjustment to remove confounding, then applies Coarse-to-Fine physical constraints progressively. We report a counter-intuitive finding in pretraining: excluding the target-domain data from pretraining outperforms including it by 39% in extrapolation performance (RMSE 0.224 vs. 0.324).
