DTSemNet enables end-to-end training with standard gradient descent, eliminating the need for approximations in both classification and regression. While classification aligns naturally with this formulation, regression remains challenging due to the joint optimization of internal nodes and leaf regressors. To address this, we analyze the limitations of STE and introduce an annealed Top-k method that provides accurate gradient signals without approximation. Extensive experiments on classification and regression benchmarks show that DTSemNet-trained oblique DTs outperform state-of-the-art differentiable DTs. Furthermore, we demonstrate that DTSemNet can serve as programmatic DT policies in reinforcement learning environments, thereby broadening their applicability.

</details>


### [478] [RelAgent: LLM Agents as Data Scientists for Relational Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07840)
*Xingyue Huang,Louis Tichelman,Jinwoo Kim,Krzysztof Olejniczak,İsmail İlkan Ceylan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RelAgent是一个基于LLM的自动化数据科学家框架，通过两个阶段（搜索阶段使用LLM代理构建SQL特征程序并选择模型，推理阶段执行无需LLM调用）实现关系学习，最终预测器由SQL查询和经典模型组成，具备快速、确定性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 关系学习是难题，现有方法（图模型、表格方法、序列方法）各有优缺点，需要一种能结合LLM推理能力与经典模型高效性的统一框架。

Method: 提出RelAgent，分两阶段：(1) 搜索阶段：LLM代理使用数据库、验证和评估工作区工具构建SQL特征程序并选择预测模型；(2) 推理阶段：执行程序无需LLM调用，最终由SQL查询和经典模型组成预测器。

Result: 最终预测器包含可解释的SQL特征（人类可读查询）和经典模型，实现快速、确定性预测，且可基于标准数据库系统扩展部署。

Conclusion: RelAgent通过将LLM的推理能力用于特征工程，同时保持推理阶段的高效性和可解释性，为关系学习提供了一种兼顾灵活性与实用性的解决方案。

Abstract: Relational learning is a challenging problem that has motivated a wide range of approaches, including graph-based models (e.g., graph neural networks, graph transformers), tabular methods (e.g., tabular foundation models), and sequence-based approaches (e.g., large language models), each with its own advantages and limitations. We propose RelAgent, an LLM-based autonomous data scientist for relational learning, which operates in two phases. In the search phase, an LLM agent uses database, validation, and evaluation workspace tools to construct SQL feature programs and select a predictive model. In the inference phase, the resulting program is executed without further LLM calls. The final predictor consists of SQL queries and a classical model, enabling fast, deterministic, and intrinsically interpretable predictions: features are human-readable queries, and predictions depend only on the resulting query-defined feature map, enabling scalable deployment using standard database systems.

</details>


### [479] [\mathsf{VISTA}: Decentralized Machine Learning in Adversary Dominated Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07841)
*Hanzaleh Akbari Nodehi,Parsa Moradi,Soheil Mohajer,Mohammad Ali Maddah-Ali*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了去中心化机器学习中对手主导（adversary-dominated）的鲁棒聚合问题，提出了一种基于激励的框架VISTA，通过自适应调整一致性阈值来平衡早期进展与抗腐败能力，在无需诚实多数假设的情况下实现了与标准SGD渐近一致的收敛性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒聚合方法在诚实多数假设下有效，但当对手控制多数工作节点时会失效。本文旨在解决这一对手主导的极端场景，通过引入激励机制将恶意对手转化为理性智能体，使其在破坏与收益之间进行权衡。

Method: 提出VISTA算法，核心思想是：基于激励框架，仅接受和奖励相互一致的报告（阈值约束）；在迭代优化中自适应调整接受阈值，利用优化历史动态平衡严格性与进展速度；提供理论收敛性分析。

Result: 数值结果表明VISTA相比静态阈值方法收敛更快；理论分析证明在合理的激励感知自适应机制下，对手主导的去中心化学习仍能保持标准SGD的渐近收敛行为，无需诚实多数假设。

Conclusion: 通过激励导向的设计，即使大多数工作节点被对手控制，去中心化学习仍可实现可靠收敛，为去中心化机器学习在极端对手环境下的安全性提供了新思路。

Abstract: Decentralized machine learning often relies on outsourcing computations, such as gradient evaluations, to untrusted worker nodes. Existing robust aggregation methods can mitigate malicious behavior under honest-majority assumptions, but may fail when adversaries control a majority of the workers. We study this adversary-dominated setting through an incentive-oriented framework in which reports are accepted and rewarded only when they are mutually consistent up to a threshold. This turns the adversary from a pure saboteur into a rational agent that trades off increasing estimation error against the risk of rejection and loss of reward.
  We consider iterative optimization under this model. Unlike one-shot computation, iterative learning requires long-horizon decisions: permissive acceptance rules enable faster early progress but admit more adversarial corruption, while strict rules improve estimation accuracy but cause frequent rejections. We propose \mathsf{VISTA}, an adaptive algorithm that tunes the acceptance threshold using the optimization history. Numerical results show that \mathsf{VISTA} improves convergence over static thresholds. We also provide a rigorous convergence analysis showing that, with suitable incentive-aware adaptation, adversary-dominated decentralized learning can retain the asymptotic convergence behavior of standard SGD without relying on an honest majority.

</details>


### [480] [Distributional simplicity bias and effective convexity in Energy Based Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07844)
*Aurélien Decelle,Alfonso de Jesús Navas Gómez,Beatriz Seoane*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过有效模型（广义Ising模型或能量傅里叶展开）视角，对二元变量上严格正分布的基于能量的学习进行了动力学分析。研究发现梯度流存在两类不动点：数据一致点（精确重现目标分布）和伪点（满足平稳性但未匹配目标分布）。数据一致点附近的扰动要么稳定要么中性。此外，梯度动力学导致低阶交互先于高阶交互被学习，解释了分布上的简单性偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于能量的学习训练本质上是非凸的，导致对初始化的敏感性、容易陷入局部最优以及梯度动力学不稳定。作者希望通过动力学分析理解这些问题的根源。

Method: 将能量模型视为有效模型（广义Ising模型或能量函数的傅里叶展开），分析二元变量上学习严格正分布时的梯度流动力学，研究不动点类型及其稳定性，以及交互作用的学习顺序。

Result: 梯度流存在两类不动点：数据一致点（精确匹配目标分布）和伪点（满足平稳性但不匹配目标分布）。数据一致点附近扰动稳定或中性，存在保持有效模型不变的中性方向。梯度动力学导致低阶交互先于高阶交互被学习。

Conclusion: 该分析为基于能量的学习中的分布简单性偏好提供了机制性解释，并解释了为什么低阶上非数据一致的不动点在实际中未被观察到。

Abstract: Energy-based learning is a powerful framework for generative modelling, but its training is inherently non-convex, leading potentially to sensitivity to initialisation, poor local optima, and unstable gradient dynamics. We present a dynamical analysis of energy-based learning through the lens of the effective model, which can be interpreted as either a generalised Ising model with higher-order interactions or the Fourier expansion of the energy. Under sufficient expressivity, we show that the gradient flow induced by learning strictly positive distributions over binary variables admits two types of fixed points: data-consistent points, which exactly reproduce the target distribution, and spurious points, which satisfy stationarity without matching the target distribution. Around data-consistent points, we show that perturbations are either stable or neutral, with neutral directions leaving the effective model invariant. Finally, we show that gradient dynamics induce a hierarchy in which lower-order interactions are learned before higher-order ones. This provides a mechanistic explanation for the distributional simplicity bias and clarifies why fixed points that are not data-consistent at low orders are not observed in practice.

</details>


### [481] [Actor-Critic Algorithm for Dynamic Expectile and CVaR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07857)
*Yudong Luo,Erick Delage*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需转移扰动的替代策略梯度方法，结合基于可引发性的无模型价值学习，构建了面向动态风险优化的离策略演员-评论家算法，实验证明其在风险规避任务中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态风险优化中，策略更新通常需要转移扰动，而价值学习常依赖基于模型的方法，两种挑战都限制了算法的实用性和效率。

Method: 1) 提出在softmax策略参数化下无需转移扰动的替代策略梯度；2) 利用可引发性（elicitability）开发了面向动态分位数和条件风险价值的无模型价值学习方法；3) 借鉴Expected SARSA和Expected Policy Gradient，构建了无模型离策略演员-评论家算法。

Result: 在可验证风险规避行为的领域中，所提算法能够学习到风险规避策略，且一致优于其他现有方法。

Conclusion: 本研究有效解决了动态风险优化中策略更新和价值学习的双重挑战，提出的无模型算法在风险规避任务上表现出色。

Abstract: Optimizing dynamic risk with stochastic policies is challenging in both policy updates and value learning. The former typically requires transition perturbation, while the latter may rely on model-based approaches. To address these challenges, we propose a surrogate policy gradient without transition perturbation under softmax policy parameterization. We further develop model-free value learning methods for dynamic expectile and conditional value-at-risk by leveraging elicitability. Finally, inspired by Expected SARSA and Expected Policy Gradient, a model-free off-policy actor-critic algorithm is constructed. Empirical results in domains with verifiable risk-averse behavior show that our algorithm can learn risk-averse policy and consistently outperforms other existing methods.

</details>


### [482] [On the Tradeoffs of On-Device Generative Models in Federated Predictive Maintenance Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07860)
*Usevalad Milasheuski,Piero Baraldi,Enrico Zio,Stefano Savazzi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了联邦学习（FL）环境下变分自编码器（VAE）、生成对抗网络（GAN）和扩散模型（DM）在工业预测性维护（PdM）时序异常检测中的表现。提出了一种新的联邦生成模型分类法，形式化了部分组件共享作为模型个性化机制。实验表明：全联邦训练下GAN稳定性提升但整体不如VAE和DM；带宽受限非IID场景下，DM的部分联邦（尤其是解码器共享）可超越全联邦。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在分布式工业物联网环境中，数据隐私保护与高效的异常检测需求并存。现有联邦学习研究多聚焦于判别模型，而生成模型在无监督时序异常检测（预测性维护）中的潜力尚未被充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统比较VAE、GAN和DM在联邦预测性维护中的性能与通信开销。

Method: 论文提出了一个联邦生成模型分类法，区分了全联邦（所有模型组件共享）和部分联邦（仅共享子集，如编码器或解码器）两种设置。在真实时序数据集上进行实验，评估VAE、GAN和扩散模型（DDPM）在不同联邦配置下的模型效用、稳定性和可扩展性。

Result: 1) 全联邦训练下，GAN稳定性优于独立本地训练，但整体性能不如VAE和DDPM。2) 对于扩散模型，在带宽受限且数据非IID的场景下，部分联邦（特别是仅共享解码器）反而优于全联邦。3) 不同生成模型在联邦学习中展现出差异化的通信-效用权衡。

Conclusion: 部分组件共享是一种有效的联邦生成模型个性化机制；扩散模型在异构、带宽受限环境中具有独特优势；未来联邦预测性维护应基于具体约束选择适当的生成模型和联邦策略。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for preserving client data ownership and control over distributed Internet of Things (IoT) environments. While discriminative models dominate most FL use cases, recent advances in generative models -- such as Variational Autoencoders (VAE), Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), and Diffusion Models (DM) -- offer new opportunities for unsupervised anomaly detection in time series analysis, with relevant applications in predictive maintenance (PdM) in critical industrial infrastructures. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of VAEs, GANs, and DMs in the context of federated PdM. We analyze their performance and communication overhead under both full and partial federation setups, where only subsets of model components are shared. Building on this analysis, the paper proposes a novel taxonomy for federated generative models that formalizes partial component sharing as a principled mechanism for model personalization. Our experiments over a real-world time series dataset reveal distinct trade-offs in model utility, stability, and scalability, especially in heterogeneous and bandwidth-constrained FL settings. For the evaluated GAN-based configurations, full federation improves training stability relative to independent local training, although the model remains less robust than the VAE- and DDPM-based alternatives. For DMs, however, partial federation -- especially decoder sharing -- can outperform full federation in bandwidth-constrained, non-IID settings.

</details>


### [483] [ADKO: Agentic Decentralized Knowledge Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07863)
*Lucas Nerone Rillo,Zhanhong Jiang,Nastaran Saadati,Aditya Balu,Baskar Ganapathysubramanian,Chinmay Hegde,Soumik Sarkar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为ADKO的框架，用于多智能体协同黑箱优化，通过知识令牌（knowledge tokens）实现高效通信、隐私保护和异构目标处理，并首次从理论上分析了双重信息损失，证明了亚线性遗憾的充要条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有黑箱优化方法（如贝叶斯优化）在分布式、去中心化场景下面临样本效率低、隐私泄露风险高、异构目标难以协调以及通信开销大等挑战，亟需一种兼顾效率与隐私的协同优化框架。

Method: 每个智能体维护一个私有的高斯过程（GP）代理模型，仅通过知识令牌（包含方向信号、优势评分及可选的语言模型洞察）进行通信；融合了GP-UCB、并行贝叶斯优化、去中心化学习和LM引导发现；提出了基于互信息的保真度度量来量化令牌压缩损失，并将LM近似误差分解为偏差和随机噪声；设计了保真度感知的令牌剪枝策略。

Result: 首次形式化分析了双重信息损失（令牌压缩损失与LM近似误差），证明累积遗憾可分解为GP误差、LM偏差、LM噪声和压缩损失四部分，并给出了亚线性遗憾的充要条件；在神经架构搜索和科学发现任务上的实验一致优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: ADKO框架在理论上和实践上均证明了其在分布式黑箱优化中的有效性，为去中心化智能体协同优化提供了可理论保证的方案。

Abstract: We present Agentic Decentralized Knowledge Optimization (ADKO), a framework for collaborative black-box optimization across autonomous agents that achieves sample efficiency, privacy preservation, heterogeneous-objective handling, and communication efficiency. Each agent maintains a private Gaussian Process (GP) surrogate trained on local data and communicates only through knowledge tokens-compact, lossy summaries containing directional signals, advantage scores, and optional language-model (LM) insights-without sharing raw data or model parameters. ADKO unifies GP-Upper Confidence Bound (GP-UCB), parallel Bayesian optimization, decentralized learning, and LM-guided discovery. We provide the first formal analysis of dual information loss: token compression, quantified via mutual-information-based fidelity, and LM approximation error, decomposed into bias and stochastic noise. Our main result shows cumulative regret decomposes into GP error, LM bias, LM noise, and compression loss, with necessary and sufficient conditions for sublinear regret. We also propose fidelity-aware token pruning to preserve high-information tokens under memory budget. Experiments on neural architecture search and scientific discovery validate the theory and show consistent improvements over strong baselines.

</details>


### [484] [Black-box model classification under the discriminative factorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07878)
*Hayden Helm,Merrick Ohata,Carey Priebe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种判别性分解方法，用于在黑盒模型级分类中区分高质量和低质量的查询集。通过该框架，机会级分类的概率随查询预算呈指数衰减，并在三个审计任务中验证了其预测性能衰减率的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前黑盒生成系统的模型级分类依赖于查询集的质量，但查询集的选择对分类性能影响很大，缺乏有效的度量标准来区分高质量与低质量的查询集。

Method: 提出判别性分解框架，通过分析查询集对模型响应的区分能力，量化查询集质量，并证明机会级分类概率随查询预算呈指数衰减。

Result: 在三个审计任务中，估计的分解参数能够预测经验性能衰减率，且基于判别性场选择的查询集能够复现真实查询集的排序。

Conclusion: 判别性分解是一种有效的黑盒模型级查询集质量评估方法，能够预测分类性能并指导高质量查询集的选择。

Abstract: Access to modern generative systems is often restricted to querying an API (the ``black-box" setting) and many properties of the system are unknown to the user at inference time. While recent work has shown that low-dimensional representations of models based on the relationship between their embedded responses to a set of queries are useful for inferring model-level properties, the quality of these representations is highly sensitive to the query set. We introduce the \emph{discriminative factorization} to distinguish between high- and low-quality query sets in the context of black-box model-level classification. Under this framework, the probability of chance-level classification decays exponentially in the query budget. On three auditing tasks, estimated factorization parameters predict the empirical performance decay rate. We conclude by showing that query sets selected using the estimated discriminative field reproduce the empirical ordering of oracle query sets.

</details>


### [485] [Adaptive Regularization for Sparsity Control in Bregman-Based Optimizers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07892)
*Ahmad Aloradi,Tim Roith,Emanuël A. P. Habets,Daniel Tenbrinck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种自适应正则化方案，通过动态调整λ值使稀疏训练模型准确达到用户指定的稀疏度目标，解决了Bregman优化器中λ参数敏感性问题，在说话人验证任务上验证了效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的稀疏训练方法（如L1惩罚）通过正则化参数λ间接控制稀疏度，但λ与最终稀疏度的映射关系复杂，尤其在Bregman优化器中敏感性极高（LinBreg和AdaBreg达到相同稀疏度所需λ可差两个数量级），导致需要大量试错才能达到目标稀疏度。

Method: 提出自适应正则化方案，根据模型当前稀疏度与目标稀疏度的差异动态更新λ值，实现对稀疏度的直接控制。在ECAPA-TDNN和ResNet34上使用VoxCeleb和CNCeleb数据集进行自动说话人验证实验。

Result: 该方法可可靠达到75%-99%的稀疏度目标；相比oracle调优的非自适应基线，早期训练收敛更快，最终等错误率（EER）相当或更优；继承了非自适应版本的良好属性（如对分布外数据的鲁棒性优于密集基线）。

Conclusion: 自适应正则化方案有效解决了Bregman优化器中λ敏感性问题，实现了对稀疏度的精确控制，同时保持或提升了模型性能和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Sparse training reduces the memory and computational costs of deep neural networks. However, sparse optimization methods, e.g., those adding an $\ell_1$ penalty, often control sparsity only indirectly through a regularization parameter $λ$, whose mapping to the final sparsity rate is non-trivial. In our experiments, we found this parameter sensitivity to be particularly pronounced for Bregman-based optimizers. Specifically, the two variants LinBreg and AdaBreg reach the same sparsity at $λ$ values that differ by up to two orders of magnitude, requiring expensive trial-and-error sweeps to achieve a user-specified sparsity. To address this, we propose an adaptive regularization scheme that updates $λ$ based on the difference between the model's current sparsity and the target sparsity. We analyze the resulting algorithm and evaluate it on automatic speaker verification with ECAPA-TDNN and ResNet34 on VoxCeleb and CNCeleb. The proposed method reliably achieves sparsity targets ranging between 75% and 99%. It also converges faster than the oracle-tuned non-adaptive baseline during early training and matches or surpasses its final performance in equal error rate. We further show that the adaptive scheme inherits key properties from its non-adaptive counterpart, including improved out-of-distribution robustness over the dense baselines.

</details>


### [486] [Curvature Beyond Positivity: Greedy Guarantees for Arbitrary Submodular Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07902)
*Yixin Chen,Alan Kuhnle*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文将曲率概念推广至所有次模函数，提出带剪枝的贪心算法，首次在函数可取负值且非单调的情况下给出乘法近似保证，理论结果优于已知最好界，实验验证有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有次模优化理论要求函数非负以保证乘法近似比，但实际应用中费用项常使函数取负值，而现有工作对负值和非单调性的处理相互孤立，缺乏统一的理论框架。

Method: 将曲率参数从单调非负函数推广到任意次模函数；设计带剪枝的贪心算法；对多线性扩展变体使用多线性松弛处理一般组合约束。

Result: 对任意次模函数（包括负值）给出曲率控制的乘法比；非单调情形（1≤c_g<2.2）严格优于已知最好通用比0.401；恢复单调情形经典(1-e^{-c_g})/c_g保证。

Conclusion: 曲率可统一处理非单调性和负值问题，实验（带费用惩罚的实验设计、覆盖、特征选择、Multi-News段落选择）支持理论。

Abstract: Submodular functions -- functions exhibiting diminishing returns -- are central to machine learning. When the objective is monotone and non-negative, the greedy algorithm achieves a tight $63\%$ approximation. But many practical objectives incorporate costs that make them negative on some inputs, and all existing multiplicative guarantees require non-negativity. Prior work handles negativity through additive bounds for the special class of decomposable functions and non-monotonicity through partial-monotonicity parameters, but these address each difficulty in isolation and neither extends the classical structural theory. We extend \emph{curvature} -- a parameter measuring how far a function deviates from linearity -- to all submodular functions, handling both non-monotonicity and negativity through a single classical concept. A greedy algorithm with pruning achieves a curvature-controlled multiplicative ratio for \emph{any} submodular function, including those taking negative values -- the first such guarantee beyond monotonicity and non-negativity. In the non-monotone regime $1 \le c_g < 2.2$, the bound strictly beats the best known uniform ratio of $0.401$ (for non-negative $f$), and it recovers the classical $(1-e^{-c_g})/c_g$ guarantee for monotone functions. A multilinear-extension variant extends the framework to general combinatorial constraints via multilinear relaxation. Experiments on cost-penalized experimental design, coverage, feature selection, and a curvature sweep on Multi-News passage selection support the theory.

</details>


### [487] [Tree SAE: Learning Hierarchical Feature Structures in Sparse Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07922)
*Tue M. Cao,Hoang X. Nhat,Raed Alharbi,My T. Thai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Tree SAE，通过结合激活覆盖和重构约束，解决现有稀疏自编码器在学习层次特征时产生的语义无关假阳性问题，并在多个基准上取得优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SAEs依赖激活覆盖条件来识别层次关系，但该条件本身不充分，容易将语义无关的概念误判为父子关系。作者旨在解决这一假阳性问题，建立更准确的层次结构学习框架。

Method: 提出Tree SAE，在传统激活覆盖条件的基础上，引入重构条件以强制父子特征之间存在更深层的功能联系。通过联合优化这两种约束，模型能够直接从特征集合中学习层次结构。

Result: Tree SAE在学习层次特征对方面显著优于现有SAEs，同时在多个关键基准上保持与最先进方法相当的性能。此外，该方法可用于映射子特征子空间的几何结构，揭示大语言模型中编码的复杂层次概念结构。

Conclusion: 激活覆盖条件单独不足以识别语义相关的父子特征，Tree SAE通过引入重构约束有效解决了这一问题，为理解LLM内部层次化概念表征提供了实用工具。

Abstract: Learning hierarchical features in Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) is essential for capturing the structured nature of real-world data and mitigating issues like feature absorption or splitting. Existing works attempt to identify hierarchical relationships within independent feature sets by relying on activation coverage, the assumption that child feature should only activate when its parent feature activates. However, we demonstrate that this condition alone is insufficient; that is, it often produces false positives where parent and child concepts are semantically unrelated. To address this, we introduce a novel reconstruction condition that enforces a deeper functional link between hierarchical levels. By combining both activation and reconstruction constraints, we propose the Tree SAE, a model designed to learn hierarchical structures directly from within the feature set. Our results demonstrate that Tree SAEs significantly surpass the existing SAEs at learning hierarchical pairs while maintaining competitive performance to the state-of-the-art on several key benchmarks. Finally, we demonstrate the practical utility of our Tree SAE in mapping the geometry of child feature subspaces and uncovering the complex hierarchical concept structures encoded within large language models.

</details>


### [488] [INO-SGD: Addressing Utility Imbalance under Individualized Differential Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07930)
*Xiao Tian,Jue Fan,Rachael Hwee Ling Sim,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出INO-SGD算法，解决个性化差分隐私（IDP）中由于不同数据所有者设置不同隐私强度导致的效用不平衡问题——即高隐私需求数据在训练模型中表现差。该算法通过每批次内策略性降低某些数据的权重，在满足IDP约束下提升高隐私数据的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有IDP算法存在严重的效用不平衡问题：隐私需求更强的数据（如敏感疾病阳性案例）在训练模型中代表性不足，导致部署时对同类数据的性能更差。而现有解决效用不平衡的技术既不满足IDP，也难以适配IDP。

Method: 提出INO-SGD算法，在每次迭代的批次内策略性地降低部分数据的权重，以提升高隐私数据在整个训练过程中的表现，同时严格满足个性化差分隐私（IDP）要求。

Result: 通过实验验证了INO-SGD算法在满足IDP约束下，能够有效缓解效用不平衡问题，提升高隐私需求数据的模型性能。

Conclusion: INO-SGD算法为解决IDP场景下的效用不平衡提供了可行的方案，填补了现有技术无法同时满足IDP和解决效用不平衡的空白。

Abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is widely employed in machine learning to protect confidential or sensitive training data from being revealed. As data owners gain greater control over their data due to personal data ownership, they are more likely to set their own privacy requirements, necessitating individualized DP (IDP) to fulfil such requests. In particular, owners of data from more sensitive subsets, such as positive cases of stigmatized diseases, likely set stronger privacy requirements, as leakage of such data could incur more serious societal impact. However, existing IDP algorithms induce a critical utility imbalance problem: Data from owners with stronger privacy requirements may be severely underrepresented in the trained model, resulting in poorer performance on similar data from subsequent users during deployment. In this paper, we analyze this problem and propose the INO-SGD algorithm, which strategically down-weights data within each batch to improve performance on the more private data across all iterations. Notably, our algorithm is specially designed to satisfy IDP, while existing techniques addressing utility imbalance neither satisfy IDP nor can be easily adapted to do so. Lastly, we demonstrate the empirical feasibility of our approach.

</details>


### [489] [Prototype Guided Post-pretraining for Single-Cell Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07938)
*Sachini Weerasekara,Natasha Darras,Sagar Kamarthi,Colles Price,Jacqueline Isaacs*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CellRefine是一种后预训练方法，通过在单细胞基础模型的预训练和微调阶段之间引入基于标记基因集的结构先验，优化细胞潜在嵌入流形，在多个下游任务中提升性能最高达15%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的单细胞预训练模型受限于细胞类型分布的长尾特性，在基因表达数据的协变量偏移下泛化能力不足，而微调的效果也存在上限。

Method: CellRefine在预训练和微调之间引入后预训练阶段，采用多目标优化，将标记基因集作为结构先验来引导后预训练过程，从而优化细胞的潜在嵌入流形。

Result: 在多个计算生物学下游任务上，CellRefine一致地提升了性能，最高提升幅度达15%。

Conclusion: CellRefine通过后预训练阶段引入基因集先验知识，有效突破了现有单细胞预训练模型在长尾分布和协变量偏移下的性能瓶颈。

Abstract: Single-cell representation learning (SCRL) from gene expression data offers a way to uncover the complex regulatory logic underlying cellular function. Inspired by large language models in natural language modeling, several single-cell pretrained models have recently been proposed that treat genes as tokens and cells as sentences. However, these models are fundamentally limited by the long-tailed nature of cell-type distributions and struggle to generalize under covariate shifts in gene expression data. While fine-tuning is often used to mitigate these issues, we observe that performance remains bounded. To address this challenge, we introduce CellRefine, a post-pretraining method that operates between the pretraining and fine-tuning stages of a single-cell foundation model. CellRefine uses a multi-faceted objective that incorporates marker-gene sets as structural priors to guide post-pretraining and refine the latent embedding manifold of cells. Across multiple computational biology tasks, empirical results show that CellRefine consistently improves downstream performance, yielding gains up to 15%.

</details>


### [490] [Slowly Annealed Langevin Dynamics: Theory and Applications to Training-Free Guided Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07950)
*Atsushi Nitanda,Dake Bu,Yueming Lyu,Tanya Veeravalli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Slowly Annealed Langevin Dynamics (SALD)采样器及其变体VA-SALD，用于跟踪移动目标分布并通过时间减速逼近终端目标；建立了非渐近收敛保证，并应用于无训练引导生成任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有采样器在跟踪移动目标分布时缺乏理论保证，且训练-free的引导生成方法需要更 principled 的框架来校正引导偏差。

Method: 提出SALD，利用KL散度微分不等式证明时间减速能通过中间目标收缩改善跟踪；进一步提出VA-SALD，显式融入预训练模型的边际分布，通过减速校正引导带来的额外偏差。

Result: 建立了SALD和VA-SALD的非渐近收敛保证，阐明了中间函数不等式和引导偏差的作用，代码已开源。

Conclusion: SALD/VA-SALD为扩散模型等生成模型家族提供了 principled 的无训练引导生成框架，具有清晰的收敛理论保证。

Abstract: We study Slowly Annealed Langevin Dynamics (SALD), a sampler for tracking a path of moving target distributions and approximating the terminal target through time slowdown. We establish non-asymptotic convergence guarantees via a KL differential inequality, showing that slowdown improves tracking through contraction of intermediate targets and the complexity of the path. Motivated by training-free guided generation with pretrained score-based generative models, we further introduce Velocity-Aware SALD (VA-SALD), which explicitly incorporates the underlying marginal distributions of the pretrained model and uses slowdown to correct the additional deviation induced by guidance. This yields a principled framework for training-free guided generation for diffusion-based and related generative model families, together with convergence guarantees that clarify the roles of intermediate functional inequalities and guidance bias. Code is available at https://github.com/anitan0925/sald.

</details>


### [491] [Convergent Stochastic Training of Attention and Understanding LoRA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07959)
*Zhengkai Sun,Dibyakanti Kumar,Alejandro F Frangi,Anirbit Mukherjee,Mingfei Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过统一框架证明，注意力层和LoRA浅层网络在随机优化下具有可训练性，且该结论不依赖于数据分布或网络规模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Transformer和LoRA在实践中效果显著，但其训练过程的数学可解释性（即随机优化方法能否保证收敛）缺乏严格的理论保证。

Method: 将注意力层和LoRA浅层神经网络的回归损失纳入吉布斯测度框架，证明损失函数满足Poincaré不等式，进而利用SDE（随机微分方程）模拟SGD的收敛性。

Result: 在温和正则化条件下，注意力层和LoRA浅层网络的损失函数均诱导满足Poincaré不等式的吉布斯测度；存在相应的SDE能够最小化这些损失。

Conclusion: 首次在不依赖数据分布或架构规模的前提下，为注意力层和LoRA网络的可训练性提供了严格的理论基础。

Abstract: Transformers have revolutionized machine learning and deploying attention layers in the model is increasingly standard across a myriad of applications. Further, for large models, it is common to implement Low Rank Adaptation (LoRA), whereby a factorized parameterization of them is trained, to achieve a surprisingly beneficial accuracy-size trade-off. In this work, via a unified framework we rigorously establish trainability of such models under stochastic methods. We prove that for any mild regularization, the empirical regression loss on a attention layer and LoRA on a shallow neural net, both induce Poincaré inequality for the corresponding Gibbs' measure. Then it follows via invoking recent results that a certain SDE, which mimics the SGD, minimizes the corresponding losses. In both the cases, our first-of-its-kind results of trainability on attention and nets, do not rely on any assumptions on the data or the size of the architecture.

</details>


### [492] [Graph Representation Learning Augmented Model Manipulation on Federated Fine-Tuning of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07961)
*Hanlin Cai,Kai Li,Houtianfu Wang,Haofan Dong,Yichen Li,Falko Dressler,Ozgur B. Akan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AugMP策略，通过图表示学习和增广拉格朗日对偶优化，生成既有效又隐蔽的恶意模型更新，攻击联邦微调的LLM，显著降低全局及局部模型精度，并能逃避传统防御方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦微调（FFT）虽能保护隐私地协同微调大语言模型，但仍面临模型操控威胁——恶意参与者上传篡改的更新破坏聚合过程。现有防御方法存在漏洞，需要研究更强、更隐蔽的攻击策略以揭示FFT的安全隐患。

Method: 提出AugMP（Augmented Model Manipulation）策略，包含两个核心组件：1）图表示学习框架，捕捉良性LLM更新的特征相关性，指导恶意更新生成；2）基于增广拉格朗日对偶的迭代优化算法，在嵌入对抗目标的同时保持良性参数特性，实现攻击的有效性与隐蔽性平衡。

Result: 在多种LLM骨干网络上的实验表明，AugMP在所有基线中攻击性能最强：全局LLM准确率最高下降26%，局部LLM平均准确率最高下降22%。同时，AugMP在统计和几何特性上与良性更新保持高度一致，能成功逃避基于距离和相似度的传统防御方法。

Conclusion: AugMP策略揭示了FFT框架下LLM面临严峻的模型操控威胁，现有防御方法不足以应对此类精心设计的攻击，亟需开发更强的鲁棒聚合机制以保障联邦微调的安全性。

Abstract: Federated fine-tuning (FFT) has emerged as a privacy-preserving paradigm for collaboratively adapting large language models (LLMs). Built upon federated learning, FFT enables distributed agents to jointly refine a shared pretrained LLM by aggregating local LLM updates without sharing local raw data. However, FFT-based LLMs remain vulnerable to model manipulation threats, in which adversarial participants upload manipulated LLM updates that corrupt the aggregation process and degrade the performance of the global LLM. In this paper, we propose an Augmented Model maniPulation (AugMP) strategy against FFT-based LLMs. Specifically, we design a novel graph representation learning framework that captures feature correlations among benign LLM updates to guide the generation of malicious updates. To enhance manipulation effectiveness and stealthiness, we develop an iterative manipulation algorithm based on an augmented Lagrangian dual formulation. Through this formulation, malicious updates are optimized to embed adversarial objectives while preserving benign-like parameter characteristics. Experimental results across multiple LLM backbones demonstrate that the AugMP strategy achieves the strongest manipulation performance among all competing baselines, reducing the global LLM accuracy by up to 26% and degrading the average accuracy of local LLM agents by up to 22%. Meanwhile, AugMP maintains high statistical and geometric consistency with benign updates, enabling it to evade conventional distance- and similarity-based defense methods.

</details>


### [493] [It Just Takes Two: Scaling Amortized Inference to Large Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07972)
*Antoine Wehenkel,Michael Kagan,Lukas Heinrich,Chris Pollard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种解耦表示学习与后验建模的策略，通过训练最大规模为2的均值池化Deep Set编码器，使其泛化到任意集合大小，从而大幅降低神经后验估计在集合观测上的训练成本，且性能不降反升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在许多科学应用中，条件变量是观测集合，其元素不仅依赖于目标变量，还依赖于集合内共享的未知因素。最优推理需要联合处理集合，但传统方法要求训练时使用部署时的集合大小，导致计算和内存开销随N增长而剧增。

Method: 提出解耦策略：先训练一个均值池化Deep Set编码器（仅在大小≤2的集合上训练），使其能泛化到任意集合大小；然后在预聚合的嵌入上微调推理头，使训练成本与部署集合大小N基本无关。

Result: 在标量、图像、多视图3D、分子和高维条件生成等多个基准上，N可达数千，所提方法在匹配或超越标准基线性能的同时，计算开销大幅降低。

Conclusion: 该理论驱动的简单策略有效解决了神经后验估计在大规模集合场景下的可扩展性问题，为实际应用提供了高效方案。

Abstract: Neural posterior estimation has emerged as a powerful tool for amortized inference, with growing adoption across scientific and applied domains. In many of these applications, the conditioning variable is a set of observations whose elements depend not only on the target but also on unknown factors shared across the set. Optimal inference therefore requires treating the set jointly, which in turn requires training the estimator at the deployment set size -- a regime where memory and compute quickly become prohibitive. We introduce a simple, theoretically grounded strategy that decouples representation learning from posterior modeling. Our method trains a mean-pool Deep Set on sets of size at most two, producing an encoder that generalizes to arbitrary set sizes. The inference head is then finetuned on pre-aggregated embeddings, making training cost essentially independent of the deployment set size N. Across scalar, image, multi-view 3D, molecular, and high-dimensional conditional generation benchmarks with N in the thousands, our approach matches or outperforms standard baselines at a fraction of the compute.

</details>


### [494] [FLAM: Evaluating Model Performance with Aggregatable Measures in Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07962)
*Fabian Stricker,Jose A. Peregrina,David Bermbach,Christian Zirpins*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FLAM方法，通过聚合可测度量实现联邦学习中与集中式评估一致的性能评价，无需全局测试集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中分布式数据导致本地评估指标的聚合结果与集中式评估不一致，现有方法局限于准确率且不适用于其他指标，影响模型评估准确性。

Method: 提出FLAM方法，基于可聚合的度量指标设计评估方案，使得参与者本地计算后聚合得到的结果与集中式评估结果一致。

Result: FLAM方法能够在无需全局测试集的情况下，实现与集中式评估相同的结果，解决了聚合评估与集中评估不一致的问题。

Conclusion: FLAM有效解决了联邦学习中分布式性能评估的偏差问题，为FL提供更可靠的全局模型评估手段。

Abstract: Performance evaluation is essential for assessing the quality of machine learning (ML) models and guiding deployment decisions. In federated learning (FL), assessing the performance is challenging because data are distributed across participants. Consequently, the coordinator must rely on locally computed evaluation metrics and aggregate them to assess the global model. A key challenge is that common aggregation strategies, such as weighted averaging based on the local samples per participant, do not always produce the same results as centralized evaluation. Existing definitions of performance evaluation are largely tailored to accuracy and do not generalize to other metrics, leading to inconsistencies between participant-based and centralized evaluation. However, such discrepancies are inconsistent with the FL objective and lead to a wrong calculation of the metric.
  To address this issue, we examine the underlying reasons for these discrepancies and propose FLAM, a performance evaluation method based on aggregatable measures that yields the same results as centralized evaluation without the need for a global test dataset.

</details>


### [495] [Where's the Plan? Locating Latent Planning in Language Models with Lightweight Mechanistic Interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07984)
*Nicole Ma,Nick Rui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究了语言模型中规划站点形成（即前向传播中形成未来约束标记的内部表征及其因果驱动作用）。以押韵对句完成为测试任务，在三种模型家族十余种规模上使用线性探针和激活干预方法。发现未来押韵信息在线边界处可线性解码，但只有Gemma-3-27B因果依赖该编码，其他模型虽能解码但无因果作用。定位到五个注意力头实现了约90%的押韵路由能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言模型在前向传播过程中是否形成对未来结构性约束标记的内部表征，以及这种表征是否因果性地驱动生成过程。

Method: 使用线性探针（linear probing）检测未来押韵信息的可解码性，使用激活干预（activation patching）测试因果依赖关系，并在Qwen3、Gemma-3、Llama-3三个模型家族超过十种规模上进行实验。

Result: 1) 未来押韵信息在线边界处可线性解码，信号随模型规模增强；2) 仅Gemma-3-27B因果依赖此编码，因果驱动从押韵词迁移到线边界（约第30层）；3) 其他模型虽能解码但无因果作用；4) 通过两阶段路径干预定位到五个注意力头，可恢复约90%的押韵路由能力。

Conclusion: 语言模型中存在规划站点形成现象，但因果依赖关系因模型而异，仅在特定模型（Gemma-3-27B）中观察到明确的因果驱动迁移机制，且可精确定位到少量注意力头。

Abstract: We study planning site formation in language models -- where internal representations of structurally-constrained future tokens form during the forward pass, and whether they causally drive generation. Using rhyming-couplet completion as a clean test of forward-looking constraint, we apply two lightweight methods (linear probing and activation patching) across Qwen3, Gemma-3, and Llama-3 at more than ten scales. Probing shows that future-rhyme information is linearly decodable at the line boundary, with signal that strengthens with scale in all three families. Activation patching reveals that only Gemma-3-27B causally relies on this encoding, exhibiting a handoff in which the causal driver migrates from the rhyme word to the line boundary around layer 30. Every other model we test conditions on the rhyme word throughout generation, with near-zero causal effect at the line boundary despite strong probe signal. We localize the Gemma-3-27B handoff to five attention heads through two-stage path patching that recover ~90% of the rhyme-routing capacity at the newline.

</details>


### [496] [Aggregation in conformal e-classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07963)
*Vladimir Vovk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文实验研究了交叉共形e预测（一种聚合共形e预测器的方法）及其更简单灵活的改进版本，发现这些聚合方法能在保持有效性的同时平衡预测效率和计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共形预测器的聚合虽然能平衡预测效率与计算效率，但通常会牺牲有效性；而共形e预测器更容易在聚合时保持有效性，因此需要探索更优的聚合方法。

Method: 实验研究了交叉共形e预测这一现有聚合方法，并提出了概念上更简单、更灵活的改进版本，通过实验对比评估它们的性能。

Result: 交叉共形e预测及其改进版本能在保持有效性的前提下实现有效的聚合，改进版本在概念上更简单灵活且性能良好。

Conclusion: 共形e预测器的聚合比传统共形预测器更容易保持有效性，本文提出的改进聚合方法提供了更简单灵活的选择。

Abstract: Aggregating conformal predictors is a standard way of balancing their predictive and computational efficiency while retaining their validity, at least approximately. An important advantage of conformal e-predictors is that they are easier to aggregate without sacrificing their validity. This paper studies experimentally cross-conformal e-prediction, which is an existing method of aggregating conformal e-predictors, and its modifications that are conceptually simpler and more flexible.

</details>


### [497] [When Diffusion Model Can Ignore Dimension: An Entropy-Based Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07969)
*Ahmad Aghapour,Erhan Bayraktar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从信息论角度证明，扩散模型在高维数据（如图像）上的采样效率取决于数据分布的潜变量熵而非环境维度。对于高斯混合目标，离散化误差由潜变量熵控制，步复杂度与熵线性相关，与数据二阶矩仅对数相关。该结论也适用于离散目标分布，解释了扩散模型在自然图像等高维数据上的高效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型收敛理论无法解释为何仅用少量逆时步就能在高维数据上表现优异。许多KL散度保证将离散化误差与环境维度关联，而本文试图从信息论角度揭示其真正依赖于数据分布的潜变量熵，从而解释高维下的采样效率。

Method: 采用信息论视角，针对高斯混合目标分布分析扩散采样器的离散化误差，证明其由潜变量熵控制而非环境维度。分析还扩展到离散目标分布情形。

Result: 1) 高斯混合目标下，离散化误差由潜变量熵控制；2) 步复杂度与潜变量熵线性相关，与数据二阶矩对数相关；3) 离散目标分布下，复杂度取决于目标熵而非嵌入空间维度。

Conclusion: 当数据分布具有紧凑的潜变量表示（如自然图像）时，扩散采样在高维空间中能保持高效。这为理解扩散模型在高维数据上的成功提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Diffusion models perform remarkably well on high-dimensional data such as images, often using only a modest number of reverse-time steps. Despite this practical success, existing convergence theory does not fully explain why such samplers remain efficient in high dimensions. Many prior KL guarantees bound the discretization error in terms of the ambient dimension, while other improved results replace this dependence using intrinsic-dimensional or geometric structure assumptions. In this work, we develop an alternative information-theoretic perspective on diffusion sampler convergence. We prove that, for Gaussian mixture targets, the discretization error is controlled by the Shannon entropy of the latent mixture component rather than by the ambient dimension. Consequently, the leading step complexity scales linearly with latent entropy and depends only logarithmically on the second moment of the data. Our analysis also extends to discrete target distributions, where the relevant complexity is the entropy of the target rather than the dimension of the embedding space. These results suggest that diffusion sampling can remain efficient in high-dimensional spaces when the data distribution admits a compact latent representation, as is widely believed to be the case for natural images.

</details>


### [498] [Graph-Structured Hyperdimensional Computing for Data-Efficient and Explainable Process-Structure-Property Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07999)
*Jingzhan Ge,Ajeeth Vellore,Ajinkya Palwe,Ahsan Khan,David Gorsich,Matthew P. Castanier,SeungYeon Kang,Farhad Imani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PSP-HDC框架，利用图结构超维度计算编码过程-结构-属性关系图，在稀疏、异质、交互主导的数据环境下实现高精度3D微结构制造预测与可解释分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多光子光还原技术实现复杂3D微结构的高保真制造，但过程-结构-属性（PSP）预测面临数据稀疏、异质且交互主导的挑战，传统特征向量模型统计上欠定，易产生虚假相关、泛化差且解释不稳定，而机理模型依赖标定子模型在早期开发中难以获得。

Method: 提出PSP-HDC框架：1）将有向PSP图编码为内部先验；2）可训练的标量-超向量编码器在固定超维基上学习参数特定嵌入，适应异质尺度和噪声；3）沿有向PSP依赖进行图对齐的绑定与捆绑组合样本表示；4）通过联想记忆检索与类别原型进行预测；5）同一原型记忆支持决策和归因，提供参数、组、组内三级内在解释。

Result: 在3D平台的薄层电阻区间预测任务上，PSP-HDC在1000次随机划分下准确率0.910±0.077，过程折交叉泛化下0.896，优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: 图结构超维计算方法能有效处理稀疏异质交互主导的PSP预测问题，同时提供内在可解释性，为早期工艺开发中的可靠预测提供了新范式。

Abstract: Multiphoton photoreduction enables high-fidelity fabrication of complex 3D microstructures, yet reliable process-structure-property (PSP) prediction remains difficult because the available data are sparse, heterogeneous, and interaction-dominated. In this regime, conventional feature-vector models are statistically underdetermined, making them prone to spurious correlations, poor regime transfer, and unstable post hoc explanations, whereas mechanistic pipelines depend on calibrated submodels that are rarely available during early process development. We present PSP-HDC, a graph-structured hyperdimensional computing framework that encodes a directed PSP graph as an internal prior for representation, inference, and explanation. A trainable scalar-to-hypervector encoder learns parameter-specific embeddings on a fixed hyperdimensional basis to accommodate heterogeneous scales and noise. Sample representations are then composed through graph-aligned binding and bundling along directed PSP dependencies, and prediction is performed by associative-memory retrieval against class prototypes. Because the same prototype memories support both decision making and attribution, PSP-HDC provides intrinsic explanations at the parameter, group, and within-group levels, while memory alignment and separation quantify prototype formation during training. On sheet-resistance regime prediction for the 3D platform, PSP-HDC achieves an accuracy of 0.910 +/- 0.077 over 1000 random splits and 0.896 under process-fold generalization, outperforming strong baselines.

</details>


### [499] [Self-Play Enhancement via Advantage-Weighted Refinement in Online Federated LLM Fine-Tuning with Real-Time Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07977)
*Seohyun Lee,Wenzhi Fang,Dong-Jun Han,Seyyedali Hosseinalipour,Christopher G. Brinton*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPEAR是一种用于联邦LLM微调的高效在线学习算法，通过反馈引导的自我对弈循环构建对比对，无需昂贵的分组生成和真实标签背景，即可在资源受限设备上在线训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于反馈的自我改进系统局限于离线设置，且需要特权真实标签背景进行训练，同时缺乏对联邦学习场景的考虑，无法高效地在资源受限的边缘设备上利用大规模用户反馈进行在线训练。

Method: SPEAR利用反馈引导的自我对弈循环，为每个提示构建自然对比对，在正确完成上进行标准最大似然训练，同时在错误完成的尾部token上进行置信度加权的不似然训练。无需分组生成和真实标签背景，仅需部分非答案反馈即可在线训练。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验证明，SPEAR相比现有最先进基线方法具有更优越的性能。

Conclusion: SPEAR成功实现了高效、资源节约的联邦LLM在线微调，解决了现有方法在离线限制和真实标签依赖方面的局限性，为联邦学习中的反馈驱动自我改进提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Recent works have advanced feedback-based learning systems, whereby a foundation model is able to intake incoming feedback (e.g., a user) to self-improve, creating a self-loop system of training. However, existing works are limited in needing to consider an offline setup to allow for such feedback-based methods, and are further limited in the need of requiring privileged ground-truth contexts for training. Moreover, there is limited consideration of federated learning (FL), which is particularly well-suited for incorporating external feedback across large networks of end users, for example, but requires methods to be efficient for training on resource-constrained edge devices. Therefore, we introduce SPEAR (Self-Play Enhancement via Advantage-Weighted Refinement), an efficient online learning algorithm for federated LLM fine-tuning. SPEAR utilizes a feedback-guided self-play loop to construct naturally contrastive pairs per prompt which are utilized to be trained on (i) standard maximum likelihood on correct completions and (ii) confidence-weighted unlikelihood on tail tokens of incorrect completions. Without the need of expensive group generations and ground-truth contexts for training (i.e., only partial, non-answer feedback), in contrast with existing works, SPEAR can be trained both online and in a resource-efficient manner. We validate SPEAR across various benchmark datasets, demonstrating its superior performance in comparison to state-of-the-art baselines. The implementation code is publicly available at https://github.com/lee3296/SPEAR.

</details>


### [500] [Beyond Pairs: Your Language Model is Secretly Optimizing a Preference Graph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08037)
*Ning Liu,Chuanneng Sun,Kristina Klinkner,Shervin Malmasi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GraphDPO，将DPO从成对偏好扩展到有向无环图结构的偏好建模，利用多个回复之间的排序关系进行对齐，在推理和代码合成任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实训练数据中每个提示对应多个回复，存在丰富的偏好结构（如排序关系），而标准DPO仅处理成对比较，丢弃了传递性，引入冗余/冲突监督，导致优化不稳定。

Method: 提出GraphDPO，在由回复排序诱导的有向无环偏好图上操作，编码支配关系为边，优化基于Plackett-Luce的图结构目标函数；引入等价类构造处理离散/稀疏信号；支持插入真实解作为锚点并采用退火调度稳定训练。

Result: 在推理和程序合成任务上，GraphDPO优于标准DPO及列表式对齐方法，展示了图结构偏好建模的可扩展性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 图结构偏好建模是成对和列表式对齐目标的一种可扩展且鲁棒的替代方案，GraphDPO在保持线性复杂度的同时有效利用完整的偏好图结构。

Abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aligns language models using pairwise preference comparisons, offering a simple and effective alternative to Reinforcement Learning (RL) from human feedback. However, in many practical settings, training data consists of multiple rollouts per prompt, inducing rich preference structure that pairwise DPO fails to exploit. Collapsing such data into independent pairs discards transitivity, introduces redundant or conflicting supervision, and can lead to unstable optimization. We propose Graph Direct Preference Optimization (GraphDPO), a principled generalization of DPO that operates over directed acyclic preference graphs induced by rollout rankings. GraphDPO encodes dominance relations as edges and optimizes a graph-structured Plackett--Luce-inspired objective that aggregates supervision over graph neighborhoods, enforcing transitivity while recovering standard DPO as a special case. To handle discrete or sparse signals, we introduce an equivalence-class construction where responses with identical preferences form graph layers, and intra-layer edges contribute zero loss, preventing spurious gradients. Despite leveraging full graph structure, GraphDPO maintains linear per-prompt complexity via efficient log-sum-exp aggregation. We further incorporate optional ground-truth anchoring by inserting verified solutions as dominant nodes and applying an annealed schedule that stabilizes early training while gradually relaxing oracle supervision. Experiments on reasoning and program synthesis tasks demonstrate superior performance, suggesting that graph-structured preference modeling is a scalable and robust alternative to pairwise and listwise alignment objectives.

</details>


### [501] [Susceptibilities and Patterning: A Primer on Linear Response in Bayesian Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07980)
*Chris Elliott,Daniel Murfet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文介绍了基于统计力学中 susceptibility（敏感性）理论的神经网络解释方法，将后验期望对数据扰动的导数定义为敏感性，并通过涨落-耗散定理将其等价于后验协方差。不同观测量的选择可导出影响矩阵和结构敏感性矩阵，后者是数据分布到结构坐标映射的雅可比矩阵（乘以因子 nβ），其伪逆可为模式匹配问题提供线性化解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在为神经网络的可解释性建立一套严谨的统计力学理论基础，通过 susceptibility 理论统一已有的影响函数和结构分析等方法，并为寻找实现特定结构变化的数据扰动（模式匹配问题）提供线性化求解方案。

Method: 将观测量的后验期望对数据扰动的导数定义为 susceptibility，利用涨落-耗散定理将其表示为后验协方差。通过选择不同观测量（如逐样本损失、组件局部化观测量）导出影响矩阵和结构敏感性矩阵。结构敏感性矩阵本质上是数据分布到结构坐标映射的雅可比矩阵（乘以 nβ），其伪逆用于求解模式匹配问题。

Result: 建立了 susceptibility 的严格定义及其与后验协方差的等价关系；导出了影响矩阵（贝叶斯影响函数）和结构敏感性矩阵；证明了结构敏感性矩阵是数据分布到结构坐标映射的带因子雅可比矩阵；提供了 susceptibility 的经验估计方法及其与损失景观几何的联系。

Conclusion: Susceptibility 理论为神经网络可解释性提供了统计力学框架，统一了影响函数和结构分析，并给出了模式匹配问题的线性化解。理论与损失景观几何的联系为进一步理解神经网络行为提供了新视角。

Abstract: These notes introduce the theory of susceptibilities as developed in [arXiv:2504.18274, arXiv:2601.12703] for interpreting neural networks. The susceptibility of an observable $φ$ to a data perturbation is defined as a derivative of a posterior expectation, which by the fluctuation--dissipation theorem equals a posterior covariance. Different choices of $φ$ yield different objects: per-sample losses give the influence matrix (the Bayesian influence function of [arXiv:2509.26544]), while component-localized observables give the structural susceptibility matrix that pairs model components with data patterns. The susceptibility matrix is (up to a factor of $nβ$) the Jacobian of the map from data distributions to structural coordinates; its pseudo-inverse provides a linearized solution to the patterning problem of [arXiv:2601.13548]: finding data perturbations that produce a desired structural change. We motivate the theory from its statistical-mechanical foundations, then give a detailed exposition of susceptibilities, their empirical estimators, and their connection to the geometry of the loss landscape.

</details>


### [502] [Bayesian Sensitivity of Causal Inference Estimators under Evidence-Based Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07993)
*Nikita Dhawan,Daniel Shen,Leonardo Cotta,Chris J. Maddison*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出贝叶斯敏感性值（BSV）框架，通过结合先验知识计算期望敏感性，克服传统最坏情况敏感性分析过于悲观且可能与先验知识矛盾的问题，并在糖尿病治疗对体重影响的观察性研究中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有敏感性分析框架（如s-value）通常关注最坏情况下的假设变化，但这类悲观标准往往导致结论失去信息量，甚至与关于真实世界的先验知识相矛盾。作者旨在解决这一问题，提出更符合实际认知的敏感性分析方法。

Method: 1) 推广s-value框架，将其应用于因果推断中三种常见假设的敏感性评估；2) 提出贝叶斯敏感性值（BSV），基于现实证据构造先验分布，计算估计量对假设违背的期望敏感性；3) 采用蒙特卡洛近似来估计BSV。

Result: 实证发现最坏情况的敏感性结论确实可能依赖于不现实的数据生成过程变化；BSV框架在糖尿病治疗对体重影响的观察性研究中展示了良好的适用性。

Conclusion: 贝叶斯敏感性值（BSV）通过融入先验知识，提供了比传统最坏情况分析更合理、信息量更丰富的敏感性评估方法，有助于在更符合现实的假设下评估因果推断的稳健性。

Abstract: Causal inference, especially in observational studies, relies on untestable assumptions about the true data-generating process. Sensitivity analysis helps us determine how robust our conclusions are when we alter these underlying assumptions. Existing frameworks for sensitivity analysis are concerned with worst-case changes in assumptions. In this work, we argue that using such pessimistic criteria can often become uninformative or lead to conclusions contradicting our prior knowledge about the world. To demonstrate this claim, we generalize the recent s-value framework (Gupta & Rothenhäusler, 2023) to estimate the sensitivity of three different common assumptions in causal inference. Empirically, we find that, indeed, worst-case conclusions about sensitivity can rely on unrealistic changes in the data-generating process. To overcome this, we extend the s-value framework with a new sensitivity analysis criterion: Bayesian Sensitivity Value (BSV), which computes the expected sensitivity of an estimate to assumption violations under priors constructed from real-world evidence. We use Monte Carlo approximations to estimate this quantity and illustrate its applicability in an observational study on the effect of diabetes treatments on weight loss.

</details>


### [503] [STEPS: A Temporal Smooth Error Propagation Solver on the Manifolds for Test-Time Adaptation in Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08005)
*Jiaqi Liu,Yifan Ouyang,Zhifei Song,Sim Kuan Goh,Ashwaq Qasem*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STEPS是一种用于时间序列预测中测试时自适应（TTA）的新方法，通过将TTA重新表述为时间流形上的Dirichlet边界值问题，利用局部和全局求解器以及时空流形融合来生成平滑、稳定的预测校正，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测的测试时自适应方法面临弱可辨识性、误差累积和在稀疏或噪声前缀下的长程预测不稳定等问题，亟需更鲁棒的解决方案。

Method: 将TTA重新表述为时间流形上的Dirichlet边界值问题，以观测到的前缀误差作为未来未知误差场的边界条件；通过局部求解器在时间平滑性约束下传播前缀误差，全局求解器检索稳定的跨窗口误差记忆，最后通过时空流形融合（SMF）将两者整合为最终校正。

Result: 在6个标准基准和4个冻结骨干网络上，相比零样本基线平均降低MSE 26.82%，超过最强TTA基线12.77%；在稀疏前缀和噪声污染测试中验证了鲁棒性。

Conclusion: STEPS通过将误差校正建模为时间流形上的边界值问题，有效解决了TTA中的误差累积和不稳定问题，在多种设置下均表现出色且鲁棒。

Abstract: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) aims to improve time series forecasting under distribution shifts by using limited observations revealed during inference. However, forecasting TTA must operate in a source-free online setting, where the adaptation signal is short, temporally correlated, and potentially noisy. Existing methods can therefore suffer from weak identifiability, error accumulation, and unstable long-horizon corrections when the revealed prefix is sparse or contaminated. To address these issues, we propose STEPS, a Smooth Temporal Error Propagation Solver for TTA in time-series forecasting. STEPS reformulates forecasting TTA as a Dirichlet Boundary Value Problem on a temporal manifold, where the revealed prefix error serves as the boundary condition for the unknown future error field. Then, STEPS solves a smooth and bounded correction field in prediction space: a Local Solver propagates prefix errors under temporal smoothness, a Global Solver retrieves stable cross-window error memory and Spatiotemporal Manifold Fusion (SMF) integrates both solutions into the final correction. Across six standard benchmarks and four frozen backbones, STEPS achieves an average relative MSE reduction of 26.82% over the zero-shot backbone, exceeding the strongest compared TTA baseline by 12.77%. Additional sparse prefix and contamination tests confirm the robustness of STEPS under limited and noisy prefixes.

</details>


### [504] [Interpreting Reinforcement Learning Agents with Susceptibilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08007)
*Chris Elliott,Einar Urdshals,David Quarel,Daniel Murfet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将磁化率（susceptibilities）从神经网络可解释性扩展到深度强化学习遗憾（regret）设置中的方法，通过在简单网格世界模型中验证，证明该方法能够揭示模型在参数空间中无法通过纯策略学习检测到的内部发展特征，并通过激活引导进行验证，讨论了向RLHF后训练的扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的神经网络可解释性方法在深度强化学习中的应用有限，尤其是缺乏能够揭示模型在参数空间中内部发展阶段特征的工具。作者希望将磁化率这一概念推广到强化学习的遗憾设置中，以更深入地理解模型的学习过程。

Method: 作者将磁化率（研究后验期望值对损失扰动的响应）从监督学习推广到深度强化学习的遗憾设置中，在一个简单的gridworld模型上验证该方法，该模型展现出非平凡的分阶段发展特征，最后通过激活引导（activation-steering）进行结果验证。

Result: 磁化率能够揭示模型在参数空间中内部发展的特征，这些特征无法通过仅研究学习到的策略来检测到。该方法在gridworld上得到了验证。

Conclusion: 磁化率是一种有效的深度强化学习内部可解释性方法，能够发现策略层面不可见的模型发展阶段特征，并具有向RLHF后训练扩展的潜力。

Abstract: Susceptibilities are a technique for neural network interpretability that studies the response of posterior expectation values of observables to perturbations of the loss. We generalize this construction to the setting of the regret in deep reinforcement learning and investigate the utility of susceptibilities in a simple gridworld model that nevertheless exhibits non-trivial stagewise development. We argue that susceptibilities reveal internal features of the development of the model in parameter space that one cannot detect purely by studying the development of the learned policy. We validate these results with activation-steering, and discuss the framework's extension to RLHF post-training.

</details>


### [505] [Adaptive Domain Decomposition Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Traffic State Estimation with Sparse Sensor Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08028)
*Eunhan Ka,Ludovic Leclercq,Satish V. Ukkusuri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出自适应域分解物理信息神经网络（ADD-PINN），利用残差引导的空间分解解决PINN在LWR交通流估计中过度平滑激波的问题，在I-24 MOTION和NGSIM数据集上验证了其有效性和效率优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINN在基于LWR模型从稀疏固定传感器估计交通状态时，会过度平滑激波（shockwaves），导致对交通流中不连续过渡区域的刻画不准确。

Method: 两阶段残差引导框架：1）粗训练全局PINN；2）基于空间残差分布放置子域边界并初始化子网络；同时引入数据驱动激波指示器，在过渡证据不足时保持单域回退。

Result: 在25个配置中18个取得最低相对L2误差，15个稀疏传感场景中14个最优；训练速度比XPINN基线快2.4倍；NGSIM实验中激波指示器正确抑制分解，单域方案排名第一。

Conclusion: 残差引导的空间分解是PINN类模型在处理稀疏固定传感器与局部过渡区域共存场景下的有效设计策略。

Abstract: Traffic state estimation from sparse fixed sensors is challenging because physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) tend to over-smooth the shockwaves admitted by the Lighthill-Whitham-Richards (LWR) model. This study proposes Adaptive Domain Decomposition Physics-Informed Neural Networks (ADD-PINN), a two-stage residual-guided framework for LWR-based offline speed-field reconstruction. A coarse global PINN is first trained; its spatial residual profile is then used to place subdomain boundaries and initialize child subnetworks in a decomposition-enabled mode, while a data-driven shock indicator can retain a single-domain fallback when localized evidence of transition is weak. The primary offline I-24 MOTION evaluation spans five days, five sensor configurations, and ten seeds per configuration, yielding 1,500 runs in total. Against neural and physics-informed baselines, ADD-PINN attains the lowest relative L2 error in 18 of 25 configurations and in 14 of 15 sparse-sensing cases, while training 2.4 times faster than the extended PINN (XPINN) baseline. An ablation study supports spatial-only decomposition as an effective default for fixed-sensor traffic reconstruction in the evaluated settings. Supplementary Next Generation Simulation (NGSIM) experiments serve as a negative control: the shock indicator suppresses decomposition in all 50 runs, and the default single-domain fallback ranks first across all sensor configurations. These results support residual-guided spatial decomposition as an effective PINN-family design for offline reconstruction when sparse fixed sensing coincides with localized transition regions.

</details>


### [506] [Don't Get Your Kroneckers in a Twist: Gaussian Processes on High-Dimensional Incomplete Grids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08036)
*Mads Greisen Højlund,August Smart Lykke-Møller,Henry Moss,Ove Christiansen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CUTS-GPR 是一种新型的高斯过程回归方法，通过结合加性核与不完整网格实现极快的核矩阵-向量乘积，支持数十亿数据点和数千维度的计算，并在化学势能面建模中取得成功。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统高斯过程回归在高维场景下计算复杂度高（O(N³)），难以处理大量训练数据和高维特征，阻碍了其在计算化学等领域的应用。

Method: 将加性核与不完整网格相结合，利用核矩阵的结构特性实现近似线性（随N）和低阶多项式（随D）的矩阵-向量乘积计算。

Result: 支持数十亿数据点和数千维度的基准测试；在N=447,265、D=24时，数小时内完成完整GPR计算（含超参数优化）。

Conclusion: CUTS-GPR 使得高维势能面的贝叶斯建模成为可能，解决了计算化学领域的长期挑战。

Abstract: We introduce CUTS-GPR, a new method for performing numerically exact Gaussian process regression (GPR) in high-dimensional settings. The key component of CUTS-GPR is an extremely fast kernel matrix-vector product, which exhibits near-linear or even linear scaling with the amount of training data, $N$, and low-order polynomial scaling with dimensionality, $D$. This is obtained by combining an additive kernel with an incomplete grid and exploiting the resulting structure of the kernel matrix. We demonstrate the scalability of the matrix-vector product by running benchmarks with billions of data points and thousands of dimensions. Full GPR calculations, including hyperparameter optimization, are completed in a matter of hours for $N = 447 265$ and $D = 24$. We demonstrate that our CUTS-GPR enables Bayesian modeling of high-dimensional potential energy surfaces - a longstanding challenge in computational chemistry.

</details>


### [507] [Reinforcement Learning for Exponential Utility: Algorithms and Convergence in Discounted MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08053)
*Gugan Thoppe,L. A. Prashanth,Ankur Naskar,Sanjay Bhat*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对折扣MDP中指数效用优化的RL问题，提出了两种基于Q值的无模型算法（双时间尺度Q学习和单时间尺度幂律算子算法），证明了收敛性并提供了有限时间收敛率分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 折扣MDP中指数效用优化的强化学习缺乏原则性的基于值函数算法，该研究致力于填补这一空白。

Method: 基于Porteus提出的指数效用Bellman方程，推导两种Q值扩展形式并证明算子收缩性；提出双时间尺度Q学习算法（证明几乎必然收敛和有限时间收敛率）和单时间尺度幂律算子算法（利用局部Lipschitz性、单调性、齐次性和Dini导数证明收敛）。

Result: 证明了两种Q值算子的不动点特性及诱导的贪心平稳策略在指数效用目标下的最优性；双时间尺度算法有几乎必然收敛和收敛率保证；单时间尺度算法在标量情形下提供了有限时间分析。

Conclusion: 该工作为指数效用目标下的基于值函数的强化学习奠定了理论基础。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) for exponential-utility optimization in discounted Markov decision processes (MDPs) lacks principled value-based algorithms. We address this gap in the fixed risk-aversion setting. Building on the Bellman-type equation for exponential utility studied in \cite{porteus1975optimality}, we derive two Q-value-style extensions and show that the associated operators are contractions in the $L_\infty$ and sup-log/Thompson metrics, respectively. We characterize their fixed points and prove that the induced greedy stationary policy is optimal for the exponential-utility objective among stationary policies. These structural results lead to two model-free algorithms: a two-timescale Q-learning--style algorithm, for which we establish almost-sure convergence and provide finite-time convergence rates via timescale separation, and a one-timescale algorithm governed by a sublinear power-law operator. Since the latter does not admit a global contraction in standard metrics, we prove its convergence using delicate arguments based on local Lipschitzness, monotonicity, homogeneity, and Dini derivatives, and provide a scalar finite-time analysis that highlights the challenges in obtaining convergence rates in the vector case. Our work provides a foundation for value-based RL under exponential-utility objectives.

</details>


### [508] [GRAPHLCP: Structure-Aware Localized Conformal Prediction on Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08074)
*Peyman Baghershahi,Fangxin Wang,Debmalya Mandal,Sourav Medya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GRAPHLCP框架，通过特征感知稠密化和个性化PageRank核计算，将图拓扑结构显式融入局部化CP过程，在保证边际覆盖的同时提升条件覆盖效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于嵌入空间近似的CP方法在图数据上不可靠，预测集效率低，未能充分利用图拓扑结构和节点间依赖关系。

Method: (1) 特征感知稠密化缓解稀疏图的局部性偏差；(2) 基于个性化PageRank的核计算建模结构邻近性；(3) 拓扑依赖的锚点采样与校准加权，捕获局部和远程依赖。

Result: 在多个回归和分类数据集上，GRAPHLCP在有限样本下保证了边际覆盖，并在多种条件场景下获得了良好的测试条件覆盖。

Conclusion: 显式融入图拓扑的局部化CP方法比仅依赖嵌入空间近似的现有方法更有效，为GNN的不确定性量化提供了更可靠的框架。

Abstract: Conformal prediction (CP) provides a distribution-free approach to uncertainty quantification with finite-sample guarantees. However, applying CP to graph neural networks (GNNs) remains challenging as the combinatorial nature of graphs often leads to insufficiently certain predictions and indiscriminative embeddings. Existing methods primarily rely on embedding-space proximity for localization, which can be unreliable for graphs and yield inefficient prediction sets. We propose GRAPHLCP, a proximity-based localized CP framework that explicitly incorporates graph topology and inter-node dependencies into localization and weighting. Our approach introduces a feature-aware densification step to mitigate locality bias in sparse graphs, followed by a Personalized PageRank-based kernel computation to model structural proximity. This enables topology-dependent anchor sampling and calibration weighting that captures both local and long-range dependencies. Extensive experiments on several regression and classification datasets demonstrate that GRAPHLCP guarantees marginal coverage with finite samples while efficiently attaining favorable test conditional coverage across various conditioning scenarios.

</details>


### [509] [Zero-Shot Imagined Speech Decoding via Imagined-to-Listened MEG Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08075)
*Maryam Maghsoudi,Shihab Shamma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种利用聆听时丰富标注的MEG数据来辅助解码想象语音的三阶段方法。通过训练音乐家被试进行节奏性旋律和口语刺激的听与想象任务，先用映射模型将想象MEG映射到聆听MEG，再用对比学习词解码器解码，最终在留出被试上证明了想象单词可显著高于随机水平解码，且性能随数据量提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 想象语音的非侵入性脑信号解码极具挑战，因为想象数据集稀缺且难以在跨被试、跨session间进行时间对齐。本文旨在利用聆听状态下更丰富、标注更可靠的神经记录来克服这一困难。

Method: 1) 收集音乐家被试在聆听和想象节奏性旋律与口语刺激时的配对MEG数据；2) 三阶段解码流程：第一阶段训练6种线性/神经网络模型将想象MEG映射到聆听MEG；第二阶段在聆听MEG上训练对比词解码器（使用语义、声学、音素四种嵌入策略）；第三阶段对留出被试的想象MEG进行映射后送入聆听解码器解码。

Result: 基于排序分析，想象单词的解码性能显著高于随机基线；所有评估均在留出被试上进行；性能随训练数据量增加而提升。

Conclusion: 该方法具有可扩展性，可直接应用于现实脑机接口场景，为想象语音解码提供了一条利用聆听数据增强性能的有效途径。

Abstract: Decoding imagined speech from non-invasive brain recordings is challenging because imagined datasets are scarce and difficult to align temporally across subjects and sessions In this work, we propose a new approach to the decoding of imagined speech that leverages the richer and more reliably labeled recordings during listening to speech. We collected paired listened and imagined MEG recordings to rhythmic melodic and spoken stimuli from trained musicians. Using trained musicians helped improve temporal alignment across conditions. We then developed a three-stage decoding pipeline that revealed consistent and meaningful relationships between neural activity evoked by imagining and listening to the same stimuli. First, we trained six linear and neural models to map imagined MEG responses to listened responses. We evaluated these models against a null baseline from unseen subjects to validate that the predicted-listening responses preserve stimulus-specific information. In the second stage, we trained a contrastive word decoder exclusively on the listened MEG responses, and evaluated it using four embedding strategies including semantic, acoustic, and phonetic representations. In the third stage, we process the imagined MEG responses from held-out subjects through the mapping pipeline to compute the corresponding listening responses that are then decoded by the listened decoder. Using rank-based analysis, we show that the imagined words are decodable significantly above chance. We shall report here the results of a proof-of-concept implementation to decode imagined speech, where all evaluations are performed on held-out subjects. We also demonstrate that performance improves with training data size, suggesting that this approach is scalable and can directly be made applicable to realistic brain-computer interface scenarios.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [510] [GraphDC: A Divide-and-Conquer Multi-Agent System for Scalable Graph Algorithm Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06671)
*Wenjin Li,Jiaming Cui*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出GraphDC，一个基于分治策略的多智能体框架，将大图分解为子图由专门智能体处理，再通过主智能体整合结果，以提升LLM在图算法推理任务上的表现，尤其在大规模图上效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在图算法任务上表现不佳，因为图结构复杂、拓扑多样，且需要系统性的多步推理，尤其在大图上推理困难。

Method: 采用分治策略：将输入图分解为多个小子图，每个子图分配给一个专门的智能体进行局部推理，再通过一个主智能体整合局部结果与子图间的全局信息，最终得出完整解。

Result: 实验表明，GraphDC在多种图算法推理任务和不同规模上始终优于现有方法，尤其在大图实例上改进更为明显。

Conclusion: 分治多智能体框架能有效降低单个LLM的推理负担，缓解计算瓶颈，提升图算法推理的鲁棒性和可扩展性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong potential for many mathematical problems. However, their performance on graph algorithmic tasks is still unsatisfying, since graphs are naturally more complex in topology and often require systematic multi-step reasoning, especially on larger graphs. Motivated by this gap, we propose GraphDC, a Divide-and-Conquer multi-agent framework for scalable graph algorithm reasoning. Specifically, inspired by Divide-and-Conquer design, GraphDC decomposes an input graph into smaller subgraphs, assigns each subgraph to a specialized agent for local reasoning, and uses a master agent to integrate the local outputs with inter-subgraph information to produce the final solution. This hierarchical design reduces the reasoning burden on individual agents, alleviates computational bottlenecks, and improves robustness on large graph instances. Extensive experiments show that GraphDC consistently outperforms existing methods on graph algorithm reasoning across diverse tasks and scales, especially on larger instances where direct end-to-end reasoning is less reliable.

</details>


### [511] [More Thinking, More Bias: Length-Driven Position Bias in Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06672)
*Xiao Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现，在推理模型中，位置偏差（position bias）会随着推理轨迹长度的增加而累积，而非通过仔细推理得到缓解。尽管DeepSeek-R1（671B）的总体偏差很小，但长推理序列中仍存在偏差。截断干预实验提供了因果证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"推理模型通过仔细思考减少启发式偏差"的常见假设，具体检验推理模型在多选题中的位置偏差是否真的被缓解。

Method: 在13种推理配置（包括R1蒸馏模型、基模型+CoT提示、DeepSeek-R1 671B）上，用MMLU、ARC-Challenge、GPQA等数据集，通过部分相关性分析、长度分位数分析、截断干预实验等方法，测量推理轨迹长度与位置偏差分数（PBS）的关系。

Result: 12种配置中推理轨迹长度与PBS呈正相关（0.11-0.41，p<0.05）；截断干预使模型更倾向于选位置偏好选项（16%→32%）；671B模型总体PBS仅0.019，但最长分位数中升至0.071；直接答案的位置偏差与轨迹长度无关。

Conclusion: 推理模型不应被默认视为对选项顺序鲁棒；长推理会累积而非消除位置偏差；提供了PBS等审计工具包用于评估推理模型的位置偏差。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning and reasoning-tuned models such as DeepSeek-R1 are commonly assumed to reduce shallow heuristic biases by thinking carefully. We test this on position bias in multiple-choice QA and find a different story: within any reasoning-capable model, per-question position bias scales with the length of the reasoning trajectory.
  Across thirteen reasoning-mode configurations (two R1-distilled 7-8B models, two base models prompted with CoT, and DeepSeek-R1 at 671B) on MMLU, ARC-Challenge, and GPQA, twelve show a positive partial correlation between trajectory length and Position Bias Score (PBS) after controlling for accuracy, ranging from 0.11 to 0.41 (all p < 0.05). All twelve open-weight reasoning-mode configurations show monotonically increasing PBS across length quartiles. A truncation intervention provides causal evidence: continuations resumed from later points in the trajectory are increasingly likely to shift toward position-preferred options (16% to 32% for R1-Qwen-7B across absolute-position buckets).
  At 671B, aggregate PBS collapses to 0.019, but the length effect still manifests in the longest quartile (PBS = 0.071), suggesting that accuracy gates the expression of length-driven bias rather than eliminating the underlying mechanism. We additionally find that direct-answer position bias is a distinct phenomenon with a different footprint (strong in Llama-Instruct-direct, weak in Qwen-Instruct-direct, and uncorrelated with trajectory length): CoT reasoning replaces this baseline bias with length-accumulated bias.
  Our results argue that reasoning-capable models should not be treated as order-robust by default in MCQ evaluation pipelines, and offer a diagnostic toolkit (PBS, commitment change point, effective switching, truncation probes) for auditing position bias in reasoning models.

</details>


### [512] [Fast and Effective Redistricting Optimization via Composite-Move Tabu Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06682)
*Hai Jin,Diansheng Guo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种复合移动禁忌搜索（CM-Tabu）方法，通过识别可整体移动或交换的最小单元集合，在保持地理连续性的同时扩大可行邻域空间，显著提升了选区重划问题的求解质量和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 选区重划中的连通性约束使得传统禁忌搜索的可行邻域空间严重缩小，弱化探索能力，容易陷入局部最优。现有整数规划或启发式搜索方法难以兼顾高质量解、快速求解和多目标灵活性。

Method: 提出CM-Tabu方法：当单个边界单元的移动会破坏其所在选区的连通性时，通过分析每个选区的连通图（利用割点和双连通分量），在线性时间内生成可整体移动的最小单元集合或可交换的单元对（或单元集合），构成保持连通性的复合移动。

Result: 大量实验表明，CM-Tabu在解质量、运行间鲁棒性和计算效率上均显著优于传统禁忌搜索及其他基线方法。在费城案例中，能稳定达到人口均衡的理论全局最优，并支持多目标权衡。

Conclusion: CM-Tabu提供了适合实际应用和决策支持工作流的优化性能，有效解决了选区重划中连通性约束带来的搜索困难。

Abstract: Spatial redistricting is a practical combinatorial optimization problem that demands high-quality solutions, rapid turnaround, and flexibility to accommodate multi-criteria objectives and interactive refinement. A central challenge is the contiguity constraint: enforcing contiguity in integer-programming or heuristic search can severely shrink the feasible neighborhood, weaken exploration, and trap the search in poor local optima. We introduce a composite-move Tabu search (CM-Tabu) that systematically expands the feasible neighborhood space in Tabu search while preserving contiguity. When a boundary unit cannot be reassigned individually without disconnecting its district, our method identifies a minimal set of units that can move together, or a pair of units (or sets of units) that can be switched, as a contiguity-preserving composite move. Candidate single-unit and composite moves are generated in linear time by analyzing each district's contiguity graph using articulation points and biconnected components. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach substantially improves solution quality, run-to-run robustness, and computational efficiency relative to traditional Tabu search and other baselines. For example, in the Philadelphia case, the approach can consistently attain the theoretical global optimum in population-equality and support multi-criteria trade-offs. CM-Tabu delivers optimization performance suitable for real-world practices and decision-support workflows.

</details>


### [513] [State Representation and Termination for Recursive Reasoning Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06690)
*Debashis Guha,Amritendu Mukherjee,Sanjay Kukreja,Tarun Kumar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出用认知状态图表示递归推理系统的推理状态，并利用顺序间隙（order-gap）作为迭代停止条件，给出了该条件在不动点附近非退化的充要条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有递归推理系统通常隐式地处理推理状态的表示和迭代停止条件，本文旨在明确这两点，提供形式化框架。

Method: 提出认知状态图（epistemic state graph）表示推理状态，定义顺序间隙（order-gap）度量两种展开-整合顺序的差异，并推导其非退化的充要条件。

Result: 给出了线性化顺序间隙在不动点附近非退化的充要条件，表明该停止准则具有信息性而非代数平凡性。但该结果是局部条件，而非全局收敛保证。

Conclusion: 该框架可应用于递归推理系统、智能体循环、思维树推理、定理证明和持续学习等多个领域。

Abstract: Recursive reasoning systems alternate between acquiring new evidence and refining an accumulated understanding. Two design choices are typically left implicit: how to represent the evolving reasoning state, and when to stop iterating. This paper addresses both. We represent the reasoning state as an epistemic state graph encoding extracted claims, evidential relations, open questions, and confidence weights. We define the order-gap as the distance between the states reached by expand-then-consolidate versus consolidate-then-expand; a small order-gap suggests that the two orderings agree and further iteration is unlikely to help. Our main result gives a necessary and sufficient condition for the linearised order-gap to be non-degenerate near the fixed point, showing when the criterion is informative rather than algebraically vacuous. This is a local condition, not a global convergence guarantee. We apply the framework to recursive reasoning systems and sketch its application to agent loops, tree-of-thought reasoning, theorem proving, and continual learning.

</details>


### [514] [Hidden Coalitions in Multi-Agent AI: A Spectral Diagnostic from Internal Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06696)
*Cameron Berg,Susan L. Schneider,Mark M. Bailey*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种通过分析多智能体系统内部神经表征的互信息图、并运用谱分割方法检测智能体联盟结构的方法，在两个领域中验证了其有效性，为监测分布式AI系统中的涌现结构提供了可扩展的诊断工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仅通过观察智能体行为往往不足以区分真正的信息耦合与虚假相似性，有意义的联盟可能在行为变化之前就已在内部表征层面形成，这对于AI安全和对齐至关重要。

Method: 从智能体隐藏状态构建成对互信息图，并应用谱分割（spectral partitioning）识别最显著的联盟边界。

Result: 在多智能体强化学习中成功恢复了预设的层级和动态联盟结构，并正确排除了行为协调但无信息耦合的假阳性；在大型语言模型中识别了描述性提示隐含的联盟结构，追踪了动态团队重组，并揭示了标签主导冲突交互模式的表征层级。

Conclusion: 通过谱分割分析隐藏状态互信息，为识别表征层面的联盟提供了可扩展的诊断方法，是监测分布式AI系统中涌现结构的有力工具。

Abstract: Collections of interacting AI agents can form coalitions, creating emergent group-level organization that is critical for AI safety and alignment. However, observing agent behavior alone is often insufficient to distinguish genuine informational coupling from spurious similarity, as consequential coalitions may form at the level of internal representations before any overt behavioral change is apparent. Here, we introduce a practical method for detecting coalition structure from the internal neural representations of multi-agent systems. The approach constructs a pairwise mutual-information graph from the hidden states of agents and applies spectral partitioning to identify the most salient coalition boundary.
  We validate this method in two domains. First, in multi-agent reinforcement learning environments, the method successfully recovers programmed hierarchical and dynamic coalition structures and correctly rejects false positives arising from behavioral coordination without informational coupling. Second, using a large language model, the method identifies coalition structures implied by descriptive prompts, tracks dynamic team reassignments, and reveals a representational hierarchy where explicit labels dominate over conflicting interaction patterns. Across both settings, the recovered partition reveals subgroup organization that a scalar cross-agent mutual-information measure cannot distinguish. The results demonstrate that analyzing hidden-state mutual information through spectral partitioning provides a scalable diagnostic for identifying representational coalitions, offering a valuable tool for monitoring emergent structure in distributed AI systems.

</details>


### [515] [CASCADE: Case-Based Continual Adaptation for Large Language Models During Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06702)
*Siyuan Guo,Yali Du,Hechang Chen,Yi Chang,Jun Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出CASCADE框架，通过在部署阶段引入显式演化情景记忆，使LLM代理无需修改参数即可从经验中持续学习，在16个多样化任务上平均成功率达20.9%的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM生命周期存在训练与部署的严格分离，部署后学习停止，这与自然界智能的持续适应能力相悖，限制了大模型在实际应用中的持续改进能力。

Method: 提出CASCADE框架，将部署时学习（DTL）形式化为LLM生命周期的第三阶段，通过显式演化情景记忆机制，将经验复用建模为上下文赌博机问题，实现探索-利用权衡并保证无遗憾理论界限。

Result: 在涵盖医学诊断、法律分析、代码生成、网页搜索、工具使用和具身交互的16个任务上，相比零样本提示提升20.9%的宏平均成功，持续优于梯度基和记忆基方法。

Conclusion: 将部署重新定义为自适应学习过程，为持续改进的AI系统奠定了理论基础，证明了无需修改参数即可实现部署阶段持续学习的技术可行性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become a central foundation of modern artificial intelligence, yet their lifecycle remains constrained by a rigid separation between training and deployment, after which learning effectively ceases. This limitation contrasts with natural intelligence, which continually adapts through interaction with its environment. In this paper, we formalise deployment-time learning (DTL) as the third stage in the LLM lifecycle that enables LLM agents to improve from experience during deployment without modifying model parameters. We present CASCADE (CASe-based Continual Adaptation during DEployment), a general and principled framework that equips LLM agents with an explicit, evolving episodic memory. CASCADE formulates experience reuse as a contextual bandit problem, enabling principled exploration-exploitation trade-offs and establishing no-regret guarantees over long-term interactions. This design allows agents to accumulate, select, and refine task-relevant cases, transforming past experience into actionable knowledge. Across 16 diverse tasks spanning medical diagnosis, legal analysis, code generation, web search, tool use, and embodied interaction, CASCADE improves macro-averaged success rate by 20.9% over zero-shot prompting while consistently outperforming gradient-based and memory-based baselines. By reframing deployment as an adaptive learning process, this work establishes a foundation for continually improving AI systems.

</details>


### [516] [From Storage to Experience: A Survey on the Evolution of LLM Agent Memory Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06716)
*Jinghao Luo,Yuchen Tian,Chuxue Cao,Ziyang Luo,Hongzhan Lin,Kaixin Li,Chuyi Kong,Ruichao Yang,Jing Ma*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于LLM智能体记忆机制的三阶段演化框架（存储→反思→经验），分析了演化驱动力，并探讨了前沿阶段的主动探索与跨轨迹抽象机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体记忆研究碎片化，在操作系统工程与认知科学两个视角之间摇摆，缺乏统一的理论框架和演化视角，无法形成技术综合与连贯的发展图景。

Method: 提出三阶段演化框架：存储（轨迹保存）、反思（轨迹优化）、经验（轨迹抽象）；分析三大演化驱动力（长程一致性、动态环境挑战、持续学习目标）；探索两个前沿机制（主动探索、跨轨迹抽象）。

Result: 构建了统一的记忆机制演化框架，识别了推动演化的核心驱动力，并揭示了经验阶段的两项变革性机制。

Conclusion: 该工作为下一代LLM智能体开发提供了稳健的设计原则和清晰的路线图，弥合了不同研究视角之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents have fundamentally reshaped artificial intelligence by integrating external tools and planning capabilities. While memory mechanisms have emerged as the architectural cornerstone of these systems, current research remains fragmented, oscillating between operating system engineering and cognitive science. This theoretical divide prevents a unified view of technological synthesis and a coherent evolutionary perspective. To bridge this gap, this survey proposes a novel evolutionary framework for LLM agent memory mechanisms, formalizing the development process into three stages: Storage (trajectory preservation), Reflection (trajectory refinement), and Experience (trajectory abstraction). We first formally define these three stages before analyzing the three core drivers of this evolution: the necessity for long-range consistency, the challenges in dynamic environments, and the ultimate goal of continual learning. Furthermore, we specifically explore two transformative mechanisms in the frontier Experience stage: proactive exploration and cross-trajectory abstraction. By synthesizing these disparate views, this work offers robust design principles and a clear roadmap for the development of next-generation LLM agents.

</details>


### [517] [When Does a Language Model Commit? A Finite-Answer Theory of Pre-Verbalization Commitment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06723)
*Long Zhang,Wei-neng Chen,Feng-feng Wei,Zi-bo Qin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文通过有限答案偏好稳定化这一可计算对象，研究语言模型在生成最终答案前，其答案偏好的稳定时间点。在二元任务中，利用log-odds编码 δ(ξ) 测量模型对答案的偏好，发现该偏好可在可解析答案出现前17-31个token稳定，且该信号可线性恢复、部分可分离，但无法可靠用于生成控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型常在最终答案前生成推理过程，但已有的观察无法回答"模型的答案偏好何时变得稳定"这一问题。作者希望通过一个精确的可计算对象来量化答案偏好的固化时间。
